## Spec 215 тАФ After-fix photos (р╕лр╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В) (2026-06-28)

Status: **shipped as one held PR** (additive enum-add тЖТ danger-path; one-tap merge). Spec: `215-after-fix-photos.md`. From feedback `0fa23307` (project_director, WP detail): capture completion photos when a WP's rework is done, distinct from the original р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕зр╣Ар╕кр╕гр╣Зр╕И work photos. **Operator chose (via design question) the explicit new-phase option** over auto-distinguish / discoverability-only.

**Schema** (mig `20260813006000`, db:push'd + db:types'd, schema lane claimedтЖТreleased): `alter type photo_phase add value 'after_fix' after 'after'` (own migration, the enum-add convention). **Totality updates** (same held PR тАФ depend on the regenerated enum): `PHOTO_PHASE_LABEL.after_fix = "р╕лр╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В"`; `PHASES` += after_fix bucket; `CurrentPhotosByPhase`/`selectCurrentPhotosByPhase` += after_fix (load-detail adopts the canonical type + spreads it into `allPhotos`; both page count literals add the key); `PHOTO_PHASES` validation += after_fix; `shouldTransitionToPendingApproval` fires on after **or** after_fix (closes the rework loop); capture tile grid тЖТ 2├Ч2 with after_fix lock-free + never auto-"current"; pgTAP `09` enum pin тЖТ four values. **after_fix is deliberately NOT in `PHASE_ORDER`** (the 3-step progress bar) тАФ it's a rework addendum, so a never-reworked WP's progress is unchanged. Test-first/after: phase-progress (ignores after_fix), current-photos (groups after_fix), photo-write-helpers (after_fix transition), photos-phases (4 buckets), capture tile renders + tappable (`phase-uploader-after-fix.test.tsx`). Lint + typecheck + full suite green.

**Deferred:** auto-pre-select the р╕лр╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В tile when the WP is in rework (zero-tap); after-fix photos in the PDF report.

## Spec 214 тАФ Product code (р╕гр╕лр╕▒р╕кр╕кр╕┤р╕Щр╕Др╣Йр╕▓) (2026-06-28)

Status: **shipped as one held PR** (additive migration тЖТ danger-path; one-tap merge). Spec: `214-product-code.md`. From feedback `dfd70375` (procurement): a structured 6-digit code per catalog item (main 2 + sub 2 + sequence 2), prefix-searchable. Operator already has a scheme (procurement owns it).

**Design (v1):** the code is a FREE 6-digit string (`^[0-9]{6}$`), not a modelled main/sub taxonomy тАФ the existing `item_category` is a flat 13-value enum, and the company taxonomy is procurement's business decision, not a schema lock. Manual assignment, no backfill (existing items stay NULL).

**Schema** (mig `20260813005000`, db:push'd + db:types'd, schema lane claimed): `catalog_items.product_code` (nullable) + format CHECK + partial-unique index (unique when set). DROP+CREATE `create_catalog_item`/`update_catalog_item` to add `p_product_code text default null` (default keeps existing named calls valid; full-replace on update тАФ the form always sends the field). pgTAP `214` (column/nullable/index + RPC stores code + bad formatтЖТ22023 + dupтЖТ23505 + null allowed) all green; updated the signature pins in `120`/`121` (the "grep all pins" discipline).

**UI** (code-only, same held PR тАФ depends on the regenerated types): `src/lib/catalog/validate.ts` (`isValidProductCode`); `catalog-item-form.tsx` gains a 6-digit `р╕гр╕лр╕▒р╕кр╕кр╕┤р╕Щр╕Др╣Йр╕▓` field (segment hint + inline validity, digit-only input); `createCatalogItem`/`updateCatalogItem` thread `productCode` + disambiguate the 23505 (identity vs code); `catalog-list.tsx` shows the code as a mono chip AND gains a search box matching name/spec/code (type `0101` тЖТ prefix filter) + a no-match state; `/catalog` page selects `product_code`. New `PRODUCT_CODE_LABEL`. Test-first-ish: `catalog-validate.test.ts` (5) + catalog-list display/search/no-match + add/edit flow updated to carry the code. Lint + typecheck + **1866** unit tests green.

**Deferred:** threading the code into the PR-creation picker (`PurchaseRequestCatalogItem` + loaders) тАФ a follow-up that avoids touching the PR flow in this PR. Modelled main/sub taxonomy + auto-derived/auto-sequence codes = a later spec.

**Pre-existing pgTAP failures (NOT from this change):** `104-settlement` errored on a transient `524` API timeout; `200-store-inventory-reconciliation` fails its table-wide GL-1500-vs-subledger tie (have 459,539 / want 443,139 = the documented р╕┐16k unposted-equipment drift, [[spec208-store-centric-procurement]]). My branch touches no GL/on-hand/settlement files.

---

## Spec 213 тАФ Material logs (р╕Ыр╕гр╕░р╕зр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤р╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕), U1 (2026-06-28)

Status: **U1+U2+U3 shipped** (spec + assembly lib + page + drill-in, code-only, NO schema). Spec: `213-material-logs.md`. From feedback `15151fb3` (project_director, р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З): wants each material's history + current status "like order tracking." Operator clarified: **"no need to be a dashboard, item-specific logs."**

**U2 (route + view):** `src/app/projects/[projectId]/store/items/[catalogItemId]/page.tsx` (`requireRole(WP_DETAIL_ROLES)`; project_id-pinned reads so a cross-project id or hidden project 404s; an item with no on-hand row AND no movements 404s). Six parallel RLS-scoped reads (project, catalog_item, on-hand, + the five movement tables with WP/supplier joins) тЖТ `buildMaterialLog` тЖТ `DetailHeader` (back to р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З via `safeBackHref(from, storeHref)`) + a cost-side status card (on-hand qty + `р╕Хр╣Йр╕Щр╕Чр╕╕р╕Щр╣Ар╕Йр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕в` + total value, mirroring what the console already shows) + `MaterialLogView`. New presentational `material-log-view.tsx`: a newest-first timeline, per row an icon + reused Thai kind label (`STORE_RECEIVE_LABEL`/`STORE_ISSUE_LABEL`/`STOCK_COUNT_LABEL`/`STORE_RETURN_TO_STORE_LABEL`/`STORE_FIX_WRONG_ENTRY_LABEL`) + signed qty + cost (baht) + WP + count detail + note + running balance; empty state otherwise. New labels `MATERIAL_LOG_LABEL`/`STOCK_COUNT_LABEL` + nav SSOT `storeItemHref`. Test-first `material-log-view.test.tsx` (6).

**U3 (drill-in):** the store console on-hand row's identity+qty is now a `<Link>` to `storeItemHref(...)` (with `withBackFrom` so back returns to р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З); the `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ` action stays beside it, outside the anchor. Test-first: added a link assertion to `store-manager.test.tsx`.

Verify limit: the page is behind LINE auth + a project-with-stock, so not exercised in a live browser; the assembly lib + the view component are fully unit-tested (13 tests across the two files) and the row-link is asserted. Lint + typecheck + full suite green. **SPEC 213 COMPLETE (U1+U2+U3).**

**U1 (this unit):** the pure assembly `src/lib/store/material-log.ts` тАФ `buildMaterialLog(sources)` unions the five movement sources (receipts / issues / counts / returns / reversals) for one (project, item) into a newest-first `MaterialLogEntry[]` with a signed on-hand delta per kind (receipt/return `+`, issue `тИТ`, count `= variance`, reversal flips by which FK it undoes), the cost-side figure only (line cost / variance value / reversal value-delta тАФ never sell/margin, per the spec money rule), the WP for issue/return, and a running balance (ascending cumulative sum) whose newest row equals current on-hand. Stable tie-break (at тЖТ createdAt тЖТ id). No I/O тАФ the page (U2) does the RLS-scoped reads and maps rows into the inputs. Test-first `tests/unit/material-log.test.ts` (7: ordering, signed deltas incl. receipt-vs-issue reversal, balance invariant lands on 52, cost-side figures, tie-break, empty). Lint + typecheck green.

## Spec 211 тАФ Procurement terminology & level clarity, U1тАУU7 + U10a/b/c/d + U6b + U11a + U11b (2026-06-27)

Status: **shipping U1** (code-only, NO schema). Spec: `211-procurement-terminology-clarity.md`. Evidence: `docs/procurement-uxui-audit-2026-06.md` (multi-agent UX audit, 85 surfaces / 91 verified findings).

Operator report: admins can't intuitively distinguish a PO (р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н) from its PO-items. The headline cause (audit `po-vs-items-01`, confirmed **high**, independently rediscovered ├Ч9): a PO has no status column тАФ its roll-up is derived from member PRs тАФ so `PURCHASE_ORDER_STATUS_LABEL` and `PURCHASE_REQUEST_STATUS_LABEL` shared the byte-identical strings `р╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з` (PR purchased / PO ordered) and `р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕кр╣Ир╕З` (PR on_route / PO in_transit). On the PO detail the order pill and a line pill then read the same word.

**U1 (this unit):** split the PO roll-up vocabulary in `src/lib/i18n/labels.ts` тАФ `ordered: р╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з тЖТ р╕нр╕нр╕Бр╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з`, `in_transit: р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕кр╣Ир╕З тЖТ р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╣Гр╕Ъ` (PR map untouched; `open`/`partially_received`/`received` already order-scoped). Test-first: added a cross-map invariant in `tests/unit/i18n-labels.test.ts` тАФ the PR-status and PO-status maps must share NO string value (regression guard), plus pins for the two new strings. Display-only (logic keys on enums), so all PO surfaces (detail header, grid PO header row, phone PO card, delivery page) inherit it with no other code change. Verify limitation: not exercised in a live browser (PO detail needs LINE auth + seeded PO data); the unit test asserts the exact rendered strings the surfaces consume.

New server-safe `<PoBreadcrumb>` (`src/components/features/purchasing/po-breadcrumb.tsx`, parallel to `PoNumberTag`) renders `р╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н тА║ р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н [PO-####]` in the DetailHeader nameplate: the `р╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н` area crumb links back to `/requests` (the U6 landmark), the order crumb is terminal (`aria-current="page"`, the typed U2 chip), replacing the bare `<PoNumberTag>` eyebrow. **(2) `?from=` PRтЖТPO back-href** тАФ a PR reached from its PO now returns to the PO, not the worklist: the PO detail wraps each member-PR link in `withBackFrom(.../requests/{id}, /requests/orders/{poId})`, and the PR detail reads `?from` тЖТ `safeBackHref(from, "/requests")` for its back chip (icon-only, label stays `р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╣Др╕Ыр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н`; other entry points keep the `/requests` fallback). Built on the already-tested `back-href.ts` primitives (same mechanism as WP/feedback detail). Test-first `po-breadcrumb.test.tsx` (area crumb links to /requests; р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н + PO-0012 shown; only the area crumb is a link). Code-only.

**U11a (PR #?? тАФ shipping; operator-steered 2026-06-27):** self-purchase consolidation. Operator steer: "PR is PR, self purchase is self purchase тАж consolidate in 1 place" (+ self-purchase needs item-image + docs uploads). The two self-purchase actions sat in DIFFERENT WP tabs тАФ `р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ` (`SitePurchaseForm`, off-catalog + VAT invoice) in `р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н`, and `р╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Ар╕Зр╕┤р╕Щр╕кр╕Ф р╣Гр╕Кр╣Йр╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╣Ар╕ер╕в` (`SitePurchaseUseNow`, catalogued cash + buy/р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б) in `р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕Вр╕нр╕З`. New server-safe `<SelfPurchaseSection>` (`src/components/features/purchasing/self-purchase-section.tsx`) groups BOTH under one **`р╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Ар╕нр╕З`** heading with an invoice-vs-cash hint, rendered in the `р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н` tab below the PR form; the cash buy is removed from the `р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕Вр╕нр╕З` tab (now the pure `WpIssueStock` withdraw). PR (`р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н`) stays its own distinct affordance тАФ "PR is PR". Both self-purchase RPC gates exclude procurement тЖТ kept the `!readOnly` gate. Test-first `self-purchase-section.test.tsx` (both paths under one heading). 1807/1807. Code-only, no schema.

**U11b (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path RLS; operator-merge):** a self-purchase now carries an **item photo** in addition to the receipt/invoice docs. **Correction to the U11a-era "code-only" estimate:** the `reference` attachment INSERT RLS arm only admitted status `requested`, so a `site_purchased` self-purchase couldn't attach an item photo. Additive migration `20260813003900` widens the `reference` arm to also admit `site_purchased` (DROP+CREATE in place, reconstructed verbatim from the live spec-182-U4 policy тАФ only the reference arm changed; storage policy already admitted `site_purchased`). New `addReferenceAttachment` action (mirrors `addInvoiceAttachment`, purpose `reference`, `site_purchased`-gated) + thin `ItemPhotoUploader` (reuses `InvoiceUploader`, label `р╣Бр╕Щр╕Ър╕гр╕╣р╕Ыр╕кр╕┤р╕Щр╕Др╣Йр╕▓`), shown beside the docs uploader in `SitePurchaseForm`'s success state. Only `#2` has a PR to attach to (`#3` use-now writes straight to stock movements, no PR тЖТ item images there = separate feature). Test-first `site-purchase-form-photos.test.tsx` + pgTAP `33-site-purchase.test.sql` E.1/E.2. **RLS = danger-path тЖТ PR held for operator one-tap merge; migration `db:push`'d to the shared DB ahead of merge (additive, safe).**

**Cross-engine band reconcile (PR #?? тАФ shipping):** `terminology-05`/`worklist-hub-16`, critic gap X2. The site worklist (`request-bands.ts`) and procurement pipeline (`procurement-pipeline.ts`) are two band engines over one table. Confirmed a user only ever sees ONE engine (`isProcurement` gate in `requests/page.tsx`) тЖТ no same-screen contradiction (that was U7); the real risk was DRIFT of the shared band terms (`р╕гр╕нр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤`, `р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕кр╣Ир╕З`, the `р╕гр╕нр╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н` core were duplicated literals). New `src/lib/purchasing/worklist-band-vocab.ts` `WORKLIST_BAND_TERM` SSOT; both engines source the shared terms from it (procurement verbatim; site `to_order` = `р╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з ` + the shared core). The deliberate per-view differences are PRESERVED (site terminal `р╣Ар╕кр╕гр╣Зр╕Ир╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з`/`closed` vs procurement `р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з`). Behaviour-preserving (every rendered string byte-identical). Test-first `worklist-band-vocab.test.ts`. Code-only.

**U9a (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path accounting; operator-merge):** carry the PO-vs-items clarity into the accounting surface. (1) voucher PO reference `#3` тЖТ `formatPoNumber()` = `PO-0003` (reuses the U2 SSOT; `accounting/purchases/[id]/page.tsx`). (2) register count `{n} р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` тЖТ `{n} р╣Гр╕Ър╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н` via new tested `purchaseRegisterCountLabel()` in `purchases-view.ts` (accounting-ap-02, moved from U3). Test-first `purchases-view.test.ts`. Display-only, no schema; `src/app/accounting/**` = danger-path тЖТ held. **Deferred тЖТ U9b:** the live PO link (blocked тАФ `accounting` role isn't in `PURCHASING_ROLES` so the PO detail route is a dead link for it; needs an access-policy decision + `load-voucher` to expose the PO id) and the register grouping-by-PO with subtotal (bigger restructure).

**U8 (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path notifications; operator-merge):** PR notifications name their parent PO (critic gap X1). `compose-notification.ts` pushed raw PR status words with no PO context; now `р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н PR-0012 ┬╖ р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н PO-0003: р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕кр╣Ир╕З`. Code-only, no migration: the PO is resolved at compose time in `drain/route.ts` (the outbox row already carries `purchase_request_id` тЖТ batched 2-hop PRтЖТPOтЖТ`po_number` тЖТ new `ComposeContext.poNumber`, mirrors the `wpCode` enrichment). Composer drops its duplicated local `formatPrNumber` for the U2 SSOT via a new `prRef()` helper. Absent PO тЖТ unchanged. Test-first `compose-notification.test.ts`. `src/lib/notifications/**` + `src/app/api/notifications/**` = danger-path тЖТ held.

**U11c-A (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path money migration; operator-merge):** VAT-invoiced buy-&-use-now. Operator approved the bounded U11c design (subagent posting-map showed the ONLY real missing combo is catalogued+VAT+use-now; free-text+use-now is structurally impossible AND not real тАФ `record_site_purchase` already books free-text to the WP). `site_purchase_use_now` gains `p_vat_rate` (DROP+CREATE, 7-arg; new arg defaults 0 тЖТ existing caller unbroken): stores the receipt NET + snapshots `vat_rate`, so the receipt poster (`post_stock_receipt_to_gl`, spec 208 U4b) splits `Dr 1300 Input VAT` via its no-PR fallback. `p_unit_cost` stays GROSS (ADR 0045); WP charged NET. At `p_vat_rate=0` byte-identical. migration `20260813004000`; pgTAP 228 +section F (107@7% тЖТ Dr1500 100/Dr1300 7/Cr2100 107, WP carries 100) + signature pins тЖТ 29/29. Migration db:push'd; only the known file-200 reconciliation drift fails (pre-existing, unrelated). Danger-path (money RPC) тЖТ held.

**U11c-B (PR #?? тАФ shipping; code-only):** the unified guided `р╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Ар╕нр╕З` form тАФ completes U11c. New `<SelfPurchaseForm>` replaces U11a's two cards: item is catalog (picker) OR free-text (mode toggle); `р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щр╣Ар╕Зр╕┤р╕Щ` GROSS; `р╕бр╕╡р╣Гр╕Ър╕Бр╕│р╕Бр╕▒р╕Ър╕ар╕▓р╕йр╕╡` splits Input VAT (1300); `р╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Гр╕Кр╣Йр╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╣Ар╕ер╕в` shown for catalog items only (store keys on `catalog_item_id`). Routes catalog+use-now тЖТ `sitePurchaseUseNow` (VAT-aware via U11c-A), else тЖТ `recordSitePurchase` (books WP; success reveals item-photo + receipt uploaders). Plumbing: `validateSitePurchase` + both actions gain `vatRate` (neither self-purchase form collected VAT before). `SelfPurchaseSection` renders the one form; old `SitePurchaseForm`/`SitePurchaseUseNow` now unused тЖТ follow-up task to delete. Test-first `validate-site-purchase` (VAT) + `self-purchase-form.test.tsx` (both routes + VAT). 1823/1823.

**U9b (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path auth/access; operator-merge; operator chose Option A):** the accounting voucher's PO becomes a live link into the PO detail. New `PO_DETAIL_VIEW_ROLES = PURCHASING_ROLES + accounting` opens the PO detail route to accounting **read-only**; accounting reads the PO via the admin client (org-wide money posture, no RLS grant/migration), sees money (`canSeeMoney = isBackOffice || isAccounting`), but write actions stay gated out (`isBackOffice`/`RECEIVE_ROLES` exclude accounting). `load-voucher` exposes `poId`; the voucher's `р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н` row links to `/requests/orders/[poId]` with `?from=` тЖТ its back chip returns to the voucher (PO detail back chip gains `?from` via `safeBackHref`). Test-first `role-sets.test.ts`. Auth change тЖТ held.

**U9c (PR #?? тАФ HELD, danger-path accounting; operator-merge):** register grouped by PO (`accounting-ap-03`). The accounting purchase register now reads a PO at a time тАФ each PO group gets a `<PoNumberTag>` header + a gross subtotal; direct/site buys (no PO) group last (`р╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕З (р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н)`). New pure `groupRegisterByPo()` in `purchases-view.ts` (generic, satang-summed, PO groups first-appearance order, no-PO last); `load-purchases` resolves a `poNumber` per row. Test-first `purchases-view.test.ts`. Display-only, no schema; `src/app/accounting/**` тЖТ held.

**Spec 211 COMPLETE** тАФ U1тАУU11 + cross-engine band SSOT + U6b + U8 + U9a/b/c + dead-form cleanup. (Dead-self-purchase-form cleanup done via #118.)

## Spec 206 тАФ WHT certificate recording UI (2026-06-26)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-26** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G11** тАФ
the last accounting back-office write gap. The `record_wht_certificate` RPC, the
`wht_certificates`/`wht_rates` tables, the GL-posting trigger, the pure
`validateWhtCertificate` validator, and the read-only register `/accounting/wht`
all existed since spec 149 U6, but the validator was **orphaned** тАФ no write
surface. This unit adds the "+ р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╣Гр╕Ър╕лр╕▒р╕Бр╕ар╕▓р╕йр╕╡" form over the existing RPC.

**Live-DB gate verification (the key find).** Before wiring the gate I queried the
live RPC: `record_wht_certificate` admits `pm/super/project_director` тАФ the
migration _file_ shows pm/super, but `тАж0751тАж_project_director_rpc_gates.sql`
widened it live (the "live-body re-source trap"). Same for `create_client_billing`

- `post_journal_entry` (both pd live). So the gate reuses **`PM_ROLES`** (the
  role-home SSOT) via `isManagerRole`, NOT a fresh `[pm,super]` literal тАФ matching
  the journal/G8 precedent and the live RPC. Among ACCOUNTING_ROLES reachers only
  super_admin is a manager, so today the write affordance lights up for super_admin
  only (auto-widens if spec 166 re-adds PM/PD to the page gate).

**TDD:** `resolveWhtRate(incomeType, override, rates)` (mirrors the RPC's
`coalesce(p_wht_rate, default_rate)` тАФ finite override wins incl. 0; else the
income-type default; unknown+no-override тЖТ null) written RED-first (6 cases) then
GREEN. `validateWhtCertificate` unchanged (still the amount gate). **Files:**
`resolveWhtRate` in `wht-certificate.ts`; `loadWhtFormData` in `load-registers.ts`
(income types + 3 party masters, parallel reads); `wht/actions.ts`
`recordWhtCertificate` (gate PM_ROLES, pre-validate, deducted-needs-party friendly
error, omit-optional args, call on auth.supabase, revalidate); `wht/record-wht-form.tsx`
(`'use client'` bottom-sheet тАФ direction/form/income-typeтЖТrate-autofill/13-digit
tax id/base/party[supplier|contractor for р╣Ар╕гр╕▓р╕лр╕▒р╕Б, client for р╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕лр╕▒р╕Б]/date/note +
live wht_amount preview); wired into `wht/page.tsx` (canWrite = isManagerRole,
parallel load). Reuses `AccountingActionResult` + `ACCOUNTING_ACTION_ERROR` from
`billing-actions.ts`. Verified: typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ full vitest **1723/1723** green.
Visual preview skipped (no dev-auth path тАФ LINE OAuth only; the form is a 1:1 twin
of the shipped spec-204 billing form). Money renders via the canonical `baht()`
SSOT.

**Open questions / follow-ups:**

- `BILLING_WRITE_ROLES = [pm,super]` (spec 204) is now confirmed **stale vs its
  live RPC** (which admits project_director) тАФ a pre-existing UI under-grant (PD
  can post billings per the RPC but the form never offers it). Not a security hole;
  flagged for the role-set SSOT consolidation (architecture-audit **rank 2**:
  fold billing/journal/wht's identical pm/super/pd accounting-write sets into one
  `ACCOUNTING_WRITE_ROLES`). Not fixed here (scope).
- `pay_source_table`/`pay_source_id` linking (cert тЖТ its source payment), WHT-cert
  auto-record at billing certify, and р╕а.р╕З.р╕Ф. PDF generation remain deferred.

## Gap G8 тАФ manual journal-entry UI (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-25** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G8** тАФ
the `post_journal_entry` / `reverse_journal_entry` RPCs existed since spec 149 with
no screen. New `/accounting/journal` (general journal): a multi-line entry form
(date + memo + account-picker/debit/credit rows, one-sided enforced at input, LIVE
double-entry balance preview via `validateJournalLines`) + a recent-entries list
with a per-entry р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г (reverse) control. **Gate = `PM_ROLES`** (pm/super/
project_director тАФ exactly who the RPCs admit; verified LIVE that a later migration
widened the gate to add project_director, NOT what the original migration file
shows). Placed in /accounting but gated to PM_ROLES (the journal-POST capability is
distinct from accounting-VIEW; only super_admin overlaps = today's operator); entry
point on the accounting landing shown only to `isManagerRole` so accounting-role
gets no dead link. **TDD:** `canReverseJournalEntry(status, alreadyReversed)`
predicate (mirrors the RPC guard тАФ original stays 'posted' after reversal since
append-only, so reversibility needs both) written RED-first then GREEN. **Loader**
`load-manual-journals.ts` parallelises fetches (specs 147/148) + one account map
resolves picker labels AND line codes (no N+1). **Riders (audit rank 7+12):**
standardised the new action on `requireActionRole`; hoisted the shared
`ACCOUNTING_ACTION_ERROR` next to `AccountingActionResult` and pointed billings at
it (DRY); wired the previously-dormant `validateJournalLines` (rank 12 тАФ its
intended consumer). Verified: typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ full vitest 1698/1698 ┬╖ build
green; loader queries confirmed against live schema. Visual preview skipped (no
dev-auth path тАФ LINE OAuth only). **Open:** PM/PD have no nav entry point (can't
reach /accounting landing); accounting-role can't post manual JEs (RPC excludes it,
accounting is v3) тАФ both deferred, not blockers. Money renders via the canonical
`baht()` SSOT (audit rank 1 consolidation is a separate follow-up unit).

## Audit тАФ architecture & quality + GL test de-brittle (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED.** Ran an 8-lens multi-agent architecture/quality audit (49
agents, adversarial verify) before resuming feature builds: 40 candidates тЖТ 24
confirmed + 16 partial, 0 refuted тЖТ 15-item ranked register
(`docs/architecture-quality-audit-2026-06.md`), woven into the phase plan. Codebase
healthy; debt = latent drift/hygiene. **Acted on the one real blocker (rank 3):**
de-brittled GL pgTAP 81/85/86/87/88 (asserted table-wide aggregates that go red
once real revenue posts; 81 was already RED against the live DB's 27 real
journal_posted rows). 81 тЖТ fixture-scoped audit count (target_id); 85/86/87 тЖТ clear
gl_posting_outbox before the enqueue (mirrors 84); 88 тЖТ project-scope the
4100/1210 totals + delta the global retention control, keeping ╬гdebit=╬гcredit +
tie-out flags. Full pgTAP 175/175, 2983 assertions, 0 failures. Next recommended:
rank 1 money-SSOT, rank 2 role-set dedup (incl. drain omits project_director).

## Spec 204 тАФ client billing + retention write UI (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-25** (code-only, NO schema/db:push). Audit gap **G10** тАФ the
single biggest "backend-shipped-no-UI" gap. Spec 149 U5 shipped the client_billings /
retention_receivables tables, the create/certify/mark-due/release RPCs, the GL-posting
triggers, and the read-only registers тАФ but no UI to create a claim, certify it (book
AR/revenue/VAT/WHT + accrue retention), mark retention due, or release it. The GL had a
cost side, no revenue side. This unit adds the write surfaces.

- TDD (RED first): `tests/unit/billing-actions.test.ts` (status predicates
  canCertifyBilling/canMarkRetentionDue/canReleaseRetention mirroring the RPC guards) тЖТ
  `src/lib/accounting/billing-actions.ts` (+ `BILLING_WRITE_ROLES` SSOT =
  [project_manager, super_admin], matching the RPC gate exactly тАФ NOT project_director).
- Actions: `billings/actions.ts` (createClientBilling, certifyClientBilling), `retention/
actions.ts` (markRetentionDue, releaseRetention) тАФ gate the AUTHED session, call the RPC
  on auth.supabase (never admin), revalidate both registers.
- UI: `CreateBillingForm` (BottomSheet + live computeBillingBreakdown preview), certify via
  ConfirmActionButton on draft/submitted rows; `RetentionRowActions` (mark-due date +
  release). Controls gated to BILLING_WRITE_ROLES (beta: super_admin only; auto-widens when
  spec 166 re-adds PM). Accounting role stays READ-ONLY on billing/retention (RPC = pm/super).
- QUALITY (architecture-first bar): extracted the copy-pasted server-action role-check into
  a shared `requireActionRole()` in `src/lib/auth/action-gate.ts` (periods/billings/retention
  now use it); extracted `baht()` into `src/lib/i18n/labels.ts` (3 of ~12 inline copies
  migrated); parallelized the billings-page reads (no waterfall, spec 147/148). Adversarial
  `/code-review high` тЖТ 3 real findings FIXED (rate-field reset leak across claims; canWrite
  hardcodedтЖТSSOT drift; baht DRY); rest refuted (input type=date guards dates; emptyтЙаerror).
- Verify: typecheck + lint + full vitest green; pgTAP 85/86 + client-billing.test already
  cover the RPCs/math. Operator visual-confirm on /accounting/billings + /accounting/retention
  as super_admin.

Open follow-ups (architecture-audit sweep): accountingтЖТcertify yes/no (a spec/product call тАФ
RPC currently pm/super); migrate the remaining ~9 inline `baht` copies and the rest of the
server-action files to `requireActionRole()`.

## Spec 203 U2 тАФ widen post_purchase_to_gl gate + remediate the 9 (2026-06-25)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-25** (0f13656, mig 20260813002100, pgTAP 225 plan 14).
Applied via db:push after operator OK; a manual `drain_gl_posting(100)` posted the 9 тЖТ
**verified: gl_posting_outbox purchase jobs = 27 posted / 0 failed / 0 pending; 9 new
WP-bound purchase entries, AP total р╕┐102,453.57** (matches the stranded amount exactly).
4-lens review тЖТ logic ships safe; the one blocker (seed aborting on CHECKs) was fixed. The drain-outage left 9 WP-bound PRs that advanced purchasedтЖТdelivered
before any drain ran; `post_purchase_to_gl` gated on purchased/site_purchased only, so it
refused them (~р╕┐102k unposted). U2 widens the gate to the committed-and-not-voided set
(purchased/site_purchased/on_route/delivered) and re-enqueues the 9 (failedтЖТpending) so the
cron posts them. SAFE (no double-book): the enqueue trigger fires ONLY at the purchased
transition, so one job per PR; WP-less stays suppressed (return null); divert reverses
directly (doesn't rely on the refusal). Re-sourced from LIVE 20260813001000.

mig 20260813002100 (gate + remediation UPDATE) ┬╖ pgTAP 225 (plan 12, RED on delivered/
on_route posting). A applied first verified green (224 + 85/86/87). **A's drain surfaced a
test-fragility casualty: 81-journal test 28 counts journal_posted audit rows table-wide
(have 20 want 2) тАФ same class the prune author flagged for 82/84/88. Folds into a
test-hardening sweep (scope all such counts to their fixtures) тАФ own follow-up, AFTER U2
posts the 9.**

## Spec 203 U1 тАФ schedule the GL posting drain (2026-06-25)

Status: **BUILT тАФ awaiting db:push OK** (2026-06-25; SCHEMA тАФ pg_cron). A dig into 3
"pre-existing" pgTAP fails (85/86/87) found a PROD GAP: `drain_gl_posting` (spec 149)
was never scheduled тАФ cron had gl-posting-PRUNE but not DRAIN, worker is PDF-only. 27
purchase_requests sat pending since 06-23; in-app GL posting nothing.

**B (done, operator-approved one-off):** `select drain_gl_posting(100)` posted 18 backlog
jobs; this re-greened 85/86/87 (pending backlog gone). **A (this unit):** mig
20260813002000 = pg_cron `gl-posting-drain` every minute calling `drain_gl_posting(100)`
directly (pure SQL, no app endpoint, mirrors the prune cron). pgTAP 224 (plan 3) asserts
the cron exists тАФ RED pre-apply, GREEN post-apply.

**Discovered follow-ups (own units):** (1) 9 WP-bound `delivered` PRs (~р╕┐102k) won't post тАФ
`post_purchase_to_gl` gates on status purchased/site_purchased; relax + re-post. (2) drain
lacks FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED (overlap). (3) 85/86/87 assert total count not own-job (fragile).

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-25** (be54719, mig 20260813001900, pgTAP 223
24/24 green post-apply; db:types no diff; lint┬╖typecheck┬╖vitest 1690 green). Applied
via db:push after operator OK (5-lens adversarial review тЖТ ship; pgTAP REDтЖТGREEN
confirmed F2 blocks + F3 sets/restores). The 3 pre-existing GL-drain failures
(85/86/87) are unchanged тАФ unrelated.

F2 = `check_out_equipment` rejects gear not physically on hand (status тИЙ
{available,on_site,in_use}); F3 = checkout flips `equipment_items.status`тЖТ`in_use`,
check-in restores the movement-derived status. `CREATE OR REPLACE` of both usage RPCs тАФ
**no new table/column/grant/policy/enum**.

**Re-source discipline:** bodies sourced from the LIVE `20260767000400` (five-role gate
incl. project_director, ADR 0058) + the F2/F3 lines тАФ never the pre-director original.

F2 status blocks, F3 in_use set + restore (deployedтЖТon_site, noneтЖТavailable), gate
regression (director lives / visitor 42501 = the re-source guard), existing-guard
regression (unpriced/complete/double-open). App: one `checkOutEquipment` error branch.

## Spec 200 U2 тАФ assign a worker to a project at creation (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest green).
Follow-up to spec 200: the "add worker" form scoped a project-less worker, so a
new DC needed a second step to assign. U2 lets you pick the project on day one.

**Test-first** (RED): `worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` тАФ creating with a chosen
project calls `createWorker` with `projectId`. 1 RED тЖТ green.

**App (no DB тАФ reuses both existing RPCs):**

- The add-worker form gains the same optional **р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г** `<select>` (`AddWorkerForm`
  now takes the `projects` prop).
- `createWorker` captures the new worker's id and, when a project was chosen, calls
  `assign_worker_to_project` тАФ a **create + assign**, avoiding a `create_worker`
  signature widen (no DROP+CREATE / re-grant trap). The assign is soft: the worker
  exists either way; a failed assign returns a message + can be set in the edit sheet.

## Spec 200 тАФ assign a worker to a project (the missing UI) (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest green).
Operator asked "how do we assign DC to projects?" тАФ the answer was _you couldn't
from the app_. The `assign_worker_to_project` RPC + `workers.project_id` (one
project at a time, audit trail) existed since spec 172/the assignment migration,
but `/workers` only created/edited/set-rate/invited тАФ no assign control. This
wires the engine to the UI. No DB change.

**Test-first** (RED): extended `tests/unit/worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` тАФ shows
the current project on the row; the edit sheet's р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г select тЖТ `assignWorkerToProject`
on save; no assign when unchanged. 3 RED тЖТ green (existing 7 still pass).

**App:**

- `assignWorkerToProject({ workerId, projectId })` action тАФ relays to the
  `assign_worker_to_project` definer (gate PM/super/director/procurement); `""`/null
  unassigns (RPC `p_project` defaults null тЖТ cleared).
- `WorkerRosterManager`: `ManagedWorker` += `project_id`; new `projects` prop
  (`AssignableProject[]`, default `[]`); each row shows its current project (or
  "р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕╕р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г"); the per-row edit sheet gains a р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г `<select>` тЖТ
  assign-on-save (reassign moves it; one project at a time).
- `/workers` reads `workers.project_id` + the assigner's RLS-scoped projects.

**Note for the operator:** assignment is NOT required to log labour (the WP
labour picker lists everyone, ordering the project's crew first) тАФ it powers the
/store custody-receiver picker + the labour-picker ordering. Labour itself is
logged as full/half **days** (DC paid per day), per worker per day, on the WP
р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ (#wp-labor) tab. **Out of scope:** assign-at-creation (the add form still
makes a project-less worker тАФ `create_worker` takes no project; follow-up if wanted).

## Spec 198 тАФ divert a delivered WP-bound line into the store, U2 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (ADR 0064; mig 20260813000900; pgTAP
216; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ db:test). **SPEC 198 COMPLETE (U1+U2).**
Operator chose Option 3 (AskUserQuestion) тАФ the cost-clean version of "pre-fill
р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ from a delivery." Investigation found the simple pre-fill has no target
(store-bound lines already auto-check-in via spec 195 P3; stocking a WP-bound
line as-is double-counts), so U2 is an inventory **diversion with a GL transfer**.

**ADR 0064** тАФ divert a delivered WP-bound purchase into the store (cost transfer
WP-WIP тЖТ Inventory). Surfaced the GL risk + the design BEFORE building; operator
approved "build it + push (with ADR)."

**GL transfer (net):** reverse the WP purchase (Dr 2100 AP / Cr 1400 WP-WIP) +
the new stock_receipt (Dr 1500 Inventory / Cr 2100 AP) тЖТ WP-WIP 0 ┬╖ Inventory
+cost ┬╖ **AP unchanged**. A later р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б returns it Dr 1400 / Cr 1500 (cost lands on
the WP once, at usage тАФ the store-bound model).

**DB (migs 20260813000900 + 20260813001000):**

- New `divert_purchase_to_store(p_request_id)` definer RPC тАФ gate `SITE_STAFF`
  (procurement read-only in the store, spec 197), membership `can_see_project`,
  guards (delivered, WP-bound, catalogued, not already diverted тАФ the
  `stock_receipts_pr_uniq` index is the hard guard). It **reverses the WP purchase
  GL entry directly** (`reverse_journal_internal`, Dr 2100/Cr 1400) + **skips any
  pending purchase outbox job**, then inserts the `stock_receipt` (PR-stamped,
  all-in cost тЖТ auto-enqueues Dr 1500/Cr AP), rolls `stock_on_hand`, sets the PR
  `work_package_id = NULL`.
- **`post_purchase_to_gl` is UNCHANGED.** The first attempt (000900) re-enqueued a
  `purchase` job to do the reversal + reordered `post_purchase_to_gl`'s
  reverse-before-suppress тАФ but that poster only accepts `purchased`/`site_purchased`,
  so a _delivered_ PR raises `P0001` and the reversal never fires. **pgTAP 216
  caught this** (WP-WIP stayed 300 = double-count). The corrective mig 001000
  reverts `post_purchase_to_gl` to LIVE and rewrites the RPC to reverse directly +
  skip the stale job. **Lesson: the async GL poster won't process a status it
  gates on тАФ reverse synchronously in the RPC.**
- **Async-safe:** purchase posted тЖТ reverse it; still pending тЖТ skip it (no WP-WIP
  ever). Both converge.

**App:** `divertPurchaseToStore({ requestId })` action + `DivertToStoreList`
client component (per-line `р╕вр╣Йр╕▓р╕вр╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` via `ConfirmActionButton`). The р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З page
reads the project's delivered + WP-bound + catalogued PRs not yet diverted (RLS

- filter out those with a `stock_receipts.purchase_request_id`), gated to
  `canIssue` (SITE_STAFF); renders the list after `StoreManager`. `db:types` regen.

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/divert-to-store-list.test.tsx` (list + confirm
тЖТ `divertPurchaseToStore`). **pgTAP 216 (plan 17, the ledger proof):**
structure/anon-deny; pre-divert WP-WIP=300; guards (visitor/non-member 42501,
not-delivered/WP-less 22023); happy divert; receipt-stamped + on-hand rolled + PR
WP-less; post the GL; **WP-WIP nets to 0 ┬╖ Inventory=300 ┬╖ AP net credit=300**;
already-diverted 22023.

**v1 scope:** whole-line divert only (no partial); the PR loses its WP identity in
the list (trace via `stock_receipts.purchase_request_id`); full undo of a divert
(re-attach the WP) is out of scope.

## Spec 198 тАФ multi-line р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ (bulk stock check-in), U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (mig 20260813000800; pgTAP 215; lint ┬╖
typecheck ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ db:test green). Operator: "checking in items is too
difficult, one at a time тАФ the check-in list should be the same as delivery."
The р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З `р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Б` form was single-item-per-submit; U1 makes it a multi-row
**grid** recorded in one atomic call. (Operator chose **Both** grid + pre-fill-
from-delivery; U2 = pre-fill, sequenced next.)

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-checkin-grid.test.tsx` тАФ opens a grid with
one draft row + `р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` add-row + disabled `р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф`; enables on a
complete row; records every complete row in one `recordStockInBulk` call; drops
incomplete rows. 4 RED тЖТ green.

**DB:** new `record_stock_in_bulk(p_project_id uuid, p_lines jsonb)` definer RPC
(mig 20260813000800) тАФ same role gate as the post-197 `record_stock_in`
(site_admin + PM tier + procurement + director), membership (`can_see_project OR
procurement`), per-line validation (qty>0, costтЙе0, active item, supplier exists),
**atomic** (any bad line rolls back the whole batch тАФ no partial check-in), each
line inserts a `stock_receipts` row + rolls into `stock_on_hand`. Returns the
count. `CREATE` (new fn) + explicit grants (anon revoked). The single
`record_stock_in` is **KEPT** (spec 195 P3 auto-receipt depends on it). pgTAP 215
(plan 18): structure/anon-deny ┬╖ 2-line additive happy ┬╖ 7 validations ┬╖ atomicity
(good+bad line тЖТ 0 receipts) ┬╖ visitor/non-member 42501 ┬╖ site_admin member happy.

**App:**

- `recordStockInBulk({ projectId, lines })` action (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) тАФ
  maps rows тЖТ jsonb `[{catalog_item_id, qty, unit_cost, supplier_id, note}]`,
  calls the RPC, maps 42501/22023, `revalidatePath` the project store.
- `StoreManager` р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ sheet rewritten as a draft-row grid (`DraftReceiptRow[]`
  state, `+ р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` add, per-row `р╕ер╕Ъ` remove, one `р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф` submit;
  enabled once тЙе1 complete row; incomplete rows dropped on submit). Reuses the
  category-grouped item `<select>` per row. Swapped `recordStockIn`тЖТ`recordStockInBulk`.
- Updated the two spec-177 `store-manager.test.tsx` р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ tests to the grid
  (button `р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф`, asserts `recordStockInBulk` with a `lines` array).
- `db:types` regenerated (new RPC).

**U2 (pre-fill р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ from a PO delivery тАФ incl. the anti-double-book rule vs
spec 195 P3 auto-receipt) NOT started.**

## Spec 197 тАФ empty-р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З state, U3 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest green).

"no stock" line was a dead end. The empty state now:

  header р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ button is dropped when empty, so there is one clear lead).

  **р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓** links to the project's supply-plan chip, but only when the viewer
  can reach it (`SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES`); for site_admin (can't plan supply) it stays

- Suppresses the `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` full-stocktake (U2) while the store is empty
  (counting zero items is meaningless).

links р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓ when `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref` set; plain text (no link) when null.
2 RED тЖТ green. Also updated the spec-177 `store-manager.test.tsx` empty assertion
(old "р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Бр╣Гр╕Щр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М" тЖТ "р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╣Гр╕Щр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З").

**App:**

- `StoreManager` gains `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref?: string | null` (default null).
  Non-null тЖТ empty state renders р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓ as a `<Link>` to the supply plan +
  a `BUTTON_PRIMARY` р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ lead; null тЖТ plain text. Header р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ now shows only
  when `onHand.length > 0`.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx`: `canPlanSupply = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES`,
  passes `emptyStateSupplyPlanHref={canPlanSupply ? supplyPlanHref(id) : null}`;
  gates `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` on `canIssue && onHand.length > 0`.

Ties into the first-real-project adoption arc (spec 192). Placement/UX only.

## Spec 197 тАФ р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ unified into р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З, U2 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest green).
Retires the standalone `/stock-count` route and folds counting into the
per-project `р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` surface. Two modes, one home, one `record_stock_count`:

- **Mode A тАФ spot count** (unchanged): the per-row `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ` on `StoreManager`,
  already on the р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З page for SITE_STAFF (`canIssue`).
- **Mode B тАФ full stocktake** (relocated): the `/stock-count` page's
  `StoreCountManager` (the focused count-only item list) now renders on the
  р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З page behind a `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` toggle, gated to `canIssue` (SITE_STAFF).

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-full-stocktake.test.tsx` тАФ `FULL_STOCKTAKE_LABEL`,
`hidePicker` suppresses the picker, `collapsible` hides the list behind the
`р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` toggle until opened. 3 RED тЖТ green.

**App:**

- `StoreCountManager` gains `hidePicker` (default false тЖТ existing B2 picker
  behavior preserved) + `collapsible` (default false тЖТ list always open). When
  `collapsible`, the list starts closed behind a `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` toggle.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx` renders `<StoreCountManager hidePicker
collapsible>` after `StoreManager` (maps the on-hand to `CountStockRow[]`),
  gated to `canIssue`.
- `labels.ts`: `+FULL_STOCKTAKE_LABEL = "р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З"`; retired `STOCK_COUNT_LABEL`
  (its only consumer, the `/stock-count` page, is gone).
- `app/stock-count/page.tsx` тЖТ thin `redirect("/projects")`.
- Removed the site_admin `/stock-count` `SettingsLink` (+ orphan `ClipboardCheck`
  / `STOCK_COUNT_LABEL` imports).
- `bottom-tab-bar.tsx`: `SETTINGS_TAB.match` drops `/stock-count`.
- `nav-back-affordance.test.ts`: `/stock-count` тЖТ EXCLUDED (now a redirect).

**Scope note / open question:** the spec describes Mode B as a "batch submit"
full-list form (every item with an inline counted-qty field, one submit). The
actual `/stock-count` component is **per-row** (a sheet per item) тАФ the spec
author's recollection of the existing surface was inaccurate. Per the spec's own
overriding rule ("no new store capability тАФ relocation + consolidation only"), I
**relocated the existing per-row component** rather than build a new batch form
(that would be new capability). If the operator genuinely wants a single-submit
batch grid, that is a follow-up spec, not U2.

**Dead-but-tested:** `StoreCountManager`'s picker `onChange` still pushes
`/stock-count?project=тАж` тАФ unreachable now (prod always passes `hidePicker`; the
standalone route redirects), but kept so the spec-178-B2 picker test stays green.

**U3 (empty-р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З state) NOT started.**

## Spec 197 тАФ р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З as a per-project surface, U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (mig 20260813000700; pgTAP 181; lint ┬╖
typecheck ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ db:test green). The store stops being a global `/settings`
drill-down reached through a project picker and becomes a **per-project
destination**: a sub-route `/projects/[projectId]/store` reached from a `р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З`
header icon-chip (after `р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓`), exactly like `р╕Хр╕▓р╕гр╕▓р╕Зр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ` / `р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓`.

**Test-first** (RED): `tests/unit/store-project-surface.test.tsx` тАФ pins the
testable contract (`storeHref` builder, `STORE_LABEL = "р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З"`, the settings tab
drops `/store`, the projects tab lights on `/projects/[id]/store`, StoreManager
`hidePicker` hides the picker). 4 RED тЖТ green.

**App:**

- New route `app/projects/[projectId]/store/page.tsx` mirroring
  `schedule/page.tsx`: own `DetailHeader` (back тЖТ project), gated to
  `WP_DETAIL_ROLES`, projectId from the route (RLS scopes the viewer), renders
  the existing `StoreManager` with `hidePicker`. `canIssue = SITE_STAFF` (admits
  site_admin's р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б; procurement stays read-only); P&L stays super/director.
- `app/projects/[projectId]/page.tsx`: `canSeeStore = WP_DETAIL_ROLES.includes(role)`
  - a `Warehouse` `р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З` chip after `р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓`.
- `StoreManager` gains an optional `hidePicker` prop (default false) тАФ the
  per-project route supplies the project, so the global picker is suppressed.
- `labels.ts`: `STORE_LABEL` changed `"р╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣Мр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ"` тЖТ **`"р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З"`** (the
  destination SSOT, used by chip + sub-route header).
- `project-paths.ts`: new `storeHref(projectId)` builder.
- Removed the two `/store` `SettingsLink`s (procurement + isManager blocks) +
  the now-orphan `Warehouse` / `STORE_LABEL` imports in `settings/page.tsx`.
- Legacy `/store` тЖТ thin `redirect("/projects")`.
- `bottom-tab-bar.tsx`: `SETTINGS_TAB.match` drops `/store` (the projects tab
  owns the new sub-route; `/projects` prefix already lights it). `/stock-count`
  kept тАФ retired in U2.
- `nav-back-affordance.test.ts`: legacy `/store` moved to EXCLUDED (now a
  redirect). **Also swept in 4 pre-existing-unclassified spec-196 accounting
  routes** (ledger/payables/periods/purchases) that had left this anti-drift
  completeness test RED тАФ same test file, kept the suite green.

**DB:** mig 20260813000700 тАФ `record_stock_in` definer widened to admit
`site_admin` (was BACK_OFFICE tier only). `CREATE OR REPLACE`, **same signature**
(uuid,uuid,numeric,numeric,uuid,text) so grants + pgTAP positional pins hold;
body reconstructed verbatim from LIVE pg_proc, the only edited line is the role
gate `in (...)` set. pgTAP 181 +1 (plan 24тЖТ25): a site_admin member records a
р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ into their own project. No `db:types` (signature unchanged).

**Scope held:** placement + access-widening only; no new store capability. U2
(unify р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ, retire `/stock-count`) and U3 (empty-р╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З state) NOT started.

**Open / deferred:** the legacy `/store` `actions.ts` still `revalidatePath("/store")`
(harmless тАФ `router.refresh()` drives the per-project route UI; left untouched
per scope). Action gates beyond р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓/р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б (р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ widening to site_admin) land
naturally in U2 when the count surface unifies.

## Spec 195 follow-up тАФ dashboard store-material spend (2026-06-24)

Status: **DONE тАФ 2026-06-24** (no DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest 1575 green). Closes
the "Open follow-up" flagged in `docs/feature-specs/195-project-level-purchasing.md`:
the manager dashboard's materials-by-project showed direct WP-bound purchase spend
only, so a project that procures heavily **into the on-site store** read as
artificially low (the cost is real тАФ it sits in `wp_profit` + Store P&L, just not
on the dashboard). **Fix:** `materials` now adds the project's non-reversed
`stock_issues` (р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б) at **cost** (`total_cost`). Disjoint sources тАФ store-bound
material comes from WP-less PRs, which `sumMaterials` excludes (ADR 0063) тАФ so
additive with no double-count (mirrors `wp_profit`'s two-term materials, but at COST
not the sell layer: the dashboard is budget-vs-**money-out**, like labor-at-cost and
purchases-at-supplier-amount; the store's internal transfer margin is not external
spend). New pure helper `sumStoreIssues` (`src/lib/dashboard/spend.ts`, tested) +
two admin reads (`stock_issues` by project_id, `stock_reversals` for the non-reversed
filter) in `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`. Test-first (dashboard-spend.test.ts).
**Open:** dashboard total ignores store stock procured-but-not-yet-р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б'd (inventory,
not yet WP-consumed) тАФ deliberate, consistent with the cost-at-usage model.

## Spec 194 тАФ super_admin override on an approved supply plan (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 58dc371; mig 20260813000100; pgTAP
209; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest 1567 ┬╖ db:test 159/0 green). Operator: a super_admin
should be able to revert the status / edit an approved (frozen) supply plan, with
the plan labeled "overridden by [name]" (chose **supply plans first** via
AskUserQuestion). The lifecycle is one-way past approval (PM submit тЖТ PD/super
approve тЖТ frozen; only rejected re-editable); this is the operator escape hatch.
**mig:** `supply_plans` += overridden_by / overridden_at; `reopen_supply_plan(plan)`
definer тАФ **super_admin only** тАФ reopens a submitted/approved plan to draft
(clearing the submit/approve stamps), recording overridden_by + overridden_at; the
marker PERSISTS through a later re-approval. **pgTAP 209** (super reopens, non-super
42501, draft can't reopen, execute lockdown). `reopenPlan` action + a "р╣Ар╕Ыр╕┤р╕Фр╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В
(р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Фр╕╣р╣Бр╕ер╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ъ)" button on a frozen plan (canOverride = super) + a "┬╖ р╕Ыр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Вр╕Фр╕в [name]"
marker (name resolved via admin client). The pattern (reopen RPC + overridden_by
stamp + label) is reusable for other approved entities. **PAIRED REQUEST #1 тАФ supply
plan тЖТ store redesign тАФ NOT built (design proposal presented, awaiting the
operator's direction):** the operator wants supply-plan items to procure into the
on-site STORE (project-level, no WP), then WPs р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б (withdraw) per-WP тАФ moving WP
attribution to withdrawal (the store already does the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б half, spec 177). Key
fork = how procurement lands in the store (light: plan тЖТ pre-filled stock-in; full:
project-level PRs тЖТ PO тЖТ receive-into-store, needs PR work_package_id nullable).

## Spec 193 тАФ in-app feedback (bug report / feature request) (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commit d7b7b0d; mig 20260813000000; pgTAP
208; lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest 1564 ┬╖ db:test 158/0 green; /feedback compiles +
gates unauth тЖТ /login, preview). Operator: add a bug-report / feature-request
channel in settings, **designed so CC has enough to fix or build without a
round-trip** (chose the guided single details field via AskUserQuestion). A
р╕Др╕зр╕▓р╕бр╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕вр╣Ар╕лр╕ер╕╖р╕н row in /settings тЖТ /feedback (settings sub-surface, getClaims so every
authenticated role can file): type toggle (р╣Бр╕Ир╣Йр╕Зр╕Ыр╕▒р╕Нр╕лр╕▓ / р╕Вр╕нр╕Яр╕╡р╣Ар╕Ир╕нр╕гр╣М) + title + ONE
details box whose placeholder swaps by type (bug: did тЖТ expected тЖТ actual; feature:
what + why) + optional "related screen". **The design point тАФ auto-attach the triage
context the user shouldn't type:** role_snapshot (most bugs are role/RLS-gated),
app_version (package.json, server-side), user_agent (mobile vs desktop), best-effort
page_path. **mig:** feedback table + feedback_type / feedback_status enums; writes
via submit_feedback definer (stamps submitted_by + role_snapshot); RLS = submitter
reads own, super_admin reads all (operator + CC's read role). **pgTAP 208** (submit,
role-stamp, RLS scoping, execute lockdown). Files: lib/feedback/validate.ts (pure),
app/feedback/{page,actions}.ts, components/features/feedback/feedback-form.tsx,
settings row. Guards: feature-components-structure (+feedback domain),
nav-back-affordance (+feedback STATIC_DETAIL). **CC reads submissions via
`pnpm exec supabase db query --linked` on the feedback table** (full per-row
context). **Deferred:** in-app super_admin review list ┬╖ screenshot attachment ┬╖
status-update RPC + a Telegram ping on new feedback.

## Spec 192 тАФ first-real-project readiness, U4 SA daily home (2026-06-24)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commit f7e927f; NO DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck
┬╖ vitest 1555 green; /sa compiles + the site_admin gate redirects unauth тЖТ /login,

(show_widget тЖТ AskUserQuestion: build it + make it the SA's landing). Revived `/sa` =

member projects, drops complete + pending_approval), each row 1-tap to its detail +
three action chips (р╕гр╕╣р╕Ыр╕Цр╣Ир╕▓р╕в / р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ / р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н) deep-linking the WP-detail tabs.
`lib/sa/my-work.ts` pure `buildMyWorkList` (join project name, sort project-then-WP).
WP-detail `hashTabMap` gained `wp-photos` / `wp-labor` (only `wp-requests` existed).
**Nav rework + 5 pin updates:** `roleHome(site_admin)` тЖТ `/sa`; `SA_TABS` prepend
р╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕лр╕ер╕▒р╕Б (Home icon) + drop р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б (four tabs); `SA_HUB_NAV` the same; pins
role-home, bottom-tab-bar (+ a /sa-lit test), hub-nav, nav-back-affordance
(NON_DETAIL + HUB_STRIP both + `sa`), and **handoff-poll-route** (the roleHome
consumer missed on the first pass тАФ grep ALL `roleHome("site_admin")` pins on a home
change). **U4b (deferred):** the standalone hero "р╕ер╕Зр╣Ар╕зр╕ер╕▓р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╕зр╕▒р╕Щр╕Щр╕╡р╣Й" + quick photo/PR
buttons need a global "pick a р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ" picker (v1 surfaces the actions per-WP instead).
**Spec 192 = U1 membership guard + U2 onboarding + U3 non-member explainer + U4 SA
home тАФ the first-real-project adoption arc, both cliffs addressed.**

## Spec 192 тАФ first-real-project readiness, U2+U3 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U2 + U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commits 93225df, 14b842e; NO DB;
lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ vitest 1549 green). Continuing the adoption arc after U1. **U2 тАФ
onboarding leads with the team:** the setup checklist listed "р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ" third with
no rationale, but team is the access prerequisite (a project is only visible to its
members) тАФ moved it FIRST + a one-line why ("р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕Бр╣Ир╕нр╕Щр╣Ар╕Ыр╣Зр╕Щр╕нр╕▒р╕Щр╕Фр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕гр╕Б р╣Ар╕Юр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╣Гр╕лр╣Йр╕Юр╕зр╕Бр╣Ар╕Вр╕▓
р╣Ар╕лр╣Зр╕Щр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╣Бр╕ер╕░р╣Ар╕гр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕Чр╕│р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╣Др╕Фр╣Й"); rows gained an optional `hint`. **U3 тАФ non-member
explainer, not a bare 404:** when the user session can't see a project, an
admin-client exists-check distinguishes RLS-hidden (not a member) from truly-gone тАФ
gone still 404s, hidden renders `NoAccessNotice` ("р╕Др╕╕р╕Ур╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕нр╕вр╕╣р╣Ир╣Гр╕Щр╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г
р╕Щр╕╡р╣Й тАФ р╕Хр╕┤р╕Фр╕Хр╣Ир╕нр╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╣Ар╕Юр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╕Вр╕нр╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕Чр╕╡р╕б") in the standard chrome with a back
link (super_admin / coordinator see-all, never reach it). Tests:
`onboarding-checklist.test.tsx` (+1), `no-access-notice.test.tsx`. **U4 тАФ site-admin
daily home: DESIGN APPROVED (mock-first, show_widget тЖТ AskUserQuestion: build it +
make it the SA's landing), NOT YET BUILT.** It's a central nav rework (roleHome +
SA_TABS + SA_HUB_NAV + 4 pinned nav tests) тЖТ its own focused unit; full plan in
`docs/feature-specs/192-first-project-readiness.md` ┬зU4.

## Spec 192 тАФ first-real-project readiness, U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 69d94b0, NO DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck
┬╖ vitest 1547 green). After dark mode the operator said "decide and proceed" тАФ I
pivoted from feature-breadth to **adoption** (the app is feature-complete but
operator-incomplete; ~0 real data in prod, so the machinery is hollow without a
first real project producing data). Two cliffs mapped from the live code; U1 fixes
the **silent membership dead-end**: project visibility is membership-gated
(`can_see_project` = a `project_members` row OR the project_lead, ADR 0056), and
`removeProjectMember` had **no guard** тАФ a PM could remove the last member (or
themselves) and orphan the project (visible only to super_admin), with no in-app
recovery for the locked-out person. **Fix (invariant: a project keeps тЙе1 member):**
`lib/projects/member-removal.ts` pure `evaluateMemberRemoval({totalMembers,
removingSelf})` тЖТ `{blocked (last), needsConfirm (self + others remain)}`;
`removeProjectMember` counts first and refuses the last removal (load-bearing Thai
error); `settings-form.tsx` (+`currentUserId` prop) disables the last member's тЬХ
with a hint, routes a self-removal through the themed `ConfirmDialog`
("тАжр╕Др╕╕р╕Ур╕Ир╕░р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╣Ар╕лр╣Зр╕Щр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╕нр╕╡р╕БтАж"), keeps other-removal one-click, marks the current
user "(р╕Др╕╕р╕У)". **NO migration** тАФ an action-level UX-footgun guard at the right
altitude (member ops are direct table writes under RLS, not RPCs; projects are
never hard-deleted, so no DELETE-cascade concern a DB trigger would hit). Tests:
`member-removal.test.ts` + 3 `settings-form.test.tsx` cases. **U2+ (next):**
onboarding leads with "add your team" (+ the visibility why); a non-member 404 тЖТ
"ask a PM to add you" explainer (admin exists-check); a **site-admin daily-loop
home** (log labor/photos/PR in one tap) тАФ net-new surface, wants a mock-first pass.

## Spec 190 тАФ dark mode (opt-in night theme), U1 (2026-06-24)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24** (commit 40358c6, NO DB; lint ┬╖ typecheck
┬╖ vitest 1528 green; verified light+dark via the SSR cookie path + preview
screenshots). Operator asked "how hard is dark mode in settings?" тЖТ I assessed it
against the actual token system and recommended **default light + opt-in toggle**
(operator confirmed). Cheap because the design system was built for re-theming:
100% semantic tokens (enforced by `design-doctrine.test.ts`), OKLCH colors (dark =
invert the L channel, hue preserved), and `@custom-variant dark` already declared
(globals.css even comments "a future night-shift palette overrides :root"). So the
lift is a `.dark` palette + toggle plumbing тАФ **components are untouched.**
**Default LIGHT is deliberate** (spec-20 sun-first: dark is _worse_ in direct sun =
the field photo-capture flow; dark serves indoor/PM/back-office/portal/night). **U1:**
`lib/ui/theme.ts` (tri-state light/dark/system in a year `theme` cookie; pure
`resolveTheme`/`parseThemeSetting`, default light); no-flash (`layout.tsx` async,
reads the cookie server-side тЖТ `dark` class + `color-scheme` on `<html>` pre-paint,
`ThemeScript` resolves `system` before paint, `suppressHydrationWarning`);
`globals.css` `.dark {}` overriding every `--color-*` + the shadcn primitives (OKLCH
dark, WCAG floors held, amber fill keeps near-black ink, `*-soft` grounds тЖТ low-L
tints); `ThemeToggle` on `/settings` (`р╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╣Бр╕кр╕Фр╕Зр╕Ьр╕е`, every role; р╕кр╕зр╣Ир╕▓р╕З/р╕бр╕╖р╕Ф/р╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ъ, 44px,
tracks OS live on р╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ъ). Tests: `theme.test.ts`, `theme-toggle.test.tsx`. **TRAP:
the husky Tailwind class-sorter (`prettier-plugin-tailwindcss`) mangled the
whitespace around a `${ternary}` inside the `className` template literal тАФ
`antialiased${c?" dark":""}` became `antialiaseddark` (junk class; dark only
survived via the JS script, not SSR). Fix: keep the separator space in the STATIC
part of the literal (`antialiased ${c?"dark":""}`); re-read className literals after
the commit hook.** No new route; new components in the existing `features/chrome`
domain (no spec-122 change). **U2 (next, optional polish):** screen-by-screen audit
on authenticated surfaces (cards, `*-soft` status grounds, brand band), shadow/
elevation tuning for dark, PWA status-bar `themeColor` per theme.

## Spec 183 тАФ approvals are awareness, not a tab (PM) (2026-06-23)

Operator: "р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И menu should not be the main menu, but rather notification of
how many Approvals are pending." Design challenge ("don't agree blindly"). Verdict:
operator's instinct ~70% right тАФ a bottom tab is a _place_, the review queue is a
_transient, often-empty worklist_; the count is the actionable signal. But the
proposal tangles two jobs: **awareness** (count тЖТ badge/card) and **doing the work**
(the queue needs a real home). Since approving IS the PM's primary job, we demote
the _tab-as-urgency-signal_, not the _queue-as-a-place_: relocate it onto the
dashboard (the new PM home) + count badge on the р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б nav. Operator delegated
placement ("design with ux in mind") and said other approval types get awareness
in later units. Mocked the before/after with show_widget before building.

3-unit arc: U1 count + dashboard hero card ┬╖ U2 drop the tab + reroute home + badge
pins ┬╖ U3 the nav count badge (self-fetching). U4+ = other approval types (PR,
bank/consent) тАФ later.

**U1 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** `src/lib/approvals/pending-summary.ts`: pure
`summarizePendingApprovals(rows, projectsById)` тЖТ `{count, oldest}` (oldest = min
updated_at, code tiebreak тАФ mirrors /review ordering) + async
`getPendingApprovalsSummary` (RLS-scoped, mirrors the /review queue query so count
== list). `features/dashboard/pending-approvals-card.tsx`: presentational, attention
(amber) palette when pending / calm muted when empty, links тЖТ /review. Wired into
/dashboard for the PM tier only (site_admin sees the dashboard, not the card).
Tests: pending-approvals-summary (pure, 5) + pending-approvals-card (render, 3).
LESSON: a new `features/<domain>/` folder must be added to the
`feature-components-structure.test.ts` ALLOWED_DOMAINS allowlist (spec 122 guard) тАФ
caught by the full suite, not the targeted run. vitest 1489/0.

**U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** The nav flip. Dropped `р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И` from `PM_TABS`
(bottom-tab-bar) + `р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И` from `PM_HUB_NAV` (hub-nav). Rerouted `roleHome`
PM tier (isManagerRole) тЖТ `/dashboard` (was `/review`). Gave `DASHBOARD_TAB`
`match: ["/review"]` so the queue lights р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б as its sub-surface (bottom bar);
`/review` page passes HubNav `currentHref="/dashboard"` for the same effect on
desktop. `/review` stays a live route reached from the U1 card. Removed the unused
`ClipboardCheck` import. Pin churn (all 5 located up-front): role-home, role-sets,
require-role (redirect target), hub-nav (PM_ITEMS + assertion), bottom-tab-bar
(PM_TABS pin + two р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И-lighting cases rewritten to р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б). The `match` choice
minimized churn AND kept the sun-mode test green (it asserts an active tab exists on
/review тАФ р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б now provides it). vitest 1489/0; lint┬╖tc green.

**U3 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** The count badge on the р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б bottom tab (PM
tier) тАФ the literal "number on the main menu" the operator asked for.
`features/dashboard/pending-approvals-badge.tsx` ('use client'): pure
`formatBadgeCount` (null at 0, cap 99+) + presentational `ApprovalsBadge({count})`

- self-fetching `PendingApprovalsBadge` (browser client, RLS-scoped `work_packages`
  status=pending_approval head-count тАФ same visibility as /review; best-effort,
  errors leave it hidden). Wired into bottom-tab-bar over the р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б icon, gated
  `tab.href==="/dashboard" && isManagerRole(role)` (site_admin shares the tab, no
  badge тАФ doesn't approve). Tests: formatBadgeCount (3) + ApprovalsBadge render (3).
  The self-fetch is inert in jsdom (network fails тЖТ count 0 тЖТ renders nothing), so the
  18 existing tab-bar tests stayed green untouched. amber attn pill (bg-attn/on-attn).
  **Desktop hub-strip badge DEFERRED** (HubNav is a server component with no role prop
  тАФ threading it to every call site is its own change; the phone bottom bar IS the
  "main menu" the operator named, so this is the core win). vitest +6.

**U4 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** Desktop hub-strip badge тАФ operator "both, one at
a time" (this first). `ApprovalsBadge`/`PendingApprovalsBadge` gained a
`position: "overlay" | "inline"` prop (overlay = the bottom-tab icon overlay,
default, unchanged; inline = `relative ml-1` pill after a text label). `HubNav`
gained an optional `role?: string`; when `isManagerRole(role)` it renders
`<PendingApprovalsBadge position="inline" />` on the `/dashboard` item. Passed
`role` at all 5 HubNav call sites (settings/review/requests/projects/dashboard тАФ all
already had ctx.role/role). TRAP: `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` rejects forwarding
`position={undefined}` to an optional prop тЖТ default it in the wrapper
(`position = "overlay"`). Optional role = call sites that omit it render no badge
(hub-nav component tests pass no role тЖТ badge inert, stayed green). Test +1 (inline
variant asserts no `absolute`, has `ml-1`).

**SPEC 183 ARC U1тАУU4 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (one session, NO DB):** count helper +
dashboard hero card тЖТ drop the р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И tab + reroute PM home to р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б тЖТ count badge
on the home tab (phone) тЖТ same badge on the desktop hub strip. р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И is awareness
(card + badge on both nav surfaces), not a main-menu tab; the queue lives under
р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б (/review one tap from the card). DEFERRED: other approval types (PR,
bank/consent тАФ NEXT, operator's second "both"); header bell for a unified inbox.

## Spec 184 тАФ approval-type awareness (PR + bank changes) (2026-06-23)

Operator's second "both": extend spec-183 awareness to the other PM-tier approval
flows. Explore mapped them: PR = `purchase_requests.status='requested'`, lives on

'pending'`, NO nav surface (only on a contractor's detail page = blind spot);
consent = no approval queue (recorded, not approved тЖТ out of scope). `project_director`
is on all three policies (mig 20260752), so all gate to `isManagerRole`. **Design
rule: a tabbed flow gets a tab badge; a tabless flow gets a dashboard card.** So WP
(183) = badge+card, PR = р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н tab badge, bank-change = dashboard card (U2).

(WP) kept as a thin wrapper (р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б wiring unchanged) + new
`PendingPurchaseDecisionsBadge` (label "р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕гр╕нр╕Юр╕┤р╕Ир╕▓р╕гр╕Ур╕▓"). `ApprovalsBadge` gained an
optional `label` (aria noun, default "р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И"; local `label`тЖТ`text` to avoid the
collision). Wired onto the р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н tab (bottom-tab over the icon) + /requests hub item
(inline), gated `href==="/requests" && isManagerRole(role)` тАФ SA/procurement share the
tab but don't decide тЖТ no badge. Module-level loaders = stable refs, so the `[load]`
effect runs once. Test +1 (custom label aria). vitest 1497/0; lint┬╖tc green.

**U2 SHIPPED 2026-06-23 (NO DB).** Bank-change dashboard card тАФ the blind-spot flow
(contractor bank changes had NO nav surface, only a contractor's detail page).
`src/lib/approvals/pending-bank-changes.ts`: `getPendingBankChangeCount` (RLS-scoped
head-count of `contractor_bank_change_requests` status='pending'; errorтЖТ0).
`features/dashboard/bank-change-awareness-card.tsx`: presentational, renders ONLY
when count>0 (exception-driven тАФ unlike the always-on р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И card, bank changes are
occasional, so no zero-state clutter), amber attn, links тЖТ /contacts/subcontractors
to drill in and decide. Wired into /dashboard under the р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И card, PM tier only.
Tests: card render (nothing at 0; count+link at >0). Typecheck confirmed the table +
'pending' status in the generated types. vitest +2.

**SPEC 184 ARC COMPLETE U1тАУU2 2026-06-23 (NO DB):** PR awaiting-decision badge on the
р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н tab + bank-change awareness card on the dashboard. With spec 183, the PM now
sees all three PM-tier approval flows without hunting (WP card+badge, PR tab badge,

render their own/none), so a bell has no consistent home. Instead fold the total into
the existing idiom: р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б badge = total, dashboard = complete inbox.

card (тЖТ/contacts/subcontractors, Landmark), via the generic card. Test: AwarenessCard
(nothing at 0; count+label+link at >0). Net vitest 1499 (тИТ2 bank test, +2 awareness).

`sumApprovalCounts(values)` (nullтЖТ0) + a `loadPendingBankChanges` client loader +

now loads the total + label "р╕гр╕нр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤" (was WP-only "р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И"); `PendingPurchaseDecisionsBadge`

AWARENESS ARC (183+184+185) COMPLETE:** р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И went from a main-menu tab тЖТ a total count
