Status: COMPLETE (pending full-suite green + commit). ADR 0059 ┬з2. `name`/`code` were create-only; this makes **name** editable (code stays immutable тАФ cross-surface business key, deferred). Added `set_work_package_name(p_work_package_id, p_name)` SECURITY DEFINER RPC: gate pm/super/**project_director** + `can_see_wp()` membership; name trimmed, non-empty, `<= 200` chars (the exact create_work_package bound) тЖТ else 22023; no audit. Server action `name-actions.ts` + inline `WpNameControl` (single-line field + Save, toasted) in the manager-only management block beside priority/deliverable/schedule. **TDD:** pgTAP `93` (11 asserts: catalog, pm-member rename+trim, blank/over-long 22023, super+director see-all, sa-member+visitor role-deny 42501, non-member pm membership-deny 42501) + vitest `wp-name-control` (renders, Save gated on trimmed change, calls action with trimmed value, blank disables Save). **Deviations from spec doc (deliberate):** (1) **inline editor in the management block, NOT a header sheet** тАФ consistent with the sibling controls + lower-risk; header keeps the read-only nameplate. (2) unknown WP тЖТ 42501 (membership gate first), not false. No default-param issue this time (both args always non-null). **Verify:** db:push (prod) + db:test (file 93) + db:types + lint + typecheck + full test тАФ green (see below).

**Open questions (OUT):** edit `code` (uniqueness re-validation 23505 + cross-surface audit; pending operator sign-off, ADR 0059 ┬з2); unified multi-field WP-settings page (not needed тАФ per-field controls suffice).

## Spec 155 - bind a work package to a deliverable (2026-06-20)

Status: COMPLETE (pending full-suite green + commit). ADR 0059 ┬з1. Closes the gap: `work_packages.deliverable_id` was settable ONLY by the manual seed script тАФ no post-create write path, so in-app WPs were permanently ungrouped. Added `set_work_package_deliverable(p_work_package_id, p_deliverable_id)` SECURITY DEFINER RPC: gate pm/super/**project_director** + `can_see_wp()` membership (ADR 0056/0058, the reopen precedent); NULL = ungroup; a non-null deliverable must share the WP's project (cross-project/unknown тЖТ 22023); no audit (benign metadata). Server action `deliverable-actions.ts` + a manager-only `WpDeliverableControl` native-select on the WP-detail page (р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Бр╕ер╕╕р╣Ир╕б + each р╕Зр╕зр╕Фр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ); loader gained `deliverable_id`; the project's deliverables ride alongside the loader (planner-gated, no waterfall). **TDD:** pgTAP `92` (13 asserts: catalog, pm-member bind/clear, super + director see-all, cross-project/unknown 22023, sa-member + visitor role-deny 42501, non-member pm membership-deny 42501) + vitest `wp-deliverable-control.test.tsx` (renders ungrouped+each, binds chosen id, clears to null). **Verify:** db:push (prod) + db:test **92 files / 1809 / 0** + db:types + lint + typecheck green.

**Two deviations from the spec doc (both deliberate):** (1) unknown WP тЖТ **42501** (membership gate runs first; can_see_wp is false for a missing WP тАФ we don't disclose existence to non-members), NOT the doc's "false". (2) Took **two migrations** тАФ `20260753000000` (RPC) then `20260753000100` (CREATE OR REPLACE adding `p_deliverable_id uuid default null`) тАФ because supabase typegen marks a no-default arg as required non-null `string`, so the server action couldn't pass null; the default makes it optional тЖТ the house omit-to-clear idiom (set_work_package_schedule). **Lesson: a nullable RPC arg the app must pass NULL/omit needs `default null` so typegen marks it optional тАФ author it in the first migration.** Transient `cli_login_postgres` SASL circuit-breaker hit when db:push ran concurrent with db:test тАФ retry alone clears it; don't run two supabase CLI ops at once.

**Open questions (OUT):** `create_deliverable` (in-app р╕Зр╕зр╕Фр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ creation тАФ until it ships, binding is inert on in-app-created projects); deliverable at CREATE time (extend create_work_package + add-WP-sheet picker); bulk re-bind/drag UI.

## Spec 154 - coordinator read-only project view (2026-06-20)

Status: COMPLETE тАФ shipped + pushed to prod (commit 609a0ab, origin/main 2026-06-19/20). Origin spec 143 / ADR 0056. `project_coordinator` is in PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES (reads /projects + /projects/[id]) but NOT SITE_STAFF_ROLES, so on /projects/[id] it falls through to the SA/PM main branch which links every WP row to the WP detail + renders a calendar chip тАФ both gate `requireRole(SITE_STAFF_ROLES)`, deny coordinator тЖТ redirect тЖТ /projects (dead links / bounce). Fix = stop rendering links it can't follow, NOT widen any gate (ADR 0056 keeps WP detail + schedule SITE_STAFF-only). One predicate `canOpenWp = SITE_STAFF_ROLES.includes(ctx.role)`; WorklistRow + WorkPackageList gain optional `canOpen` (default true тЖТ existing call sites unchanged); when false the row is a non-interactive container (no Link/href/hover/focus/chevron, list-enter animation kept). Calendar chip gated on canOpenWp. Coordinator keeps the manager-grade lens list, just non-clickable; NOT routed into the procurement branch. TDD: worklist-row.test.tsx (canOpen false тЖТ no link, name/status still render; true/omitted тЖТ one WP-detail link) + work-package-list.test.tsx (canOpen false тЖТ zero row links; default тЖТ links).

**Open questions (OUT of scope, not built):** (1) Fix B = coordinator read-only WP DETAIL + schedule тАФ contradicts ADR 0056, needs an ADR amendment first. (2) WP-detail/schedule requireRole gates stay coordinator-excluded (correct). (3) Read-only row styling beyond removing tap affordance.

## Spec 153 - desktop hub-strip coverage (HubNav on /settings + /dashboard) (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE тАФ shipped + pushed to prod (commits fdc9855 fix + 1ea5a63 feat, on origin/main 2026-06-19). Gap: the desktop `HubNav` strip renders on only `/projects`, `/review`, `/requests`; `/settings` + `/dashboard` are primary-tab hubs with NO HubNav, and the bottom bar is `sm:hidden` тЖТ both are desktop dead-ends. Fix = render HubNav on the full hub set via a single role selector `hubNavForRole(role)` in hub-nav.tsx (mirrors `tabsForRole`), + new `ACCOUNTING_HUB_NAV` (mirrors `ACCOUNTING_TABS`: р╕Ър╕▒р╕Нр╕Кр╕╡ /accounting ┬╖ р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ /settings). `/portal` stays the documented exception (own header + logout). TDD: `hubNavForRole` mapping in hub-nav.test.tsx (each served role тЖТ its set; accounting тЖТ ACCOUNTING_HUB_NAV; visitor тЖТ null) + a source guard in nav-back-affordance.test.ts (settings/dashboard/review/projects/requests page.tsx contain "HubNav"; portal does not).

**Open questions (OUT of scope, not built):** (1) `/accounting` dual-nature тАФ it is BOTH a primary tab (in ACCOUNTING_TABS / ACCOUNTING_HUB_NAV) AND a DetailHeader back-chip page (STATIC_DETAIL in nav-back-affordance, back тЖТ /settings). Contradiction left as-is. (2) Unify BottomTabBar + HubNav into one source; migrate the 3 existing inline HubNav role-selects (/projects, /review, /requests) to `hubNavForRole`. (3) Label drift phone-tab vs desktop-strip (р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И vs р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И).

## Spec 151 U1 - lazy client bundles: defer offline-queue runner (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U1), build-verified; **first-load delta NOT numerically verifiable in this env** (see caveat). Bundle investigation: total client JS ~542kb gz; the 125kb gz chunk = supabase-js (browser client) + zod. zod is imported ONLY by `env.ts`/`env.server.ts` (env validation at import); the browser client by 9 client components тАФ 8 route-scoped/tap-gated, but **`UploadQueueRunner` is mounted in the root `layout.tsx`**, so it drags that 125kb chunk onto EVERY page's first paint. Fix: `src/components/features/photos/upload-queue-runner-lazy.tsx` тАФ a `'use client'` wrapper that `next/dynamic`-imports the runner with `ssr:false`; layout renders the wrapper. Safe: the runner is a background drainer for LEFTOVER offline uploads (renders null unless queued; replay idempotent ADR 0039; in-page phase-uploader unaffected), so loading it a beat after hydration is harmless. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm build` all green (exit 0). **CAVEAT тАФ couldn't prove the win numerically:** Turbopack's prod build emits no per-route First Load JS table, and there's no runnable app here (no auth/prod URL), so the ~110kb first-paint reduction (124kb deferred тИТ ~14kb split overhead; total bundle ticked 542тЖТ556kb because the chunk still EXISTS, just lazy) rests on the `dynamic(ssr:false)` framework guarantee, not a measurement. **Confirm on laptop:** preview + Network tab (the supabase chunk should load AFTER first paint, not block it), or add `@next/bundle-analyzer`. **Next (later, all need a runnable app to verify):** dynamic-import the 8 tap-gated uploader/sheet components per-route; Tier-2 in-page Suspense; middleware getUser; infra.

## Spec 150 U1 - streaming: route-level loading coverage (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U1). Bigger-lever follow-up to 147/148 (measure-first concluded: DB 462тЖТ197ms + bundle 542kb gz / 169 baseline / 125 zod+supabase chunk already quantified; operator chose to skip prod-only TTFB measurement and proceed to fixes). `loading.tsx` is route-level streaming (React Suspense) тАФ instant skeleton on client nav while the server renders. 11 routes had one; **13 dynamic data-backed routes had none тЖТ blank-until-rendered on tap.** Added an identical one-line `loading.tsx` (re-exports the existing shared `PageSkeleton`, the exact idiom of the 11 existing files тАФ no new logic/component) to: dashboard, equipment, profile, settings, workers, contacts/{crews,customers,vendors}, projects/[projectId]/{schedule,settings}, requests/[requestId], requests/orders/[poId], requests/orders/[poId]/deliveries/[deliveryId]. Skipped static/public/redirect routes. **No new test** тАФ presentational re-export of the already-shipped (untested-by-repo-precedent) `PageSkeleton`; the skeleton is the reused unit. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm build` (exit 0, all loading.tsx compiled; Turbopack doesn't list them in the route table тАФ expected). Researched Next 16 streaming docs first (CLAUDE.md rule) тАФ loading.tsx behavior confirmed. **Spec number:** streaming is 150 (149 taken by the concurrent accounting-GL spec). **Next (later units):** Tier 2 = in-page `<Suspense>` on hero pages (WP/project detail) keeping real chrome + streaming only the body via the 147 loaders; then lazy client bundles (`next/dynamic` the 125kb zod+supabase form chunk). OUT: middleware getUser, infra.

## Spec 148 - data-fetch parallelization round 2 (ranks 5-8) (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U1-U4). Same waterfall fix as spec 147, on the four lower-traffic detail pages. All four = extracted server-only loader (root тЖТ `Promise.all` fan тЖТ dependent tail) + RED-first concurrency test (in-flight-counter stub). Behavior-preserving; same queries/columns/results.

- **U1 PO detail** (`requests/orders/[poId]`) тЖТ `src/lib/purchasing/load-po-detail.ts` (`loadPurchaseOrderDetail`). Fan: po тИе members тИе deliveries; tail: wp-by-id тИе per-line amounts (both need members). Amounts stay admin-client + back-office-only (spec 106), moved into the loader. Test `load-po-detail.test.ts` (3; admin client mocked, concurrency тЙе3).
- **U2 delivery detail** (`requests/orders/[poId]/deliveries/[deliveryId]`) тЖТ `src/lib/purchasing/load-delivery-detail.ts` (`loadDeliveryDetail`). Full fan of 5 (po тИе delivery тИе members тИе deliveryRows тИе proofRows, all param-keyed) тЖТ proof signed-URL tail; р╕Зр╕зр╕Ф view + proof grouping computed in the loader. Test (2; concurrency тЙе5).
- **U3 schedule** (`projects/[projectId]/schedule`) тЖТ `src/lib/projects/load-schedule.ts` (`loadProjectSchedule`). Fan: project тИе work_packages тИе deliverables (projectId-keyed) тЖТ deps + critical-path tail. Test (2; concurrency тЙе3).
- **U4 projects hub** (`projects`) тЖТ `src/lib/projects/load-hub.ts` (`loadProjectsHub`). projects тЖТ fan [row client names тИе PM-only suggested-code rpc тИе clients]. Smallest payoff. Test (3; concurrency тЙе3 for PM). Removed the duplicate PM-block from the page.

Each page drops its now-unused fetch imports + destructures the loader bundle; pure derivations stay. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (174 files / 1158 tests) all green. **Sweep 147+148 = all 8 ranked detail-page waterfalls fixed.** Remaining levers are larger/structural тАФ NOT data-fetch waterfalls: `<Suspense>` streaming, middleware `getUser` per-nav, client bundle/hydration, infra (Supabase Pro / cold-start). See the bigger-lever plan (next).

## Spec 147 U4 - DC-portal data-fetch parallelization (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. **Final unit of the waterfall-fix sweep (rank 4).** The DC self-service portal (`portal`) ran 5 fully-serial reads then own-docs + bank-present (profile -> consents -> crew -> payments-rpc -> pending-bank-change -> own-docs -> bank-present-rpc), all RLS-self-scoped. Collapsed to one Promise.all fan (the 6 independent reads) -> dependent tail (own-docs read only when a profile row exists). No root entity to fetch first; the portal renders empties, so no notFound. **TDD:** `tests/unit/load-portal-data.test.ts` (RED first тАФ module-missing) -> 3 cases: concurrency (max in-flight >=6; serial peaks at 1; stub supports `supabase.rpc`), assembled shape, own-docs skipped when profile is null (asserted via a `vi.hoisted` mock not-called). **Impl:** `src/lib/portal/load-portal-data.ts` (`loadPortalData(supabase)`, inferred return, mirrors U1-U3). **Behavior-preserving:** same queries/columns/results; all packet/consent/payment derivations stay in the page as pure logic. Page drops the `getOwnContractorDocuments` import (now in the loader) + adds `loadPortalData`. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (170 files / 1148 tests) all green.

**Sweep summary (spec 147 ranks 1-4 DONE):** four detail pages converted from serial-await waterfalls to root -> Promise.all fan -> dependent tail, each via an extracted server-only loader with a RED-first concurrency test (in-flight-counter stub; passes only when the fan overlaps). Measured (U1, prod/Singapore/warm): 462ms -> 197ms, 57%. Pattern + idiom now established (`load-detail` / `load-request-detail` / `load-portal-data`). **Follow-up (NOT this spec):** ranks 5-8 (orders/[poId], deliveries/[deliveryId], schedule, projects hub) = same fix, smaller payoff тАФ new spec when wanted. Separate larger levers untouched: `<Suspense>` streaming (perceived latency), middleware `getUser` per nav, client bundle/hydration (81 client comps), infra (Supabase Pro / cold-start).

## Spec 147 U3 - request-detail data-fetch parallelization (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. Third unit of the waterfall-fix sweep (rank 3, worst ratio тАФ ~8 fully-serial hops). The request-detail page (`requests/[requestId]`) ran request -> wp -> requester name -> attachments -> signed URLs -> poRow -> po-docs -> signed URLs -> suppliers, all in series. Collapsed to root (page fetches request, keeps isValidUuid + notFound) -> one Promise.all fan (wp, display name, request attachments, poRow, po source-docs, suppliers) -> dependent tail Promise.all (the two signed-URL mints need their attachment rows). **TDD:** `tests/unit/load-request-detail.test.ts` (RED first тАФ module-missing) -> 5 cases: concurrency (max in-flight >=5; serial peaks at 1), assembled shape, requester-name fallback (name -> email -> em-dash), suppliers gated to back-office+approved, poRow=null + no po-docs when the request has no PO. **Impl:** `src/lib/purchasing/load-request-detail.ts` (`loadRequestDetail(supabase, request, { isBackOffice })`, mirrors U1/U2). Return type inferred (not an explicit interface) to sidestep the `*_attachments_current` view-row typing. **Behavior-preserving:** same queries/columns/results; attachment splits (confirmations/invoice/reference x image/pdf/link) stay in the page as pure filters. Page drops 5 now-unused imports (SupplierOption type, mintSignedUrlsForAttachments, mintSignedUrls, PO_ATTACHMENTS_BUCKET, fetchDisplayNames); isBackOffice moved above the loader call. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (169 files / 1145 tests) all green. **Next:** U4 = DC portal (`portal`, 5 fully-serial reads, RLS-scoped to self тАФ profile/consents/crew/payments-rpc/pendingChange independent + own-docs/bank-present tail). Last unit of the sweep; ranks 5-8 (orders/deliveries/schedule/projects-hub) = follow-up spec; `<Suspense>` streaming separate.

## Spec 147 U2 - project-detail data-fetch parallelization (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. Second unit of the waterfall-fix sweep (rank 2). The project-detail page (`projects/[projectId]`) ran ~6-7 serial levels (project -> client+members -> names -> work_packages -> deliverables -> deps -> onboarding+sources -> templates). Collapsed to root (page fetches project, keeps the procurement early-return + notFound) -> one Promise.all fan (clients, project_members, work_packages, deliverables, + PM-only onboarding rpc / copy-from sources / wp_templates count) -> dependent tail Promise.all (display names need the lead+member ids; critical-path dependency rows need the wp ids). **TDD:** `tests/unit/load-project-detail.test.ts` (RED first тАФ module-missing) -> 3 cases: concurrency (max in-flight >=6; serial peaks at 1; stub extended for `supabase.rpc` + head/count selects), assembled shape (PM), PM-only reads skipped for non-PM. **Impl:** `src/lib/projects/load-detail.ts` (`loadProjectDetail(supabase, project, isPmRole)`, mirrors U1). onboarding typed via `Database["public"]["Functions"]["project_onboarding_status"]["Returns"][number]` (avoids a lib->app import; structurally == the page's OnboardingStatus, so the page assignment stays cast-free). **Behavior-preserving:** same queries/columns/results, procurement branch untouched. Page drops 3 now-unused imports (fetchDisplayNames, criticalWorkPackageIds, the OnboardingStatus type) and destructures the loader bundle; presentational derivations (typeLabel, WP/deliverable mapping) stay. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (168 files / 1140 tests) all green. **Next:** U3 = request detail (`requests/[requestId]`, ~8 serial hops, worst ratio тАФ root request then wp/names/attachments/poRow/poDocs/suppliers all independent + signed-URL tails). OUT: U4 portal, ranks 5-8 follow-up; `<Suspense>` streaming separate.

## Spec 152 U3 - project_director role: table write RLS (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U3) тАФ **FEATURE COMPLETE**. Final unit: adds `project_director` to every RLS policy whose role list literally names `project_manager`. **Why it matters:** some core PM actions are direct-table writes gated by RLS, NOT RPCs тАФ most importantly **approving a work package** (an INSERT into `approvals`), so without U3 a director could not approve. Also covers deliverables/reports/work*packages/photo_logs/photo_markups/purchase_requests writes, project_members/work_package_members manage, and the master-table READS (clients/contractors/suppliers/service_providers/equipment\*/workers) that list PM directly. **Method: reconstructed the 48 policies from the LIVE catalog (`pg_policies`), appended `'project_director'::user_role` to each role `ARRAY[...]` (Postgres reverse-compiles `in()` тЖТ `= ANY(ARRAY[])`, and has no CREATE OR REPLACE POLICY, so DROP+CREATE).** Migration `20260752000000_project_director_write_rls.sql` тАФ **48 policies / 58 role lists** widened (UPDATE policies carry PM in both USING + WITH CHECK). **NOT touched:** project-scoped SELECTs (gate on `can_see*\*`тЖТ see-all for director since U1, never name PM literally); every super_admin-alone operator policy (no PM literal тЖТ no match). **Test (REDтЖТGREEN):** pgTAP`91`тАФ completeness catalog (per-field: no policy names PM without director; 48 before тЖТ 0 after), behavioural lives_ok (director inserts an approval + updates a work_package directly on an UNINVOLVED WP тАФ see-all + role), negative control (visitor still denied тЖТ 42501). No TS change. db:push applied to prod; db:test 91 files / 0 fail. **project_director is now a complete see-all project_manager: sees everything, every RPC action, every direct-table write.** Built in isolated worktree off`main`@#77.

## Spec 152 U2 - project_director role: RPC action gates (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U2). Adds `project_director` to every SECURITY DEFINER RPC whose `current_user_role()` gate already admits `project_manager` тАФ so a director performs every PM action (create project/WP, record purchase, post journal, retention, WHT, equipment, contractor, etc.) across all projects. **Method: sourced the LIVE definitions via `pg_get_functiondef` (the DB is authoritative тАФ no hand-copying 47+ bodies), appended `'project_director'` to each role list with a regex transform, emitted one migration `20260751000000_project_director_rpc_gates.sql` of CREATE OR REPLACE.** **55 functions / 55 gates** (investigator estimated 47; the live filter found 55 тАФ more complete). Shape breakdown: 32├Ч `not in ('project_manager','super_admin')`, 9├Ч +site*admin, 6├Ч/3├Ч +procurement, 2├Ч +accounting (gl_trial_balance/gl_reconciliation), 3├Ч `in (...)` allow-forms (record/revoke_contractor_consent, add_contact_document). **Deliberately untouched:** `can_see_project` (its membership branch lists PM but director passes via the see-all branch, U1); `set_accounting_period_status`'s SECONDARY super-only sub-gate (`not v_is_super` for reopening a closed period тАФ a director still cannot reopen closed periods); the GL posters/plumbing (`post*\*\_to_gl`, `drain_gl_posting`, `resolve_posting_period`) which are service-role/de-gated; every `= 'super_admin'`-alone operator gate. **Test (REDтЖТGREEN):** pgTAP `90-project-director-rpc-gates.test.sql`тАФ (1) completeness catalog assertion: ZERO PM-gated RPCs lack project_director (was 55 before push тЖТ RED confirmed; 0 after тЖТ GREEN); (2-4) behavioural lives_ok: director may create_project / create_work_package / set_work_package_notes (covers the 2-role, see-all+WP, and 3-role-with-site_admin shapes); (5) negative control: a visitor is still denied (gate didn't fall open). **No TS change** (RPC gates are server-side; U1 did the page gates). db:push applied to prod; db:test 90 files / 1792 asserts / 0 fail. Built in isolated worktree off`main`@#76 (concurrent 147-151 session still in main tree). **Next:** U3 = table write RLS policies (direct `.insert/.update` paths; most writes already go through these RPCs so U3 is the completeness tail). **Director is now FUNCTIONAL as a see-all PM for every RPC-backed action.**

## Spec 152 U1 - project_director role: identity + visibility + nav (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (U1). New role "similar to super_admin" (operator request). ADR 0058: scope = **executive-director tier** = `project_director` behaves as `project_manager` everywhere, EXCEPT visibility is see-all (like super/coordinator) instead of membership-scoped; NOT granted operator-only surfaces (user/role mgmt, OperatorHub, notification internals). No role-group SQL helper exists, so the build = add the enum value + add `project_director` next to every `project_manager` gate. **U1 shipped:** enum migration `20260750000000` (own migration, ALTER TYPE ADD VALUE) + `can_see_project` see-all branch `20260750000100` (create-or-replace; can_see_wp/can_see_photo_log inherit by delegation); `USER_ROLE_LABEL.project_director = "Project Director"` (operator declined a Thai name тАФ i18n-labels test exempts this one label); `roleHome`тЖТ/review; PM_TABS; all PM-tier TS arrays (PM_ROLES, SITE_STAFF_ROLES, BACK_OFFICE_ROLES├Ч2, PURCHASING_ROLES, EQUIPMENT_MOVE_ROLES, PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES, ACCOUNTING_ROLES, BACKOFFICE_BACKDATE_ROLES) + page allowlists/manager checks across 10 page files. **Tests:** pgTAP `89-project-director-role.test.sql` (director sees an uninvolved project + WP + photo_log; uninvolved PM sees nothing тАФ proves see-all differentiator) + vitest role-home/role-sets/i18n-labels updated. db:push applied to prod DB (enum additive, zero live users have the role); db:test 89 green (suite 89 files / 1787 asserts / 0 fail); lint+typecheck+test green. **Built in an isolated worktree** off clean HEAD тАФ a concurrent session's uncommitted specs 147/148/150/151 had rewritten 4 of the detail pages I gate, so this branch re-applies only the role edits to clean bases (no cross-contamination). **Next:** U2 = RPC action gates (add project_director to every SECURITY DEFINER RPC `current_user_role() in (тАж)` allowlist containing project_manager тАФ until then a director sees PM write buttons but the RPC raises 42501; no live user yet). U3 = table write RLS policies. **Open:** role-group helper (`PM_ROLES.includes`) consolidation deferred (drift surface flagged); director excluded from PM notification recipients (ADR 0058 ┬з3) тАФ revisit if operator wants it.

## Spec 147 U1 - WP-detail data-fetch parallelization (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. First unit of the waterfall-fix sweep (ranks 1-4). The WP-detail page (`projects/[projectId]/work-packages/[workPackageId]`) ran ~10 Supabase reads in a serial waterfall; the child reads depend only on the work package, not each other. **Measured on prod** (free tier, Singapore region, app co-located with DB): warm hop ~55-65ms; the chain ran **462ms serial -> 197ms parallel** (Promise.all the independent fan), 57% / ~264ms saved тАФ real page worse (+ signed-URL Storage + labor zone + RLS eval). My first "~100-200ms/hop" guess was refuted; warm hops are cheaper, but the parallel win (~halves DB time) is real and bigger in absolute terms on the full page. **TDD:** `tests/unit/load-work-package-detail.test.ts` (RED first тАФ module-missing) -> 4 cases: concurrency (in-flight-counter stub; max >=5, a serial waterfall peaks at 1), assembled shape, wp=null on project mismatch, planner-gated reads. **Impl:** extracted `src/lib/work-packages/load-detail.ts` (`loadWorkPackageDetail`, mirrors `fetchLaborZoneData` spec 46) тАФ root wp fetch -> one Promise.all fan (contractors, approvals, requests, planner-pair, labor, photos, defect) -> dependent tail Promise.all (displayNames needs approvals+requests; signedUrls needs photos). **Behavior-preserving:** same queries/columns/results, only scheduling changes. Page calls the loader + keeps its presentational derivations; dropped 4 now-unused imports. Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (167 files / 1137 tests) all green. A throwaway timing harness (`scripts/measure-wp-hops.ts`, service-role via authed CLI) confirmed the delta, then deleted. **Next:** U2 = project detail (`projects/[projectId]`), same pattern (~9 serial hops). OUT: U3 request detail, U4 portal, ranks 5-8 (orders/deliveries/schedule/projects-hub) = follow-up; `<Suspense>` streaming + middleware getUser + client bundle/hydration + infra (Pro/cold-start) all separate, untouched.

## Spec 146 U2 - equipment project allocations (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. ADR 0055 decisions 4/8. Second P2 unit; data layer, no UI, money domain. Commits where a rented set's monthly cost lands: a rental batch attached to a PROJECT for a period. **Model resolved:** allocation = the MONEY commitment (batch тЖТ project, admin-only); physical itemтЖТproject custody stays on `equipment_movements` (field-visible, spec 141 U3). Under Case A (independent per-item daily charge-out, not a pass-through of the monthly cost) the allocation needs NO per-item membership/quantity тАФ whole-batch-to-project; batch-item composition is not modeled + not needed (recorded seam). **TDD:** `tests/unit/allocation.test.ts` (8 cases, RED first) тЖТ `validateAllocation` (period order, ISO strings, no Date parse; date logic mirrors validate-rental-batch, kept separate per scope тАФ shared iso-date helper = recorded seam). **Migrations (3, additive):** `20260737000000` audit-action `equipment_allocation_create` (own migration); `20260737000100` `equipment_project_allocations` (batch_id/project_id FKs, period, CHECK ends_onтЙеstarts_on, zero-grant money table, no-delete, project+batch indexes); `20260737000200` `create_equipment_project_allocation(batch,project,starts,ends?,note?)тЖТuuid` SECURITY DEFINER, gate pm/super/**procurement**, FK-existence + period guards (P0001), created_by pin, audited. **pgTAP file 78 (18 asserts):** catalog/PK/RLS/zero-policy, period CHECK, zero-grant read+write denied, RPC gate (site_admin AND visitor тЖТ 42501; procurement ALLOWED; pm happy), P0001 bad-batch/bad-project/end<start, created_by pin, 2 audit rows, anon denied. **Both** audit_action enum pins updated again (03 + 18 тАФ the lesson held, no miss this time). types regenerated (db:types dual-write). Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (1137 unit) + `pnpm db:push` + `pnpm db:test` (78 files / 1568 asserts / 0 failures) all green. **Next:** P2 U3 = `equipment_usage_logs` (per-item/WP/day at daily_rate_snapshot, mirror labor_logs). OUT: usage logs (U3), freeze+wp_equipment_costs (U4), UI (U5), owner portal (U6); allocation edit/end (`ends_on` set at create only); bulk/partial split (reconciliation seam).

## Spec 146 U1 - equipment rental money spine (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE. ADR 0055 decision 5. The first P2 (rental money) unit; data layer, no UI, zero field/site_admin exposure. **TDD:** `tests/unit/equipment-daily-rate.test.ts` + `tests/unit/rental-batch.test.ts` (16 cases, RED first) тЖТ `validateEquipmentDailyRate` + `validateRentalBatch` pure validators (Thai, mirror the DB CHECKs; dates compared as ISO strings, no Date parsing). **Migrations (4, additive only):** `20260736000000` audit-action enum values `equipment_rate_change` + `equipment_batch_create` (own migration, enum-add isolation); `20260736000100` `equipment_items.daily_rate numeric(12,2)` MONEY (CHECK тЙе0; anti-grant by omission from the spec-141 column-scoped grants тАФ admin-only out of the box, like acquisition_cost); `20260736000200` `equipment_rental_batches` (owner_id/monthly_rate/period header, zero-grant money table like wp_labor_costs, CHECKs monthly_rateтЙе0 + ends_onтЙеstarts_on, no-delete); `20260736000300` the two money RPCs. **RPCs (SECURITY DEFINER, mirror set_worker_day_rate):** `set_equipment_daily_rate(id,rate)` + `create_equipment_rental_batch(owner,rate,starts,ends?,note?)тЖТuuid`; gate = pm/super/**procurement** тАФ a DELIBERATE divergence from labor's pm/super-only (procurement is equipment back office, ADR 0055 decision 6); created_by pinned to auth.uid(); each write audited. **pgTAP file 77 (29 asserts):** catalog/PK/RLS/zero-policy, daily_rate anti-grant + negative CHECK, batches zero-grant + both CHECKs, RPC gates (site_admin AND visitor тЖТ 42501; procurement ALLOWED), P0001 existence/shape guards, created_by pin, exact audit-row counts, anon denied. **Both** audit_action enum_has_labels pins updated (+2): file 03 AND file 18-appsheet-writer-purchasing (the spec-27 "grep ALL enum pins" lesson тАФ file 18 was missed on the first db:test run and caught it). Numbered 77 not 67 (67 already taken by spec 142's project-onboarding pgTAP). types regenerated (db:types, no hand-extend needed). Verification: lint + typecheck + `pnpm test` (full unit suite) + `pnpm db:push` + `pnpm db:test` all green. **Next:** P2 U2 = `equipment_project_allocations` (batchтЖФproject set membership). Open Qs (ADR 0055, before U6): batch payment mechanism (cash vs intercompany), owner access identity.

OUT (per spec, surfaced not built): allocations (U2), usage logs (U3), freeze_wp_equipment_cost + wp_equipment_costs (U4), budget-vs-spend join + rate/batch UI (U5), owner portal (U6).

## Pre-existing fix - spec 145 pgTAP plan count (2026-06-19)

Status: COMPLETE (separate from spec 146, found while running the green gate). `supabase/tests/database/76-lock-completed-project.test.sql` declared `plan(11)` but contains only 10 assertion statements тАФ it has been failing `pnpm db:test` (1 failure) since spec 145 shipped (efc9c72, 2026-06-18); CI never caught it (CI runs lint/typecheck/test only, not db:test). Minimal correct fix: `plan(11)` тЖТ `plan(10)` to match the 10 real, all-passing assertions (no fabricated coverage added). Open question: whether spec 145 intended an 11th assertion (e.g. a positive "clone into an active project works" or "WP-DONE is now rework") тАФ if so, add it in a follow-up; the lock behavior itself is fully covered by the 10.

## Incident: AppSheet EMAXCONNSESSION (2026-06-11)

Operator screenshot: AppSheet app failed to load тАФ 'max clients reached in session mode, pool_size: 48' on projects + users reads. Diagnosis: AppSheet data source pointed at the SESSION pooler (5432, per go-live checklist Step 2 wording); Supavisor session pools are per-DB-user with a 48-client cap, and AppSheet's parallel sync burst exhausted appsheet_writer's pool. pg_stat_activity showed ZERO held appsheet_writer backends at diagnosis time тАФ burst, not a leak; nothing to terminate; no prod change made. Fix: operator repoints AppSheet to the TRANSACTION pooler (6543). Checklist Step 2 now documents the port split (5432 = smoke ritual only). Raising session pool_size is not viable (already near the compute tier's max_connections). Open question: if AppSheet misbehaves on transaction mode (prepared-statement quirks), revisit тАФ fallback is a dedicated session pool budget discussion.

## Unit: architecture revision doc тАФ entrepreneur lens (2026-06-11)

- **Status:** COMPLETE (doc-only, advisory). Operator brief: "revise the architecture of this app; think like an entrepreneur, not just technical."
- **Deliverable:** [`docs/architecture-revision-2026-06.md`](./architecture-revision-2026-06.md) тАФ strategic assessment of the whole system by business criteria (cost/month, ops burden per change, engagement, sellability, moat).

### Key positions taken (all pending operator sign-off тАФ ┬з6 of the doc)

1. **AppSheet = rented ground.** Stop investing: cancel the unwritten ADR 0029 image bridge, build the in-app procurement surface + suppliers table instead (derive triggers are already writer-agnostic per ADR 0025; `procurement` role waits in the enum), demote AppSheet to read-only, then retire. Kills the per-schema-change operator tax, the Tier-2 write smoke, the EMAXCONNSESSION incident class, and the licence line.
2. **LINE notification outbox promoted to next feature slot** тАФ audit triggers already detect every hand-off event; they just don't deliver. Outbox table + drainer + LINE Messaging API channel.
3. **Railway retired when touched** тАФ PDF on-demand (route handler spike first) or Edge Function; end-state two platforms.
4. **Tenancy decided on purpose:** instance-per-customer for now + tenant-clean discipline + spin-up runbook; multi-tenant schema deferred until customer #2 is real.
5. Migration rehearsal stage (preview branch/scratch project) before destructive pushes; photo client-side downscale question raised; crew capability-URL uploads parked as v2 differentiator; dormant owner_id/work_package_members cleanup listed.

### Spec 32 adversarial verification (3-lens workflow) тАФ fixes landed pre-commit

- **Blast-radius + discipline lens тАФ MAJOR, fixed:** `.env.example` shipped the two optional vars as empty assignments; dotenv loads `VAR=` as "" and `.optional()` rejects "" тЖТ every fresh "copy .env.example" local boot (and a blank Vercel value) would crash env validation at import time. Fixed both ends: `optionalNonEmpty` preprocess (emptyтЖТabsent) in env.server.ts + lines commented out in .env.example + 3 new env.test.ts cases (the existing per-var missing/empty pattern now covers the new vars).
- **Blast-radius minors, fixed:** photo_logs uploader enrichment included tombstone rows (uploaded_by = REMOVER per ADR 0015) тЖТ `.not("storage_path","is",null)`; no maxDuration on a 50├ЧN-push route тЖТ `export const maxDuration = 60`; PostgREST 1000-row cap on the uploader query тЖТ loud warn when hit (pilot volumes far below).
- **Security minors, fixed:** drain secret now compared via sha256+timingSafeEqual; LINE 5000-char text limit enforced by truncation in pushLineMessage (an oversized user comment was a deterministic 400 тЖТ burned all 3 attempts тЖТ actor-controlled notification suppression) + unit test; pgTAP file 25 hardened +11 asserts (plan 37): authenticated UPDATE/DELETE denial, anon denial, policies_are ZERO, EXECUTE denial on invoke_notification_drain for anon+authenticated (PostgREST RPC exposure pin), all four capture functions SECURITY DEFINER + pinned search_path, pr_created WHEN-guard negative, and the headline failure-swallowing posture PROVEN (outbox renamed away inside the transaction тЖТ WP write still lands, zero rows captured).
- **Discipline:** payload.ts (5th pure module) had no tests тЖТ notification-payload.test.ts added (key mapping, type-narrowing drops, malformed input); recorded here as declared addition alongside the admin.ts typing pull-in. pr_cancelled trigger breadth (anyтЖТcancelled vs spec's approvedтЖТcancelled) recorded in ADR 0037 as deliberate, with the audit-widening caveat for any future self-cancel unit.

Final suite state: 318 unit / 592 pgTAP / 27 e2e, typecheck+lint clean, drain endpoint live-probed 503 not_configured pre-activation.

## ADR 0034 amendment - atrophy model (2026-06-11)

Operator asked for hybrid pros/cons before AppSheet retirement; evidence pass (2-agent inventory) found the hybrid sounder than the architecture-revision urgency credited: AppSheet write surface = 9 fact columns on ONE table (decide/cancel/create/delivery-by-photo already in-app), derive/audit/notification triggers writer-agnostic, grid bulk-entry value unquantifiable yet (operator: "cannot determine"). Column freeze + 3 open TODOs unchanged. Volume question converted to measurement (audit principal field) instead of a bet.

App: validate-record-purchase + isBackOfficeRole pure modules test-first (RED confirmed pre-impl); createSupplier/recordPurchase/recordShipment actions (RPC relays, decide-pattern error unions, 42501/P0001 Thai mapping); PurchaseRecordForm (supplier select + inline р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Вр╕▓р╕вр╣Гр╕лр╕бр╣И create-and-pick, order_ref/amount/eta) on approved cards; PurchaseRequestShip (confirm) on purchased cards; both gated isBackOffice; footer copy now names both paths. 325 unit green.

## Spec 34 - client photo downscale (2026-06-11)

Status: COMPLETE (operator phone pass = acceptance, spec ┬з3). Implements ADR 0036: the downscaled file IS the original; max 2000px long edge, JPEG 0.8; downscale is an optimization NEVER a gate тАФ every failure path (HEIC on non-Safari, decode/encode errors, toBlob null) uploads the original unchanged; small files pass through with EXIF intact (orientation correct either way: re-encode bakes orientation via createImageBitmap imageOrientation:'from-image', passthrough keeps EXIF).

Built: src/lib/photos/downscale.ts (computeDownscaleTarget PURE + preparePhotoForUpload browser seam) + photoExtToMime in path.ts тАФ RED confirmed pre-impl, 11 unit tests. Integrated in ALL THREE uploaders at the ext-derivation point (ext flips to jpeg on re-encode BEFORE path building): phase-uploader (PendingUpload now stores prepared blob + lastModifiedMs scalar тАФ no raw File in state; retries reuse prepared bytes), attachment stager, delivery uploader. No DB/storage diff.

### Adversarial verification (2-lens) тАФ fixes landed pre-commit

- Transparent PNG/WebP over the cap re-encoded onto a BLACK background (canvas default substrate under toBlob jpeg) тЖТ white fill before drawImage.
- REAL race (stager deferred mode): awaiting prepare BEFORE staging the chip meant a create-form submit during a slow phone decode flushed without the in-flight photo тАФ orphaned 'staged' chip, and a SECOND submission would have attached it to the WRONG purchase request. Fix: chips stage synchronously as 'preparing' (new status + р╕Бр╕│р╕ер╕▒р╕Зр╣Ар╕Хр╕гр╕╡р╕вр╕бр╕гр╕╣р╕ЫтАж display), prepare jobs tracked in a ref, flush() awaits outstanding prepares THEN reads a fresh items ref (the closure's items is stale after an await тАФ itemsRef pattern).
- createImageBitmap orientation made explicit (imageOrientation:'from-image' тАФ old Firefox/WebViews don't default to it); ext! assertions narrowed; stager header comment de-drifted; rounding test now exercises a genuinely fractional edge (3000├Ч1000 тЖТ 667).

Suite: 336 unit / 27 e2e green; pgTAP untouched (627). OPERATOR (acceptance): fresh camera photo on a test-safe WP тЖТ renders correctly oriented; Storage object ~hundreds of KB not MB (dashboard read-only check). Open seams: Web Worker offload (with the offline-queue spec), HEIC polyfill, quality/size UI, retroactive processing (never тАФ append-only).

## Spec 35 - offline-tolerant upload queue, WP phase photos (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator phone pass = acceptance: airplane mode -> photo -> banner -> close browser -> signal -> reopen -> photo lands). ADR 0039. A selected phase photo is never lost: persisted to IndexedDB at selection (survives crash/close/navigation, iOS + Android тАФ NO Background Sync dependency), uploads live exactly as before on good signal, global UploadQueueRunner (root layout; banner р╕гр╕нр╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕гр╕╣р╕Ы N р╕гр╕╣р╕Ы only when items wait) drains leftovers on mount/online/visibility/event/backoff (5s┬╖2^n cap 5min).

Architecture: replay is IDEMPOTENT end-to-end so live-path/runner/multi-tab overlap is harmless BY DESIGN тАФ bytes 409 тЗТ alreadyExists тЗТ advance; addPhoto gains a 23505 replay path. Pure core (processQueue/QueueStore/classify/backoff) test-first vs in-memory store тАФ 15 unit tests; IDB store + runner are browser seams (house posture). Items NEVER auto-dropped (evidence); attempts only widen backoff.

### Adversarial verification (2-lens, verdict FAIL -> all fixed pre-commit)

- MAJOR (security): the 23505 verify originally checked id-exists only тАФ photo ids are readable role-wide, so a forged replay with a foreign photo id (e.g. a before-photo id + phase='after') would return ok AND flip the WP to pending_approval with zero after photos. Verify now requires the FULL replayed identity (id + work_package_id + phase + canonical storage_path).
- MAJOR (shared device): queue items now carry userId; the runner SKIPS foreign/ownerless items (uploaded_by is append-only тАФ misattribution is uncorrectable). Post-logout blob persistence recorded in ADR 0039 as an accepted tradeoff; discard UI = seam.
- MAJOR (live-path resilience): addPhoto invocation throw (the exact flaky-signal case) stuck the tile and ABORTED the multi-file loop (remaining files never queued тАФ silent loss) -> try/catch in insertOne + per-iteration isolation in handleFiles. Queue I/O (quota/private-mode IDB) wrapped non-fatal тАФ the safety net can't break the live pipeline.
- MAJOR (idempotency gap): live uploadOne wasn't 409-tolerant тАФ a runner/live overlap left a permanently-failing retry tile; now classifies alreadyExists and proceeds.
- Minors: banner staleness (notify after live remove; lock-unavailable branch refreshes count + short retry), pass-failure now reschedules (30s) instead of freezing, dead nowMs dep removed, projectId dropped from the persisted item (fileName kept for the discard seam, recorded), header lifecycle comment updated.

Suites: 349 unit / 27 e2e green; pgTAP untouched (627); no DB schema diff (addPhoto change is app-layer only). Open seams: reference/delivery photo queueing, manual discard UI, SW Background Sync, Web Worker downscale. OPERATOR: phone acceptance pass for specs 34+35 together (one outdoor session covers both).

## Spec 37 - offline queue for all photo kinds + manual discard (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator phone pass = acceptance, spec ┬з2). Closes both ADR 0039 seams: the loss-proof queue now covers reference attachments and delivery-confirmation photos (not just WP phase photos), and the р╕гр╕нр╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕гр╕╣р╕Ы banner expands into a per-item list with confirm-guarded р╕ер╕Ъ тАФ the ONLY way an item leaves the queue without landing.

Architecture: QueuedPhoto generalized to discriminated QueuedUpload (phase_photo | reference_attachment | delivery_photo); bucket + metadata action follow the kind; the pure core stays kind-agnostic (runner's insertMeta dispatches). Legacy spec-35 items normalize to phase_photo on read (IDB schemaless тАФ no version bump). Both attachment actions gained the identity-complete 23505 replay (id + parent + kind + purpose + canonical path). Stager queues at runItem time (flush covers deferred mode once the parent exists); userId threaded through PurchaseRequestForm at both hosts. Test-first: 5 new core tests (mixed-kind dispatch, normalization, bucket map, discard race).

### Adversarial verification (2-lens, FAIL -> all fixed pre-commit)

- MAJOR: addPurchaseRequestAttachment's status gate ran before the 23505 verify, so a replay whose insert LANDED but whose response was lost could never confirm after the PM decided тАФ the queue item retried forever for a photo that was already live. Fixed: decided-parent path runs the identity-complete existence check first (read-only); never-landed items on decided parents are refusable BY DESIGN тАФ the reference window closes at decision time (recorded in spec + ADR; discard is the designed out).
- Discard raced an in-flight pass: processQueue's put-backs could resurrect (or send) a just-discarded item. Fixed: QueueStore.has() re-checks before every put-back (pinned by unit test); confirm copy now promises only un-sent deletion.
- Shared-device hole in the NEW surface: the discard list let any device holder (incl. logged-out on /login) see and delete other users' un-sent evidence тАФ contradicting the ADR 0039 skip-foreign stance. Fixed: foreign items render read-only without fileName (р╕гр╕╣р╕Ыр╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╣Гр╕Кр╣Йр╕нр╕╖р╣Ир╕Щ тАФ р╕гр╕нр╣Ар╕Ир╣Йр╕▓р╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕кр╕╣р╣Ир╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ъ).
- Deferred-mode queueing was dead code (userId never threaded to the create form) тАФ silent loss on flush-with-bad-signal survived. Fixed: userId through PurchaseRequestForm at /requests + WP page.
- Delivery failure copy said "р╕ер╕нр╕Зр╣Гр╕лр╕бр╣И" which would make users re-pick under a NEW uuid тЖТ duplicate rows when both landed. Copy now says queued-will-auto-send. a11y: role=status moved off the details element onto the count span (live region must not swallow disclosure semantics/buttons); summary marker restored.

Suites: 359 unit / 27 e2e green; pgTAP untouched (627); no schema diff. OPERATOR: the specs 34+35 phone pass extends to 37 (airplane-mode delivery photo -> banner -> reopen -> lands + auto-completes delivery per ADR 0030). Open seams: SW Background Sync, Web-Worker downscale, link-attachment queueing (deliberately out).

## Spec 39 - on-demand report generation + stale-report reaper (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator acceptance: click р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ -> р╕Юр╕гр╣Йр╕нр╕бр╕Фр╕▓р╕зр╕Щр╣Мр╣Вр╕лр╕ер╕Ф in seconds; Railway logs keep saying "No jobs"). ADR 0040 тАФ revision-doc ┬з3.3 executed in the ADR-0034 atrophy shape: fast path ships alongside the worker; Railway retires by finding nothing.

DB (9a85bfb + amendment): reap_stale_reports() + pg_cron report-reaper \*/5 тАФ closes the documented v1 wedge (stuck 'processing' blocked a project's reports forever). Review amendment (20260617000200): reaper ALSO flips stale 'requested' (>15 min = nothing is processing the queue) тАФ without this, pausing the Railway cron would re-open the wedge for rows the fast path failed to claim; WITH it, pausing Railway is safe any time. pgTAP file 27 (13 asserts: security pins, both stale kinds reaped with distinguishing messages, fresh/terminal untouched, cron pin).

App: worker pipeline PORTED (worker/ byte-untouched тАФ Railway Watch Path + it stays the fallback): build-pdf.ts (same locked layout; Sarabun as a base64 server-only module тАФ fs reads don't survive serverless bundling), run-report-job.ts (claim-assumed runner; every error marks failed + full stack to server log, worker parity). generateReport fast path: insert (unchanged) -> admin claim_next_report (same atomic RPC = app+worker can never double-build) -> runReportJob; every failure mode degrades to the sweeper/reaper. pdfkit pinned ^0.17.2 (review: 0.19 layout drift vs the fallback would make fast-path/worker PDFs differ) + serverExternalPackages. maxDuration=60 on the reports page; button catch degrades a platform timeout to a soft message (reaper recovers server-side). Production build green.

Recorded deviations + decisions: after-photos filter REUSES src/lib/photos/current-photos.ts instead of porting the worker's duplicate (equivalent semantics тАФ worker only adds the phase filter, applied at the call site here; covered by current-photos.test.ts); spec checklist amended accordingly. Known accepted shape: claim_next_report is global FIFO, so a PM's click may build an older queued report from another project first тАФ correct (FIFO) and invisible at pilot volume; their own row is claimed by the next click/sweep. Page copy updated (р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Бр╕╡р╣Ир╕зр╕┤р╕Щр╕▓р╕Чр╕╡). PDF smoke test runs under @vitest-environment node (fontkit Buffer checks fail across the jsdom realm) and pins the embedded Sarabun by name (PDFKit subsets glyphs, so size is no pin). Suites: 362 unit / 27 e2e / pgTAP 640 expected post-push. OPERATOR: try a report; MAY pause the Railway cron whenever тАФ it is now safe; deleting the service + worker/ dir = future cleanup spec.

NEXT-SESSION CANDIDATES: more look-feedback rounds, procurement-role onboarding (needs a real user), Railway/worker deletion cleanup (after fast-path history), partial deliveries/line items (on demand), queued smalls (DB CHECK caps, dark toggle, real logo asset, dialog a11y, pagination, PWA themeColor seam).

## Spec 42 - PWA standalone LINE re-login, iOS (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator iPhone pass = acceptance). Operator report: installed PWA loses login after logout; LINE re-login bounces through the LINE app to the system browser, session lands in the wrong cookie jar (iOS standalone jar is separate; CSRF state cookie also splits, so the browser-side callback dies oauth_failed). Fix per spec 42: disable_auto_login=true on the authorize URL for iOS standalone launches (verified against LINE Login v2.1 docs тАФ keeps the whole flow in the PWA's in-app overlay via LINE web login), CSS-toggled standalone login anchor (?standalone=1, display-mode arbitrary variants, no 'use client' тАФ ADR 0012 plain-anchor shape preserved), header logout CSS-hidden in standalone (profile-page logout stays, reachable via bottom tab). Android untested тАФ flag is iOS-UA-gated to avoid regressing the shared-jar WebAPK flow.

Test-first: 3 new route tests (tests/unit/line-start-route.test.ts тАФ env.server mocked at module level since serverEnv validates at import), 2 LoginButton tests, 1 AppHeader logout-wrapper pin. Playwright note: role-based locators ignore the display-hidden second anchor (a11y tree), so the existing e2e href pin survives untouched тАФ 8/8 auth e2e green on chromium. Suites: 368 unit / lint / typecheck green; no DB diff.

Recorded limitation + seam: LINE accounts with no registered email/password cannot complete the web login form (mitigation: browser login -> reinstall PWA; site data copies into the container at install). Real fix if it bites = one-time handoff code minting the session in the PWA via the existing generateLink/verifyOtp machinery (spec 42 out-of-scope section). Supabase inactivity timeout must stay "never" (operator check, no code). OPERATOR: iPhone acceptance pass тАФ install PWA, logout, log back in via LINE web login without leaving the app.

## Spec 43 - device-code handoff login for the installed PWA (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator iPhone pass = acceptance). Shipped 398f8da + types reconcile 1fd8df2 (typegen also caught up reap_stale_reports from spec 39); migration 20260618000100 applied via db push (dry-run showed zero drift first); pgTAP 656/656 (640 + file 28's 16). Operator hit spec 42's recorded limitation within minutes (LINE web login = QR or email/password; both unusable). ADR 0041: device-code handoff. PWA login tap -> POST /auth/handoff/start issues {state, device_code} row (login_handoffs, 10-min TTL, outbox zero-access posture) -> LINE auth with auto-login RESTORED (one-tap in LINE app) -> callback validates state against the DB row instead of the cookie (resolveCallbackFlow precedence: valid cookie always wins = browser path byte-equivalent), binds user_email + claims stash, status approved, shows return-to-app notice -> PWA polls /auth/handoff/poll, which atomically claims (approved->consumed) and mints the session onto the poll response via the ADR 0012 generateLink/verifyOtp pair - sb-\* cookies land in the PWA's own jar. Profile write parity (NULL-only + avatar refresh) runs at poll time from the stashed claims. Spec 42 items 1-2 reverted (disable_auto_login + ?standalone=1 anchor dead); logout hiding stands.

New surfaces: migration 20260618000100 + pgTAP file 28 (16 asserts), src/lib/auth/{line-authorize-url,line-token-exchange,handoff-flow}.ts (exchange/verify extracted - both callback paths verify identically), /auth/handoff/{start,poll} routes, StandaloneLoginButton ('use client' justified: fetch + window.open + poll orchestration; useSyncExternalStore for sessionStorage resume - react-hooks/set-state-in-effect rejects the mount-setState pattern, lesson banked), login page handoff=approved notice, proxy PUBLIC_PATHS +2. database.types.ts hand-extended pre-push; reconcile with pnpm db:types post-push. Suites: 395 unit / auth e2e 8/8 / prod build green / pgTAP 656. Security notes recorded in ADR 0041: device_code never in URLs, single-use via atomic claim, claim-before-mint burn tradeoff, uniform expired answers, device-grant phishing class accepted for internal user base (confirm-tap = hardening seam). Seams: poll rate limiting, Android pass.

## Spec 44 - handoff resume hardening, iOS process death (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator iPhone re-test = acceptance). First spec-43 field test failed: row reached approved (browser success page shown) but PWA never claimed - iOS killed the backgrounded PWA during the LINE/Safari excursion and sessionStorage died with it (no resume, no poll, idle button). Client-only fix in StandaloneLoginButton: (1) localStorage + expiry stamp (line_handoff_device_code / line_handoff_expires_at, 600s = server TTL; stale stamp reads as nothing-stored in the useSyncExternalStore snapshot, clearing only in handlers - no side effects in render), (2) popup opened SYNCHRONOUSLY in the tap gesture (window.open after await can fall outside iOS transient user activation), opener nulled, navigated after the start POST; blocked popup -> same-window fallback (safe now that the code persists), start failure closes the orphan popup. Server untouched - approved rows wait the full TTL for a late claimer by design. 8 component tests (popup contract, resume, stale-stamp idle, fallback). Suites: 398 unit / auth e2e 8/8. Lesson banked: iOS standalone PWA storage assumptions - sessionStorage NEVER survives the app-switch kill; any cross-app handshake state must live in localStorage with its own TTL.

## Spec 45 - handoff opens LINE in same window, no popup (2026-06-12)

Status: COMPLETE (operator iPhone re-test = acceptance). Spec-44 field test: home app went ALL WHITE on tap - iOS standalone PWAs have NO tab model; the spec-44 synchronous window.open('', '\_blank') swaps the visible view to a dead about:blank and the later popup navigation never reaches the user. Fix (client-only, third round on ADR 0041): popup path deleted; tap -> start POST -> store code (spec-44 localStorage+expiry) -> SAME-WINDOW navigation to LINE (no transient-activation concern). Return trip = spec 44's resume: PWA resumes (user closes out-of-scope top-bar view) or relaunches cold at start_url; any LoginButton page resumes the poll. Cancel pin caught a REAL bug: cancel from a resumed waiting state mutated only storage (no React state delta) so useSyncExternalStore never re-read - storage mutations now emit to subscribers (proper external store, not the noop-subscribe shortcut). Suites: 397 unit / auth e2e 8/8. Lessons banked: (1) standalone PWA = never window.open, same-window nav + persistent resume state is the pattern; (2) noop-subscribe useSyncExternalStore is a trap whenever mutations can happen without an accompanying state change.

### Specs 43-45 operator acceptance (2026-06-12)

Operator iPhone pass CONFIRMED: installed-PWA LINE login via device-code handoff works end-to-end (tap -> LINE app one-tap -> return -> auto signed in). The spec-42/43/44/45 arc is closed; PWA re-login is no longer a blocker for field rollout. Remaining handoff seams unchanged (poll rate limiting, confirm-tap hardening, Android pass when a device exists).

### Operator decision 2026-06-12: AppSheet config edits DEFERRED

Operator: 'Keep all appsheet edit as pending, we can edit later.' The 3 outstanding AppSheet console TODOs (mark pr_number + cancelled_at/by/reason read-only, shipped_at editable column) stay pending indefinitely. Accepted consequence: AppSheet saves can break on rows touching those columns until done - consistent with ADR 0034 atrophy posture (in-app is the primary write path; AppSheet usage winding down).

Status: COMPLETE (acceptance = operator phone pass - finger drawing is the make-or-break surface). Operator feedback item 4 second half: "Enable drawing and commenting feature on the image." WP surfaces thread ids; request attachments deliberately do NOT (not photo_logs - recorded boundary). Suites: 448 unit / 724 pgTAP / lint / typecheck / build. Seams recorded: LINE notify on comment, markup in PDF reports, colors/tools.

Audit verdict: PM project flow crossed THREE 'project' surfaces - /pm/projects rows opened the REPORTS page (not the project), its rai-kan-ngan link led to the WP list, whose back chip was HARDCODED '/sa' = the SA home (a second, different-looking project list). SA flow was already consistent. Fix: (1) /pm/projects rows -> /sa/projects/[id] - the WP list is THE project page for every role (WP-centric doctrine); (2) WP-list back chip role-aware via new projectHubHref(role) in role-home.ts (sa -> /sa, pm/super -> /pm/projects, else roleHome) - 3 tests RED then GREEN; (3) reports reachable via a FileText chip in the project-page header row (pm/super, next to the spec-58 gear) -> /pm/projects/[id]/reports (reports page nav row already round-trips); (4) NEW docs/site-map.md - full audited inventory (route x gate x entry edges x back target), nav changes must update it in the same unit (the ui-conventions contract). Spec-12 locked-back-targets note: this is the operator-driven amendment for the WP-list target; all other back targets verified unchanged. Recorded seams: /sa vs /pm/projects dual hubs (merge = design-round candidate), /workers still has no nav entry, procurement column empty. Suites: 487 unit / lint / typecheck / prod build green. No DB diff.

## Spec 64 - fixed app shell: chrome that cannot drift (2026-06-13)

Status: COMPLETE (acceptance = operator phone re-test, scroll + overscroll bounce). Operator after spec 62: 'header and footer sticky is not working properly.' Diagnosis: spec-62 sticky/fixed are structurally correct (no overflow/transform ancestors - audited globals.css + root layout) but ride the BODY scroller; iOS standalone rubber-bands body scrolling, so chrome drifts during the bounce - works in DevTools, drifts in the field. Fix = the canonical PWA shell: body LOCKED (h-full overflow-hidden) + new PageShell component (spec-63 consolidation: ONE shell, every route) whose main is the only scroller (h-full overflow-y-auto overscroll-y-contain) with variants app (zinc wash + tab-bar clearance) / card (centered single-card) / bare (profile + coming-soon hub supply their own). All 18 mains across routes swapped; 4 PageShell tests RED then GREEN; ui-conventions section 5 page anatomy rewritten (hand-rolled main = review reject). LIVE-VERIFIED in the preview browser: body overflow hidden at viewport height, main = sole scroller w/ overscroll containment, card variant renders. error.tsx lesson: never prepend imports above 'use client' (directive must stay first statement). Honest caveat recorded: this is the canonical bounce-drift fix; if the operator's symptom was something else (keyboard overlap etc.) the re-test will say so and the shell is the right foundation regardless. Suites: 504 unit / lint / typecheck / prod build green. No DB diff.
