The **project record stays editable** (status тЖТ active to reopen the project; record retention notes in settings). **Actions** map `P0002` тЖТ "р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╕Ыр╕┤р╕Фр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з р╣Ар╕Ыр╕┤р╕Фр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Бр╣Ир╕нр╕ЩтАж" (createWorkPackage/copyWorkPackages/applyWpTemplate/importWorkPackagesCsv). **UI (project page):** added `status` to the project select + `projectOpen`; when closed, hides the seeding controls + onboarding checklist and shows a lock banner pointing to settings. **pgTAP file 76** (plan 11): helper truth table, direct-insert + all 3 RPCs blocked on a completed project (P0002), create still works on active, **reopen-for-defect still works on a completed project (warranty)**; fixtures seed WPs while active then flip to completed (so the seed doesn't trip the trigger). **Verified-by-checklist** (DB lock pgTAP'd; UI gate + action mapping are thin glue over the tested DB behavior). **Out of scope (deliberate):** retention %/warranty billing тАФ a finance feature the app resists (status-only at most, per ceo-review); not built. **Project lifecycle now complete:** active/on_hold (full edit) тЖТ completed (locked for new work; warranty: defects reopen individual WPs to rework тЖТ fix тЖТ re-approve) тЖТ archived; reopen the project via statusтЖТactive. **Audit-found project-status gap closed.**

## Spec 167 тАФ WP detail segmented tabs (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new query** (pure UI restructure). lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **1328 unit (201 files; +4 TDD: wp-detail-tabs)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"WP detail page is too long with contents, scrolling through unrelated contents is distracting."_ Direction chosen via AskUserQuestion: **segmented tabs** (over collapse-sections / sticky-jump-nav). **Shipped:** `WpDetailTabs` ('use client') тАФ a WAI-ARIA tablist (`role=tablist/tab/tabpanel`, `aria-selected`, `aria-controls`/`labelledby`, arrow/Home/End roving focus) that shows **one panel at a time** with inactive panels kept **mounted via `hidden`** (so a half-typed purchase request + the spec-147 single fetch survive a switch тАФ NOT `?tab=` nav, which would re-run `loadWorkPackageDetail` per tap). Active tab = `text-action` + bottom indicator bar (mirrors `BottomTabBar`); тЙе44px tap floor; token classes only (passes design-doctrine grep). Width via `PAGE_MAX_W`. **WP page regrouped:** header nameplate + phase progress bar + attention stack + defect/rework cards stay **pinned** (needs-action / at-a-glance, never behind a tap тАФ extends spec 94's "don't bury the assign prompt"); photos ┬╖ purchases ┬╖ labor ┬╖ info fold into tabs (р╕гр╕╣р╕Ыр╕Цр╣Ир╕▓р╕в default ┬╖ р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н ┬╖ р╣Бр╕гр╕Зр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ ┬╖ р╕Вр╣Йр╕нр╕бр╕╣р╕е), and the **planner management block (rename/priority/р╕Зр╕зр╕Фр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ-bind/schedule/delete) becomes a р╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕Бр╕▓р╕г tab appended only when `isPlanner`** тАФ it no longer pushes the capture hero down for PMs. Per-section `<h2>` icon headings dropped (tab label names the section); `Camera/FileText/ShoppingCart/Users` imports removed. **Deep link:** the pending-requests `CountChip` keeps `href="#wp-requests"`; `WpDetailTabs` takes `hashTabMap={{ "wp-requests": "purchases" }}` + listens for `hashchange` тЖТ tapping the chip opens the р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н tab. **Test** `wp-detail-tabs.test.tsx` (4): one tab per section + default-first, every panel mounted with inactive `hidden`, click switches the active panel, a mapped `hashchange` opens the right tab. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated route тЖТ /login in preview, the standing constraint for SA/PM pages; behavior is unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). **Out of scope (recorded):** no **sticky** tab bar this unit тАФ the header is already `sticky top-0` with a dynamic height, so a second sticky bar below it would need that height as its `top` offset (fragile); the tablist sits in normal flow under the pinned progress bar (still near the top, each panel now short). The **PM review** WP page (`/review/work-packages/[workPackageId]`) is a separate surface тАФ untouched; one-component follow-up if the operator wants the same there. **U2 (af3144d): р╣Бр╕гр╕Зр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ тЖТ р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ term sweep** тАФ operator flagged р╣Бр╕гр╕Зр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ ("labor/laborer") as a sensitive word; р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ was already the de-facto SSOT for the workforce (/workers, roster, Nova, contacts). Replaced all 10 user-facing р╣Бр╕гр╕Зр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ literals phrased per context (tab, р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ button + tests, error, review heading/variance copy, delete-guard; over-alloc flag dropped the noun). Left р╕Др╣Ир╕▓р╣Бр╕гр╕З (standard wage term) + a pgTAP fixture name. Follow-up: single-source р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ in labels.ts. db:test 201/1328 green.

## Spec 168 тАФ split subcontractor + DC contact pages (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new component** (pure IA split). lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **unit green (+ updated 3 pins)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Setting page of sub contractor should not be in the same page as DC."_ Spec 99's `crews` group put **р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕лр╕бр╕▓р╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕З** (subcontractor тАФ a firm that pays its own crew) and **DC** (paid directly) on one page (`/contacts/crews`) behind a tab chip row, reached from a single р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ door `р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕лр╕бр╕▓р╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕З / DC`. They are different relationships тЖТ split into two pages. **Shipped:** `lib/contacts/groups.ts` тАФ `ContactGroup` drops `crews`, adds `subcontractors: ["contractors"]` + `dc: ["dc"]` (single-type groups тЖТ `ContactsTabs` renders no chip row via its `tabs.length > 1` guard). New routes **`/contacts/subcontractors`** (fetch `contractor_category='contractor'`, title `SUBCONTRACTOR_LABEL`) and **`/contacts/dc`** (fetch `='dc'`, title `р╕Чр╕╡р╕б DC`), each + `loading.tsx`, both PM/super, `DetailHeader` backтЖТ/settings, reusing `ContactsTabs`. **`/contacts/crews` removed** (page + loading; it was a р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓-only door, replaced here). **`/settings`:** the one merged door тЖТ **two doors** тАФ р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕лр╕бр╕▓р╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕З (`/contacts/subcontractors`, icon `Hammer`) + DC (`/contacts/dc`, icon `Contact`, hint `DC р╕Ыр╕гр╕░р╕Ир╕│/р╕Кр╕▒р╣Ир╕зр╕Др╕гр╕▓р╕з/р╕Ър╕гр╕┤р╕йр╕▒р╕Ч`). `/workers` (DC _worker_ roster + day rates) untouched тАФ distinct from the DC _contact_ list. **Same `contractors` table + same detail route `/contacts/contractors/[id]` for both categories** тАФ only the list IA changed. **Tests (path b):** `contacts-groups.test.ts` asserts the new map + no `crews`; `contact-subcontractor-label.test.ts` SSOT surface crewsтЖТsubcontractors; `nav-back-affordance.test.ts` `STATIC_DETAIL` drops crews, adds the two (the completeness guard forces every new page.tsx to be classified). **Lesson:** deleting a route leaves **stale `.next/types/validator.ts`** referencing the old `page.js` тЖТ `tsc` fails with TS2307 until a build regenerates the route types (run `pnpm build` before re-typechecking). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes тЖТ /login in preview; group map + route classification unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance).

## Spec 169 тАФ bottom tabs (+ hub strip) are first-layer destinations (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED тАФ 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no route / no role-set change** (nav behaviour). lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **unit green (nav suites 71; +1 TDD)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Hitting the menu button should take users back to the top of the sitemap тАж all the tabs on the bottom of screen must be treated as first layer."_ **Root cause:** `BottomTabBar` rendered the **active** tab as an inert `<span>` (only inactive tabs were `<Link>`s), so on a sub-page (e.g. `/projects/[id]/...`) the section's own tab (р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г) was active = **not tappable** тЖТ no one-tap way back to the section root (`/projects`, the first layer). **Fix:** render **every** tab as a `<Link>` to its root; the active one keeps its identity via `aria-current="page"` + the indicator bar + `text-action`/bold (active detection unchanged тАФ longest-prefix still lights exactly one). A tap on the active tab now returns to the first layer. **Extended to `HubNav`** (the desktop `sm:` strip the codebase keeps mirrored with the bottom bar тАФ same inert-`<span>` current item тЖТ same dead tab on a cloud PC; operator is a desktop user, so parity matters): current item is now a `<Link aria-current="page">` with the underline/`font-semibold` style. **Tests (path b):** `bottom-tab-bar.test.tsx` тАФ new test pins the active tab is a tappable `<a href=root>` on a deep `/projects/[id]/work-packages/[id]` path; the PM active tab (р╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И on /review) is a link to /review; `hub-nav.test.tsx` тАФ every item is a link, current carries `aria-current` (was: span). Both updated the prior "active renders as a span, not a link" pins. **Scope note:** detail screens that deliberately hide the bottom bar (WP detail's thumb capture bar) are unchanged тАФ this only changes how the bar behaves where it already renders. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes; the nav components are unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). Spec doc `169-tabs-are-first-layer.md`.

## Spec 170 тАФ DC is a worker (ADR 0062 arc), U1 (2026-06-21)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-21.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest green** ┬╖ **db:test 114 files / 2193 / 0** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260778000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: _"DC is confusing again"_ тЖТ chose **rethink the model (unify the data)** + the decisive fact **"there is no DC firm, we hire DC directly"** тЖТ **ADR 0062: a DC is a single `workers` record, no contractor party** (full design pass + prod audit showing 0 DC rows/payments/bindings = no migration risk; committed earlier 78973e5). **U1 (additive тАФ nothing removed; payment/portal/Nova stay party-keyed until U2тАУU4):** migration `20260778000000_dc_worker_fields.sql` тАФ new enum `dc_arrangement` (regular|temporary); `workers` gains `dc_arrangement` (DC-only CHECK) + payee fields `phone`/`tax_id`/`bank_name`/`bank_account_number`/`bank_account_name` (length-capped). **bank+tax+phone = ZERO authenticated grant** (money/PII isolation, the day_rate posture spec 46 C3; admin-client-only); `dc_arrangement` granted (non-sensitive). `create_worker`/`update_worker` **DROP+CREATE** (can't add params via REPLACE) to accept the new fields тАФ reproduced the spec-152 `project_director` gate, reject an arrangement on a non-dc worker, and **re-applied the EXECUTE lockdown** (20260625000200) for the NEW signatures (else DROP resets to PUBLIC default тЖТ anon hole + pgTAP 36 break). **`/workers` add form drops the р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕лр╕бр╕▓ parent picker for DC** (spec 160 already nulled contractor_id) + collects arrangement (р╕Ыр╕гр╕░р╕Ир╕│/р╕Кр╕▒р╣Ир╕зр╕Др╕гр╕▓р╕з) + payee fields; `createWorker` keeps an optional `contractorId` for the subcontractor-crew flow (contact-crew-section) only. **Tests:** `worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` (DC form shows arrangement+payee, no picker; adds DC worker w/ arrangement+bank); pgTAP 29 (+7 тЖТ 60: bank/tax isolated 42501, dc_arrangement readable, create DC w/ no parent + stores arrangement/bank, arrangement rejected for non-dc); pgTAP 36 updated to the new 12/11-arg signatures. **Lessons:** the LATEST create_worker/update_worker bodies were in the spec-152 RPC-gate migration (project_director added), NOT the base тАФ always source the current body before DROP+CREATE; a DROP+CREATE resets EXECUTE to PUBLIC default so the lockdown grants must be re-applied for the new signature (pgTAP 36 is the guard); `pnpm exec supabase db query --linked --file` audits prod; run-pgtap.ts ignores file args (runs all). **NEXT (own sessions):** U2 Nova externalтЖТworker arrangement ┬╖ U3 dc_paymentsтЖТworker ┬╖ U4 portalтЖТworkers.user_id ┬╖ U5 remove /contacts/dc + door ┬╖ U6 labels. Edit-payee-in-place (create-only today) = small follow-up.

**U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-21** (mig 20260779000000; **db:test green**; app untouched, no type change). Nova "external" now reads the **worker's** `dc_arrangement='temporary'` instead of the contractor party's `contractor_subtype='dc_temporary'`. CREATE OR REPLACE (signatures unchanged тЖТ grants preserved) the two functions that read the rule: `distribute_project_coins` (external тЖТ flat external_factor weight, else level weight) + `coin_unvested_balance` (external lock тАФ whole balance unvested). pgTAP 106 (distribution) + 108 (vesting) repointed: the external DC fixture is marked `update workers set dc_arrangement='temporary'` (keyed on the holdover dc_temporary contractor); assertions unchanged. The contracts-UI `dc_temporary` subtype labels (/contacts/dc) are untouched тАФ they're the party subtype display, cleaned up in U5. **NEXT:** U3 dc_paymentsтЖТworker.

**U4c-2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23** (3-unit arc, commits 74e3c3b┬╖e38df1b┬╖39f9358; migs `20260810000000` + fix-forward `20260810000100`; pgTAP `201` 18/18; lint┬╖typecheck┬╖vitest 1513 green). Staged worker (DC) bank-change тЖТ PM approval тАФ the worker analogue of the contractor anti-fraud gate (spec 130 U4 / ADR 0051 ┬з6) тАФ folded into the approvals-awareness arc (specs 183тАУ186). **OPEN-6 resolved (operator AskUserQuestion): a parallel `worker_bank_change_requests` table, NOT polymorphic on the contractor table** тАФ the apply path forks (a worker change writes `workers.bank_*` inline, no `contact_bank` row) and a separate table isolates the shipped, pgTAP-pinned (file 39) contractor gate from regression. **U1 (DB):** table reuses enum `contractor_change_status`, bank caps match the workers columns (120/50/120); RLS readable-by-bound-worker (`current_user_worker_id()`) + pm/super/director, writes RPC-only; `submit_worker_bank_change` (bound-worker / own / one-pending) + `decide_worker_bank_change` (pm/super/director; approve writes `workers.bank_*`, reject discards; idempotent). **U2 (portal):** `WorkerBankChangeForm` on the /portal worker branch's bank card (reuses `validateBankChange` + `submitWorkerBankChange`), pending-state gate. **U3 (awareness fold):** the р╕ар╕▓р╕Юр╕гр╕зр╕б total badge gains a 4th read (WP + PR + contractor-bank + worker-bank); the dashboard bank-change card shows the COMBINED count; `/contacts/bank-changes` merges both kinds (queue item gains `kind` + a unified `name`; `BankChangeDecision` gains a `kind` prop routing approve/reject to the matching decide RPC; rows tagged р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ / р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕лр╕бр╕▓). **Trap re-hit:** the status `CASE тАж 'approved' тАж END` yields TEXT тЖТ no implicit textтЖТenum cast тЖТ `42804` on every decide; fix-forward `20260810000100` added `::public.contractor_change_status` (the same trap fixed for the contractor RPC in `20260708000100` тАФ copy the LIVE def, not the uncast base). **Concurrent-session handled:** a parallel spec-187 session shared the tree throughout; staged only my files explicitly each commit (never `git add -A`), db:types diff stayed mine-only (their migration was type-neutral). **STILL PENDING:** U4c-3 (DC documents, OPEN-7 storage RLS), OPEN-1 (portal DC-only vs dual-tenant). NEXT after this = U6 (DC labels pass; retire `contractor_users` if unused).

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog (on-site storage / inventory foundation), U1 (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1366 (206 files; +1 TDD: catalog-list)** ┬╖ **db:test 121 files / 2311 / 0** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260801000000`; db:types regenerated. First unit of the on-site **storage-unit / inventory** feature (design in `docs/inventory-store/README.md`): the store is a transfer-pricing BU with three flows (Supply Plan / Stock-In / р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б), staged **cost-first**; everything downstream keys on one **item identity**, which the per-site spreadsheet can't provide. **U1 builds that item master тАФ read-only + seeded.** **Migration `20260801000000`:** new enum `item_category` (12 codes) + `catalog_items` (id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit text, stockable, note, is_active, created_at) тАФ reference data, **read-only to authenticated** (RLS enable; revoke anon+authenticated; grant select authenticated; SELECT policy `using(true)`; **no write policy** тЖТ seeded by migration, the `wp_templates` posture spec 142). **Unique identity** index on `(base_item, coalesce(spec_attrs,''))` = the anti-drift guard the sheet lacked. **Seeded 71 deduped items** from the operator's previous-site purchase sheet (`docs/inventory-store/seed-catalog.csv`); **17 `stockable=false`** (made-to-length roofing CC/760+р╕Др╕гр╕нр╕Ъ, fire doors, stainless fab, engineered Aqua tanks тЖТ direct-to-WP, never inventoried). **Units stored as text reusing `COMMON_UNITS`** (spec 16 doctrine: units are client-side text, NOT a DB table тАФ the course-correction from the original two-table design) тАФ normalised р╕Бр╕Б.тЖТр╕Бр╕┤р╣Вр╕ер╕Бр╕гр╕▒р╕б, р╕б.тЖТр╣Ар╕бр╕Хр╕г; non-stock lines (freight/service/VAT/WHT) excluded. **No prices** (price is not item identity; real cost comes from receipts later). **Page `/catalog`:** server component, `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (pm/super/procurement/director тАФ the back-office curators, mirroring the suppliers master), settings drill-down (DetailHeaderтЖТ/settings + BottomTabBar, no HubNav). `CatalogList` (pure presentational) groups by category in **enum order** (iterates the ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL key order), each row base_item┬╖spec┬╖unit + a **р╣Ар╕Бр╣Зр╕Ър╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Б / р╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Хр╕гр╕Зр╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ** badge; empty state. **Labels (SSOT, labels.ts):** `CATALOG_LABEL`=р╕Чр╕░р╣Ар╕Ър╕╡р╕вр╕Щр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕, `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` (12), `CATALOG_STOCKABLE_LABEL`/`CATALOG_NON_STOCKABLE_LABEL`. **Nav:** р╕Чр╕░р╣Ар╕Ър╕╡р╕вр╕Щр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕ door (Package icon) in the procurement block + isManager master-data block of `/settings`; `/catalog` added to the р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ tab `match`. **Tests:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (5: section per present category, **enum order not input order**, item name/spec/unit, stockable badge counts, empty state); pgTAP `119-item-catalog` (10: table/RLS, enum 12-label pin, anon-deny + auth-allow grants, **unique-identity reject (23505)**, seed present + known item + stockable & non-stockable exist). **Three completeness guards updated (the repo's anti-drift net):** `nav-back-affordance` STATIC_DETAIL (classify `catalog`), `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS (new `catalog` domain folder), `bottom-tab-bar` р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ match. **Lessons:** the codebase already had a units vocabulary (`src/lib/purchasing/units.ts`) тАФ reused it as text rather than inventing an `item_units` table (CLAUDE.md: don't swap the established approach); adding a `features/<domain>/` folder trips the `feature-components-structure` allowlist (third anti-drift guard, alongside nav-back-affordance + the tab match). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page тЖТ /login in preview; component unit-pinned, DB pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT (later units):** create/edit catalog items (write RPC); then **Phase 2 тАФ Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Out of scope here: store entity, Stock-In, р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue, custody handshake, sell-rate/margin layer.

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog, U2: add item (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1369 (207 files; +1 TDD: add-catalog-item)** ┬╖ **db:test 122 files / 2322 / 0** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260802000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog operable тАФ back-office adds items in-app (U1 was read-only/seeded). **Migration `20260802000000`:** `create_catalog_item(category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns uuid` тАФ SECURITY DEFINER, role gate `current_user_role() in (project_manager/super_admin/procurement/project_director)` (the BACK_OFFICE set, inline like `apply_wp_template`), trims inputs (empty spec/note тЖТ NULL via `nullif(btrim(coalesce(тАж,'')),'')`), length caps тЖТ `22023`, unique-identity index тЖТ `23505`. **`catalog_items` stays write-locked** (no INSERT grant / no write policy) тАФ the definer RPC is the sole write path (controlled writes for reference data). **`revoke тАж from anon`** explicitly (the Supabase default-privilege EXECUTE-to-anon trap тАФ applies to a fresh CREATE FUNCTION too, not just DROP+CREATE; pgTAP guards it). **Action `src/app/catalog/actions.ts`** `createCatalogItem`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (defense-in-depth + fast bounce), validates category against `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` keys, calls the RPC under the user session, maps `23505`тЖТ"р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╕бр╕╡р╕нр╕вр╕╣р╣Ир╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з" / `42501`тЖТ"р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕┤р╕Чр╕Шр╕┤р╣М", `revalidatePath('/catalog')`. **Typecheck caught** passing `null` to the RPC's `text` args (typegen types them non-null `string`) тЖТ pass the trimmed strings, the RPC nullifies empties. **`AddCatalogItem` ('use client', BottomSheet):** category select, name, spec, **unit picker reusing `COMMON_UNITS` + р╕нр╕╖р╣Ир╕Щ р╣Ж free-text** (`UNIT_OTHER_VALUE`), stockable checkbox (default on), note; submit тЖТ reset + close + `router.refresh`; inline error. Sits above the read-only list on `/catalog`. **Tests:** `add-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: submit-gating, create-with-values+refresh, free-text-unit reveal, inline error); pgTAP `120-create-catalog-item` (11: exists+secdef, anon-deny+auth-allow execute, PM creates+row lands, procurement creates, blankтЖТ22023, dupтЖТ23505, site_admin+visitorтЖТ42501). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page; component unit-pinned, RPC pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT:** U3 edit / deactivate existing items (correct the seed / my U1 calls) тАФ then **Phase 2 Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). Catalog is now create-capable; edit/deactivate + Supply Plan remain.

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog, U3: edit / deactivate (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1373 (208 files; +1 TDD: edit-catalog-item)** ┬╖ **db:test 123 files / 2336 / 0** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260803000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog **correctable** тАФ back-office edits any field or removes an item (so the operator can fix the U1 seed: the screw unit, the stockable flags). **Migration `20260803000000`:** two more controlled-write RPCs (catalog_items stays write-locked тАФ no table grant; the definer RPCs are the sole write path). `update_catalog_item(id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns void` тАФ same back-office gate + trim/validate as create; **unknown id тЖТ `22023`** (`get diagnostics row_count`), **duplicate identity тЖТ `23505`** (the unique index). `set_catalog_item_active(id, active) returns void` тАФ **soft delete / restore** (`is_active`; the /catalog list shows active only, so deactivate = removal but reversible). Both `revoke тАж from anon` (default-priv trap). **Refactor (behaviour-preserving):** the U2 `AddCatalogItem` field set extracted to **`CatalogItemForm`** shared by add + edit (so the two never drift); a seeded unit not in `COMMON_UNITS` (р╕зр╕З/р╕Эр╕▓/р╕Хр╕╣р╣Й) opens as the free-text "other" so an edit preserves it. **`EditCatalogItem` ('use client'):** per-row "р╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В" тЖТ BottomSheet pre-filled тЖТ save (`updateCatalogItem`) or "р╣Ар╕нр╕▓р╕нр╕нр╕Б" (`setCatalogItemActive` false). **Injected into each `CatalogList` row via an optional `renderRowAction` render-prop from the page** тАФ deliberately so the list module stays free of client-action imports (importing the `"use server"` actions file, which has `import "server-only"`, into the U1 list test would throw; the page тАФ a server component тАФ renders the client edit control instead). **Actions** `updateCatalogItem` / `setCatalogItemActive`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, map `23505`/`42501`/`22023`, `revalidatePath`. **Tests:** `edit-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: pre-fill, save+refresh, deactivate+refresh, inline error); pgTAP `121-edit-catalog-item` (14). **The U2 add test + U1 list test stay green** (the form extraction preserved AddCatalogItem's output; renderRowAction defaults off). **Lesson:** a server component CAN pass a render-prop function to another server component (no client boundary) тАФ the clean way to inject a client control per row without dragging server-action imports into a presentational list. **Verified-by-checklist.** **NEXT:** Phase 2 тАФ the **Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Catalog is now full CRUD-lite (create/edit/deactivate); read + write complete for the item master.

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog, U4: item image (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1376 (209 files; +1 TDD: catalog-image-control)** ┬╖ **db:test 124 files / 2346 / 0** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260804000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: "add images to the existing list." One reference photo per item тАФ thumbnail in the list + on the edit sheet. **Migration `20260804000000`:** private **`catalog-images`** bucket (25 MiB, image MIME) + a back-office INSERT policy on `storage.objects` (`current_user_role() in pm/super/procurement/director`); **NO SELECT policy** тАФ reads via service-role signed URLs (the photos-bucket posture spec 02/03). `catalog_items.image_path text` (**inherits the table-level SELECT grant** тАФ no column-grant trap, unlike `projects`). `set_catalog_item_image(id, path) returns void` тАФ back-office gate, null clears, unknown id тЖТ `22023`, `revoke тАж from anon`. **`CatalogImageControl` ('use client'):** pick тЖТ **reuse spec-34 `preparePhotoForUpload`** (client downscale, JPEG 0.8, EXIF baked) тЖТ upload to `catalog-images` at `{itemId}/{crypto.randomUUID()}.{ext}` via the **browser** supabase client (the INSERT policy gates it) тЖТ `setCatalogItemImage` records the path тЖТ `router.refresh`. Replace + remove; **old objects retained on replace** (keep-originals doctrine [[ai-driven-direction-keep-images]]). Mounted on the `EditCatalogItem` sheet (image attaches on EDIT тАФ the item must exist for its storage path; matches "existing list"). **Display:** the page mints 120s signed URLs via **`mintSignedUrls(CATALOG_IMAGES_BUCKET, тАж)`** (spec-65 shared core) for items with `image_path` тЖТ `thumbnailUrl` on `CatalogItem` тЖТ `CatalogList` renders a 40px thumbnail; placeholder icon when empty. **Actions** `setCatalogItemImage`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, empty path тЖТ clear, map `42501`/`22023`. **Tests:** `catalog-image-control.test.tsx` (3: downscaleтЖТuploadтЖТrecordтЖТrefresh w/ path `^{id}/тАж\.jpeg$`, removeтЖТnull, reject-non-image) + pgTAP `122-catalog-item-image` (10). **`<img>` for signed URLs** (same as `ZoomablePhoto`) with an eslint-disable for `@next/next/no-img-element`. **Typecheck caught** `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`: pass `item.thumbnailUrl ?? null` (optional field тЖТ can't hand an explicit `undefined` to a `?: string | null` prop). **Verified-by-checklist** (browser-upload seam is review/operator-phone verified per spec-34 precedent; control unit-pinned, RPC+bucket pgTAP'd). **Decision:** single current image (Option A) + retained old blobs honours keep-images without an append-only table; a `catalog_item_images` history table stays an additive later option. **NEXT:** Phase 2 тАФ the **Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). The item master is now view/add/edit/deactivate/image тАФ feature-complete as a catalog.

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog, U5: consistent image slot + remove bad images (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1378 (209 files; +2: catalog-list placeholder)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. App-only тАФ **no migration / no DB schema change**. Operator feedback on the U4 image batch: "the images are not related, remove or change them" + "always put image placeholders, so the list is consistent." **(a) Removed the 8 auto-sourced CC images** тАФ `update catalog_items set image_path = null` (via `db query`) + deleted the bucket objects (`supabase storage rm --experimental --yes "ss:///catalog-images/<id>/web1.jpg"` тАФ **rm prompts `[y/N]`; the non-interactive shell defaults to N, so `--yes` is required**); deleted the now-stale `docs/inventory-store/image-credits.md`. The Openverse-sourced photos were generic representatives, not the actual items тАФ no reliable way to verify relevance without vision, so removed rather than re-guessed; operator adds real photos via р╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В. **(b) `CatalogList` always renders a 40px image slot** тАФ the thumbnail when `thumbnailUrl` present, else a placeholder (`role="img" aria-label="р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕гр╕╣р╕Ыр╕ар╕▓р╕Ю"` box + `ImageIcon`) тАФ so every row aligns regardless of whether an item has a photo (was: nothing rendered for imageless items тЖТ ragged rows). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+2: N placeholders for N imageless fixture rows; thumbnail-img-present + no-placeholder when an item has an image; the real `<img alt="">` is decorative so it's out of the a11y tree, leaving the placeholder the only `role=img` тАФ that's what the test keys on). **Lesson (image ops):** sourcing images programmatically without vision is unreliable for relevance тАФ prefer operator-supplied photos; the auto-source was a miss. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 175 тАФ item catalog, U6: category filter (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1381 (209 files; +3: catalog-list filter)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. App-only тАФ **no migration / no DB change**. Operator: "since we already grouped by category, allow users to select category first" (+ "All" is an option). **`CatalogList` converted from a server component to `'use client'`** to hold the filter selection. Renders a `RadioChip` row (the spec-67 primitive тАФ native sr-only radio, 44px target, token active fill): **`р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф (N)`** default (the full grouped overview) + a chip per **present** category (empty categories get no chip) with its item count; selecting one filters to that single section. **Architectural ripple:** because the list is now a client component, the per-row **`EditCatalogItem`** control (U3) **moved INSIDE `CatalogList`** behind an `editable` prop тАФ the U3 `renderRowAction` function-prop can't cross the serverтЖТclient boundary (spec-109 lesson: functions don't serialize serverтЖТclient). The page drops `renderRowAction` + its `EditCatalogItem` import and passes `<CatalogList items={тАж} editable />` (data only). The catalog-list test now mocks `@/app/catalog/actions` + `next/navigation` (CatalogList's module graph reaches the "use server" actions via EditCatalogItem). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+3: р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф + chip-per-present-category, no chip for empty; select-category shows only its items; р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф restores all). **Lesson:** adding client state (a filter) to a presentational server list forces it client тЖТ fold any server-injected render-props into data-only props. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 176 тАФ Supply Plan (PM-accuracy engine), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ `pnpm build` green ┬╖ **db:test 125 files / 2365 / 0** (file 176, 19 asserts); db:push applied `20260805000000`; db:types regenerated (+123). The start of Phase 2 тАФ the operator's stated purpose for the on-site store: measure **PM planning accuracy** (plan materials up front тЖТ frozen baseline тЖТ compare to actual/reactive). Sits on the catalog (spec 175): plan lines reference `catalog_items`. **Migration `20260805000000`:** enum `supply_plan_status` (draft/submitted/approved/rejected); **`supply_plans`** (id, project_id **unique тАФ one plan/project**, status, note, created_by `default auth.uid()`, created/submitted/approved stamps); **`supply_plan_lines`** (supply_plan_id, catalog_item_id, **nullable** work_package_id = site-general, qty `numeric(12,2)` CHECK>0, note) + **unique `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))`**. **RLS:** both READ via `can_see_project` (ADR 0056 тАФ super/director/coordinator see-all, PM/SA by membership; `can_see_project` from migration 20260728); **no write policy** тАФ definer RPCs are the sole write path (catalog/deliverables posture). **RPCs (planner tier pm/super/director, incl. project_director per the spec-152 lesson):** `create_supply_plan(project)` тАФ **get-or-create** (idempotent), role + `can_see_project` membership + project-exists (22023); `add_supply_plan_line(plan, item, wp, qty, note)` тАФ **draft-only** (frozen plan тЖТ 22023), qty>0, item exists+active, WP-belongs-to-plan-project, dup (item,WP) тЖТ 23505. **pgTAP `176-supply-plan` (19):** structure + anon-deny; create idempotent; add returns id; qtyтЙд0 / WP-other-project / inactive-item / dup / frozen-plan rejected; non-member PM + visitor тЖТ 42501; super unknown-project тЖТ 22023. **DB-only foundation** тАФ no app surface (verified by pgTAP). **Decisions made (flagged in the spec for operator review before U2/U3):** one-plan-per-project (no versioning yet); no price/ETA in the plan (PM intent only; price lives in procurement execution later); proposed reactive reason-code taxonomy (unplanned-miss/rework/breakage/scope-change/unforeseeable). **Lesson reused:** project-scoped child = READ via `can_see_project`, WRITE via role+membership definer RPC; always include `project_director` in the planner gate. **NEXT:** U2 planning UI (PM picks catalog items + WP + qty), then U3 submit+PD-approve (freeze).

## Spec 176 тАФ Supply Plan, U2: planning screen (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1386 (210 files; +4: supply-plan-manager)** ┬╖ **db:test 126 files / 2374 / 0** (file 177, 9 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260806000000`; db:types regenerated. The PM-facing planning screen тАФ first VISIBLE Supply Plan surface. **Migration `20260806`:** `remove_supply_plan_line(line)` тАФ SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier + member, **draft-only** (frozen plan тЖТ 22023), unknown line тЖТ 22023, anon-revoked; the table has no DELETE grant (RPC is sole delete path). **Page `/projects/[projectId]/supply-plan`** (dynamic route тЖТ auto-classified as a detail route by nav-back-affordance; renders DetailHeader backтЖТproject): `requireRole(PM_ROLES)` then project read via RLS (`can_see_project` тЖТ non-member PM gets `notFound`); loads plan + lines (FK-join `catalog_items(base_item,spec_attrs,unit)` + `work_packages(code,name)` тАФ to-one embeds typed as objects, accessed `r.catalog_items?.base_item`) + pickers (active catalog items + project WPs). **`SupplyPlanManager`** ('use client'): status chip (р╕гр╣Ир╕▓р╕З/р╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з/р╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з/р╕Хр╕╡р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ъ); "р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щ" тЖТ BottomSheet (item `<select>` **grouped by category with `<optgroup>`** тАФ first optgroup use in the app, WP `<select>` **required in U2**, qty number, note) тЖТ `addPlanLine`; per-line `Trash2` remove тЖТ `removePlanLine`; **submitted/approved = read-only** (no add/remove). **Actions** `addPlanLine` (get-or-create `create_supply_plan` тЖТ `add_supply_plan_line`) / `removePlanLine`: `getActionUser` + RPC + map `23505`("already planned")/`42501`/`22023` + `revalidatePath(supplyPlanHref)`. **Entry:** a `ClipboardList` chip on the project header (isManagerRole block) тЖТ `supplyPlanHref`. **Feature folder `supply-plan` added to `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS** (the 4th anti-drift guard hit this session). **Decision:** U2 form **requires a WP** per line (the core qty-per-WP case) тАФ avoids the nullable-uuid RPC-arg typing issue (a non-null `uuid` arg types as non-null `string`); site-general (null WP) stays schema-supported for a later "р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г" option. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (4) + pgTAP 177 (9). **NEXT:** U3 submit + PD approve/reject (freeze the baseline), then U4 reactive reason codes, U5 measurement.

## Spec 176 тАФ Supply Plan, U3: submit + PD approve/reject (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1388 (210 files; +2: supply-plan-manager lifecycle)** ┬╖ **db:test 127 files / 2391 / 0** (file 178, 17 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260807000000`; db:types regenerated (+3). The plan lifecycle + freeze. **Lifecycle:** `draft тЖТ(PM submit)тЖТ submitted тЖТ(PD approve)тЖТ approved [FROZEN]` / `тЖТ(PD reject)тЖТ rejected тЖТ(PM revises+resubmits)`. **Separation of duties:** planner tier (pm/super/director) SUBMITS; only the approver tier (`project_director`/`super_admin`) APPROVES/REJECTS тАФ a plain PM cannot approve its own plan (pgTAP-pinned: PM approve тЖТ 42501). **Migration `20260807`:** `submit_supply_plan` (planner; draft|rejectedтЖТsubmitted, sets submitted_at), `approve_supply_plan` (PD/super; submittedтЖТapproved, sets approved_by/at), `reject_supply_plan` (PD/super; submittedтЖТrejected); all SECURITY DEFINER + `can_see_project` + status-guard (wrong status тЖТ 22023), anon-revoked. **CREATE OR REPLACE `add_supply_plan_line` + `remove_supply_plan_line`** to widen the edit gate `draft тЖТ draft|rejected` (a rejected plan is revisable) тАФ same signatures so grants preserved (anon stays revoked; no pgTAP signature-pin break). **`SupplyPlanManager`:** `editable` includes `rejected`; header action group by state/role тАФ **р╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤** (planner, draft/rejected), **р╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤/р╕Хр╕╡р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ъ** (approver, submitted), **р╕гр╕нр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤** text (non-approver, submitted), frozen when approved. Page passes `planId` + `canApprove` (`ctx.role` director/super). **Actions** `submitPlan`/`approvePlan`/`rejectPlan`: getActionUser + RPC + map 42501/22023 + revalidatePath. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (+3: submit, approve+reject, non-approver read-only) + pgTAP `178-supply-plan-lifecycle` (17: submit/approve/reject transitions, PMтЙаapprover 42501, approved-frozen, rejected-editable-again, wrong-status 22023, visitor 42501). **NEXT:** U4 reactive-PR reason codes (tag scramble-orders; `unplanned-miss` dings PM), U5 measurement (planned vs reactive).

## Spec 176 тАФ Supply Plan, U4: reactive-PR reason codes (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 212 files / 1399 (+53: reason-code validators + 2 form tests + reason-module pins)** ┬╖ **db:test 128 files / 2406 / 0** (file 179, 16 asserts; file 33 + 91 updated) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000000` + `20260808000100`; db:types regenerated. Operator-locked (AskUserQuestion): (1) the 5-code taxonomy `unplanned_miss`/`rework`/`breakage`/`scope_change`/`unforeseeable` тАФ **only `unplanned_miss` counts against the PM**; (2) **required on every PR**; (3) **both create paths** (the `/requests` form + the WP-detail on-site quick-record). **Design (spec 176 ┬зU4):** new enum `purchase_request_reason_code` + nullable `purchase_requests.reason_code` (NO default тАФ legacy rows stay null = pre-feature/unscored; required-ness on the WRITE paths, not a column NOT NULL or DB CHECK тАФ matches the `priority`/`needed_by` requester-field posture, ADR 0026); additive `grant insert (reason_code)` (column-scoped grant, spec 33); **insert RLS untouched** (pins 70/73/91/115 + the 64 owner-role fixtures stay green). Form path: `validateCreatePurchaseRequest` gains a required `reasonCode` (checked LAST so existing earlier-field error cases keep their message) + `createPurchaseRequest` inserts `reason_code` + a required reason `<select>` on `PurchaseRequestForm`. Site path: `validateSitePurchase` + `recordSitePurchase` + a required reason `<select>` on `SitePurchaseForm`. Shared `src/lib/purchasing/reason-code.ts` (type + list + guard) + `PURCHASE_REQUEST_REASON_CODE_LABEL` (р╕зр╕▓р╕Зр╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Хр╕Бр╕лр╕ер╣Ир╕Щ/р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╣Бр╕Бр╣Йр╣Др╕В/р╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Кр╕│р╕гр╕╕р╕Ф┬╖р╣Ар╕кр╕╡р╕вр╕лр╕▓р╕в/р╕Вр╕нр╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╕Хр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╣Ар╕Ыр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕вр╕Щ/р╣Ар╕лр╕Хр╕╕р╕кр╕╕р╕Фр╕зр╕┤р╕кр╕▒р╕в). **Out of scope (тЖТU5):** card/list display + planned-vs-reactive aggregation (the column carries the tag for U5 to read). **Migrations split into TWO:** `20260808000000` = enum + column + insert grant; `20260808000100` = `record_site_purchase` DROP+CREATE. **TWO traps caught by db:push/db:test + fixed forward тЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **OVERLOAD** тАФ I sourced the RPC body from migration file `20260630000100` (5-arg) but the LIVE function was the **7-arg VAT version** (`20260701000200` added `p_vat_rate`); my first `record_site_purchase` create made a vat-LESS duplicate (would regress VAT) instead of replacing it. Fix: drop the real `(тАж,numeric,numeric)` + create the **7-arg** `(uuid,text,numeric,text,reason_code,numeric,numeric)` with reason BEFORE the defaulted amount/vat, VAT preserved; queried `pg_proc` to confirm a single signature; made mig 100 self-dropping (drops its own 7-arg too) so a repair+repush is idempotent. (2) **project_director ride-along** тАФ the reconstructed pre-152 body dropped `project_director` from the gate тЖТ **pgTAP file 91** ("no PM-gated RPC left without project_director") went RED; re-added it. Plus a pgTAP UUID hex-length slip in 179 (13-char final group). **The meta-lesson: reconstruct a definer RPC body from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`/`pg_proc`, never an old migration file.** **Tests:** pgTAP 179 + `validate-purchase-request`/`validate-site-purchase` (+reason cases) + `purchase-request-form-reason` + `site-purchase-form-reason`. **NEXT:** U5 measurement (planned `supply_plan_lines` vs reactive `unplanned_miss` PRs, per project/WP/PM тАФ the PM-accuracy number).

## Spec 176 тАФ Supply Plan, U5: measurement (PM-accuracy) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 213 files / 1402 (+3: supply-plan-accuracy)** ┬╖ **db:test 129 files / 2421 / 0** (file 180, 15 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000200`; db:types regenerated. **Spec 176 arc COMPLETE.** The payoff: surface planned vs reactive so the operator sees how well a PM planned. Migration `20260808000200` (808000000/100 were U4), pgTAP `180`. **Design (spec 176 ┬зU5):** PRs carry `work_package_id` + free-text item (no `catalog_item_id`) тЖТ can only measure count-based PER WP (no PRтЖФplan-line item match). **RPC `supply_plan_accuracy(p_project_id)`** SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier (incl. project_director per file-91 pin) + `can_see_project` (unknownтЖТ22023); returns a TABLE one row per WP (or null=site-general) with a plan line OR a PR: `planned_lines`, `planned_qty`, `unplanned_miss`, `fair_reactive` (rework/breakage/scope_change/unforeseeable), `untagged` (null reason). FULL OUTER JOIN of per-WP planned + per-WP PR aggregates (PRsтЖТproject via `work_packages.project_id`), worst-offender first. ALL PR statuses count (status-filter = flagged refinement). **Surface:** read-only `SupplyPlanAccuracy` server component on `/projects/[id]/supply-plan` тАФ project totals (planned ┬╖ unplanned_miss HIGHLIGHTED ┬╖ fair ┬╖ untagged) + per-WP table (site-general = "р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г"). **Per-PM:** per-project number = per-PM-per-project (plan has created_by); cross-project roll-up = flagged follow-up, NOT built. **Tests:** pgTAP 180 + `supply-plan-accuracy.test.tsx`. **Lesson (caught by db:test):** the plan-line unique index is `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))` тЖТ two lines on the SAME WP need TWO catalog items; my first fixture used one item and asserted 2 lines (impossible) тАФ the RPC was correct, the fixture wrong. **Spec 176 (Supply Plan) COMPLETE: U1 data тЖТ U2 planning UI тЖТ U3 submit/approve freeze тЖТ U4 reactive reason codes тЖТ U5 PM-accuracy measure. NEXT (storage arc Phase 3):** store + stock-in at cost (р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ тЖТ store buys from supplier; reuse deliveries spec 135).

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In (р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓) at cost (inventory Phase 3), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 213 files / 1402** (DB-only тАФ no unit-test delta) ┬╖ **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (file 181, 24 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000000`; db:types regenerated. **Phase 3 of the on-site storage/inventory arc** (after spec 175 catalog + spec 176 supply plan). The store is a transfer-pricing BU; this unit puts STOCK ON HAND тАФ goods enter the store, at COST, and the store knows what it holds and what it's worth. **Cost-first staging is a locked dial:** the sell-to-WP margin layer + the flip of `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price + external sales are LATER phases, explicitly NOT this spec. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, all 3 recommended):** (1) **stock-in source = standalone catalog-keyed receipt** тАФ a "store buys catalog item X, qty Y, at unit-cost Z from supplier S" entry keyed on `catalog_item_id`; it does **not** touch the existing PR/PO/delivery flow (whose lines are FREE-TEXT, no catalog link), so zero purchasing-break risk; a future POтЖТstore linkage is flagged. (2) **on-hand = per-project, NO `stores` table** тАФ keyed by `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, the project's on-site store is implicit ("1 unit per site"), RLS rides existing `can_see_project`, issue-to-WP (Phase 4) stays in-project. (3) **moving-avg cost tracked NOW** тАФ `qty_on_hand` + `total_value` тЖТ avg = value/qty (the COST basis, not the sell/margin layer). **Design (spec 177 ┬зU1, DB-only тАФ mirrors the 176-U1 cadence; /store UI is U2):** `stock_receipts` (append-only р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ events: project_id, catalog_item_id, qty>0, **unit snapshotted from the catalog item at receipt**, unit_costтЙе0, **`total_cost` GENERATED `qty*unit_cost`**, nullable supplier_id, received_at, note, created_by тАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal unit per CLAUDE.md append-only doctrine) + `stock_on_hand` (derived, PK `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, qty_on_hand + total_value; moving-avg cost is DERIVED not stored). **RPC `record_stock_in(project, item, qty, unit_cost, supplier, note)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = `BACK_OFFICE_ROLES` (pm/super/procurement/director тАФ the cost-bearing curation tier; documented р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ actor is procurement); membership = `can_see_project(project) OR current_user_role()='procurement'` (procurement is a cross-project curator, mirrors spec 171/172); validates project/active-catalog-item/qty>0/unit_costтЙе0/supplier-exists (all 22023), non-memberтЖТ42501; inserts the receipt + **additively** upserts on-hand (`on conflict тАж do update set qty+=, value+=`) тАФ a pure stock-IN needs no weighted-avg recompute (that's issue-OUT, Phase 4). **READ:** both tables SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` arm (procurement must read what it writes); no write policy тАФ the RPC is the sole writer. **Migration `20260809000000`, pgTAP `181`** (structure + anon-deny, procurement cross-project + PM-member happy paths, moving-avg maths across two receipts at different unit costs тЖТ value 600/qty 20 = avg 30, generated total_cost, unit snapshot, every deny/validation branch). **THREE traps caught + fixed forward:** (1) **bare `current_user_role()` in an RLS policy** тЖТ the "no public policy calls current_user_role() bare" guard pgTAP went RED тАФ Postgres-RLS perf pattern requires `(select public.current_user_role())` (I'd wrapped `can_see_project` but not the role call); fixed both policies (edited the migration file AND applied the wrap live via `supabase db query --file` so file==DB, no noise migration). (2) **`suppliers.created_by` is NOT NULL with no default** тАФ my fixture inserted only (id, name) тЖТ the whole 181 file errored at setup ("not ok - 181"); added created_by. (3) **plan() undercount** тАФ `plan(22)` but 24 asserts ran (miscounted the read-posture section) тЖТ `plan(24)`. **Lesson:** when a fixture row errors, the runner reports the whole file `not ok` with the diagnostic hidden if you grep-filter the output тАФ re-run unfiltered to a file to see the `# ERROR:` line. **Out of scope (flagged):** /store UI (read on-hand + record form) = U2; р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue + two-party custody + weighted-avg-cost decrement = Phase 4; GL posting of stock-in (Dr Inventory/Cr AP into the spec-149 outbox) = later; POтЖТstore linkage (needs catalog_item_id on PR/PO lines first); receipt reversal/correction; required supplier; stock count/variance; SA self-receive (self-governance). **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U2 = the `/store` surface (read on-hand per project + the record-stock-in form, back-office tier).

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U2: the /store surface (read on-hand + record stock-in) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 214 files / 1409 (+7: store-manager)** ┬╖ **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (no new pgTAP file; 181 re-runs green after the function REPLACE) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000100`; db:types regenerated. The screen that drives the U1 engine: a back-office user picks a project, sees its on-hand stock, and records a р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ at cost. **Surface (`/store`, single route, BACK_OFFICE_ROLES, settings drill-down тАФ DetailHeader backтЖТ/settings, no HubNav, mirrors /catalog):** a project `<select>` (RLS-scoped picker тАФ procurement sees all, PM sees member projects; `onChange` тЖТ `router.push('/store?project=<id>')`); the chosen project's on-hand list (item ┬╖ р╕Хр╣Йр╕Щр╕Чр╕╕р╕Щр╣Ар╕Йр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕в avg = value/qty ┬╖ qty+unit ┬╖ value) + a `р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Б` BottomSheet form (catalog item `<optgroup>` by category ┬╖ р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щ ┬╖ р╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Хр╣Йр╕Щр╕Чр╕╕р╕Щ/р╕лр╕Щр╣Ир╕зр╕в ┬╖ optional р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Вр╕▓р╕в ┬╖ р╕лр╕бр╕▓р╕вр╣Ар╕лр╕Хр╕╕) тЖТ `recordStockIn` action. The record UI is gated on a selected project (no project = pick-a-project hint, no form). **`StoreManager`** ('use client': selector navigation, sheet state, submit transition + refresh) in the new `src/components/features/store/` folder. **`recordStockIn` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates uuids/qty>0/unit_costтЙе0, maps the RPC's 42501/22023, `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Labels SSOT:** `STORE_LABEL` (р╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣Мр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ) + `STORE_RECEIVE_LABEL` (р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Б) in `labels.ts`. **Nav:** р╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣Мр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ door (Warehouse icon) in /settings procurement + manager blocks (next to р╕Чр╕░р╣Ар╕Ър╕╡р╕вр╕Щр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕). **Migration `20260809000100`** = CREATE OR REPLACE `record_stock_in` adding `default null` to the two trailing nullable args (p_supplier_id, p_note) тАФ same signature, grants preserved, pgTAP-181 positional calls unaffected. **Updated 3 anti-drift guards (the spec-175 settings-drill-down trio):** nav-back-affordance `STATIC_DETAIL += "store"`, feature-components-structure `ALLOWED_DOMAINS += "store"`, bottom-tab `SETTINGS_TAB.match += "/store"` (no per-role `[label,href]` pin touched тАФ only the match array). **TWO typegen traps caught by typecheck + fixed forward тЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **nullable RPC arg needs `default null`** (the spec-155 lesson, re-learned) тАФ `p_supplier_id` had no default тЖТ generated Args typed it required `string`, so passing a null supplier wouldn't compile; added `default null` (+ trailing `p_note` per Postgres trailing-default rule) via the U2 migration; reconstructed the body from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef` (the U4 rule). (2) **`exactOptionalPropertyTypes` forbids explicit `undefined`** for an optional prop тЖТ can't pass `p_supplier_id: supplierId ?? undefined`; must OMIT the key тАФ conditional spread `...(supplierId !== null ? { p_supplier_id: supplierId } : {})`. **Test (written first, RED proven):** `store-manager.test.tsx` (on-hand rows + derived avg-cost display, empty state, project-selector navigation, submit-gating until item+qty+cost, the recordStockIn call shape, record control hidden until a project is chosen). Self-inflicted test-helper bug fixed: `opts.selectedProjectId ?? "p1"` coerced an explicit `null` to "p1" тЖТ use `=== undefined ?` to distinguish omitted from null. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the page is behind requireRole/LINE auth; no real creds on the cloud PC тАФ spike-02). **Out of scope (unchanged from U1):** р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue + custody (Phase 4), GL posting of stock-in, POтЖТstore linkage, receipt reversal, stock count/variance, SA self-receive, the margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U3 тАФ р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue (issue-out to a WP, weighted-avg-cost decrement, two-party custody handshake), the first OUT flow.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U3: р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue (the first OUT flow), at weighted-avg cost (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 214 files / 1409** (DB-only тАФ no unit-test delta) ┬╖ **db:test 131 files / 2465 / 0** (file 182, 20 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000200`; db:types regenerated. The first OUT flow: a work package draws stock from its project's store; the store issues it OUT at the **moving-average cost** (the COST basis тАФ the sell/margin layer stays locked out). **Design (spec 177 ┬зU3, DB-only тАФ mirrors the U1 cadence; the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б UI is U4):** `stock_issues` (append-only р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **work_package_id NOT NULL** = the WP drawn for, qty>0, **unit snapshot**, **unit_cost = moving-avg at issue**, **`total_cost` GENERATED**, note, issued_by, issued_at тАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal). **RPC `issue_stock(project, item, wp, qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin draws at the WP + the PM tier тАФ **NOT procurement**, which does р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ IN not р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б OUT тАФ the gate that differs from U1/U2) + `can_see_project`; validates qty>0 / WP-in-project / active-catalog-item / **sufficient on-hand** (all 22023), non-memberтЖТ42501; **locks the on-hand row (`for update`)**, computes `avg = round(total_value/qty_on_hand, 2)`, decrements `qty_on_hand -= qty` and `total_value -= qty*avg` тАФ **fully depleting forces total_value to 0** so rounding dust never lingers тАФ and writes the issue at the snapshot avg cost. **READ:** `stock_issues` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (consistent with receipts/on-hand; policy uses the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` тАФ the U1 guard lesson applied up front). **Migration `20260809000200`, pgTAP `182`** (structure + anon-deny; site_admin issues 5 of 20@avg30 тЖТ on-hand 15 / value 450, issue unit_cost 30 / total_cost 150; issue the remaining 15 тЖТ qty 0 / value forced 0; insufficient-stock 22023; PM-member issues a 2nd item; qtyтЙд0 + WP-from-another-project 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads 3 issues, outsider 0). **Clean first push тАФ no traps** (the U1/U2 lessons preempted them: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б UI (a button on the WP detail and/or /store) = **U4**; **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = later; **wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`** (the WP material cost = at-issue cost) = the cost-attribution/margin layer, deliberately deferred; equipment round-trip return; receipt/issue reversal; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U4 тАФ the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б UI (issue-out from the WP detail / store), then the two-party custody handshake.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U4: the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б UI on /store (issue-out + recent issues) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 214 files / 1414 (+5: store-manager р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б cases)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (the `issue_stock` RPC + `stock_issues` table shipped in U3; types already regenerated) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The first UI for the OUT flow: the U3 `issue_stock` engine now has a button. **Surface choice:** put р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б on the **existing `/store` console** (reuses U2's per-project on-hand) тАФ /store becomes a complete store console (see on-hand ┬╖ р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ ┬╖ р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б) with the least new code. **Gate:** the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б control shows only for the **manager tier** (`isManagerRole` = PM/super/director) тАФ the intersection of `/store` access (BACK_OFFICE) and the `issue_stock` gate (SITE_STAFF); **procurement reaches /store but cannot issue** (button hidden), and **site_admin can issue per the RPC but isn't on /store** тЖТ its field-draw UI at the WP detail is **U5** (flagged). **Design:** each on-hand row gets a `р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б` button тЖТ a BottomSheet pre-scoped to THAT item (shows "р╕бр╕╡р╣Гр╕Щр╕бр╕╖р╕н N unit") with a WP `<select>` (the project's WPs) + qty + note тЖТ `issueStock` action тЖТ `issue_stock` RPC тЖТ refresh. Below on-hand, a read-only **р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕ер╣Ир╕▓р╕кр╕╕р╕Ф** list (last 10 issues: item ┬╖ WP ┬╖ at-issue cost ┬╖ qty). **`StoreManager`** gains `canIssue` / `workPackages` / `issues` props + the issue-sheet state (a second `useTransition`); the page computes `canIssue`, fetches the project's WPs + the recent `stock_issues` (joined to catalog_items + work_packages). **`issueStock` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates the 3 uuids + qty>0, maps the RPC's 42501 тЖТ no-permission and 22023 тЖТ "р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Бр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Юр╕н р╕лр╕гр╕╖р╕нр╕Вр╣Йр╕нр╕бр╕╣р╕ер╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Хр╣Йр╕нр╕З" (covers insufficient stock / wrong-project WP / inactive item), `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Label:** `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` (р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕нр╕нр╕Б) in `labels.ts`. **No new anti-drift guards** (the `/store` route + the `store` component folder were already registered in U2; no migration, no nav change). **Test (written first, RED proven тАФ 4 failed/7 passed before, 11/11 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` gains the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б describe (no control when `!canIssue`, a control per row when `canIssue`, issuing the row's item to the chosen WP+qty calls `issueStock`, submit gating on WP+qty, the recent-issues list renders). The two sheets share a `р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щ` label but never collide тАФ `BottomSheet` returns null when closed (verified), so only the open sheet's labels are in the DOM. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (page behind requireRole/LINE auth). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U5 = the site_admin field-draw UI at the WP detail** (the doctrine's primary drawer); the two-party custody handshake; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U5 тАФ р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б at the WP detail for site_admin (field self-service), then the custody handshake.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U5: р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б at the WP detail (site_admin field-draw) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 215 files / 1419 (+5: wp-issue-stock)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U3 `issue_stock` RPC + the U4 `issueStock` action) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The doctrine's PRIMARY drawer: a site_admin draws stock from the project store TO the WP they're standing in тАФ at the WP detail screen, not /store (site_admin has no /store access). **Surface:** a р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б block in the **р╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н tab** of the WP detail (`src/app/projects/[projectId]/work-packages/[workPackageId]/page.tsx`), rendered in a CARD right after the р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Бр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ (site-purchase) block тАФ both gated `!readOnly` (= SITE_STAFF, which is exactly the `issue_stock` gate; **procurement is the read-only viewer тЖТ no р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б**, mirroring site-purchase). **New component `WpIssueStock`** (`src/components/features/store/wp-issue-stock.tsx`, 'use client'): a `р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М` button тЖТ BottomSheet (item `<select>` from the project's on-hand showing "р╕бр╕╡ N unit", qty, note) тЖТ `issueStock({project, item, **this WP**, qty, note})` тЖТ `router.refresh()`; empty store тЖТ "р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕Хр╣Кр╕нр╕Бр╣Гр╕Щр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М" + no button; below it, this WP's recent р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б list. **Page wiring:** the project's `stock_on_hand` (qty>0, joined to catalog_items) + this WP's `stock_issues` (last 10) ride the existing `loadWorkPackageDetail` Promise.all (no waterfall). **Simplification (typecheck-driven):** dropped a `readOnly`-conditional on the FETCH (the typed-empty `Promise.resolve` placeholders fought the PostgREST embed union) тАФ procurement may READ on-hand via RLS anyway (no leak), so always fetch and gate only the RENDER by `!readOnly`. **Consistency:** the WP р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б reuses the U4 buttonтЖТsheet UX + the same `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` / `issueStock` action тАФ one р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б mechanism, two entry points (/store for managers, WP detail for the field). **No new guards/migration/nav** (the `store` component folder + the WP route already registered; no new route). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (offers a control when the store has stock, empty-state + no control when empty, issuing the chosen item to THIS WP calls `issueStock`, submit gating on item+qty, the recent-issues list renders). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/Issue now has BOTH surfaces** тАФ the manager console (/store, U4) and the field self-service (WP detail, U5). **Out of scope (flagged):** the **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = next; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** the two-party custody handshake on р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б (who holds the item), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U6: two-party custody handshake on р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 215 files / 1419** (DB-only тАФ no unit delta) ┬╖ **db:test 132 files / 2483 / 0** (file 183, 18 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000300`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance custody layer: every issued item gets exactly one custodian so "who lost it" is always answerable; shrinkage = a store P&L hit. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, both recommended):** (1) **issue now, receiver confirms after** тАФ keep р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б as it is (stock decrements immediately, recorded by the keeper) + name a RECEIVER who later attests receipt; smallest change to the shipped issue flow. (2) **the receiver is a WORKER** (the team member who physically takes the material тАФ the self-governance actor; confirms via the worker portal). **Design (spec 177 ┬зU6, DB-only; the receiver-picker at р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б + the portal confirm UI are U7):** `stock_issues` gains `receiver_worker_id` (FK workers, nullable тАФ legacy + the /store-manager path have none) + `received_at` (null = pending receipt, the audit flag). **`issue_stock` widened** with a trailing `p_receiver_worker_id default null` (DROP the 5-arg + CREATE the 6-arg = ONE overload, body reconstructed verbatim from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`; the 5-positional callers тАФ pgTAP + the issueStock action тАФ still resolve here, receiver defaulting null); validates a named receiver is an **active worker on this project (or unassigned)** (22023). **New `confirm_stock_issue(issue)`** SECURITY DEFINER: the NAMED receiver worker attests тАФ `current_user_worker_id()` (the portal binding) must equal the issue's `receiver_worker_id`; sets `received_at`; non-workerтЖТ42501, unknown/no-receiver/already-confirmedтЖТ22023, wrong-workerтЖТ42501. **RLS:** `stock_issues` SELECT gains a `receiver_worker_id = (select current_user_worker_id())` arm so the worker portal can list their issues. **Migration `20260809000300`, pgTAP `183`.** **TWO traps caught by db:test + fixed forward тЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **the issue_stock signature change broke pgTAP 182's structure pin** тАФ 182 asserted the 5-arg `issue_stock(uuid,uuid,uuid,numeric,text)` exists (`to_regprocedure` + `has_function_privilege`), which after the DROP returns null / errors on a non-existent function; updated 182's two pins to the 6-arg signature (the behavioral 5-positional calls still resolve, untouched). The meta-lesson: **widening an RPC's arity = grep every pgTAP file pinning the old signature.** (2) **a non-receiver worker can't READ the target issue via RLS**, so my first test passed the issue id through an RLS-scoped subquery тЖТ it resolved to NULL тЖТ `confirm_stock_issue(null)` raised 22023 (unknown), not the intended 42501 (receiver-mismatch); fixed by inserting the issue with a FIXED id and passing that literal (the definer RPC sees it and enforces the receiver-only rule). Plus an infra note: the remote pooler threw a transient `ECIRCUITBREAKER` on one file mid-suite (heavy DB traffic) тАФ re-ran clean. **Out of scope (flagged):** **U7 = the custody UI** (pick a receiver worker when р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б'ing at the WP detail + the worker-portal "р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з" confirm + a pending-receipt indicator); a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U7 тАФ the custody UI (receiver picker + portal confirm), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U7: custody UI тАФ receiver picker + pending/received badge (2026-06-22)

Status: **U7 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 215 files / 1423 (+4: wp-issue-stock receiver/badge + store-manager badge)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `issue_stock` 6-arg + `stock_issues.receiver_worker_id`/`received_at`) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The ISSUE side of the custody handshake gets a UI: name a receiver when р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б'ing, and see pending-vs-received status. **Scope:** the receiver picker lives on the **WP-detail р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б** (`WpIssueStock`, the field surface where hand-over to a worker physically happens); the pending/received **badge** shows on BOTH recent-issues lists (/store + WP detail). The **/store-manager receiver picker is deferred** (managers allocate stock to a WP; the on-site receiver is the field's job) and the **worker-portal "р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з" confirm is U8**. **Design:** `WpIssueStock` gains a `workers` prop + a `р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ (р╕Цр╣Йр╕▓р╕бр╕╡)` `<select>` (the project's active workers) in the р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б sheet тЖТ `issueStock` passes `receiverWorkerId` (conditional spread тАФ omit when none, the supplier/exactOptionalPropertyTypes pattern); `WpIssueRow`/`IssueRow` gain `receiverName`/`receivedAt` (+ `receiverWorkerId` on the /store row) and each list renders a badge тАФ `р╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ` (text-ink-muted) vs `р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з` (text-action), shown only when a receiver was named (the manager path leaves it null = no badge). **Page wiring:** the WP-detail page fetches the project's active workers (`workers` where project_id + active тАФ site_admin reads them via the "workers readable by staff" RLS policy; the labour fetch already uses the RLS client) on the existing Promise.all, builds an idтЖТname map, and resolves `receiverName` from it (no fragile PostgREST embed); both pages add `receiver_worker_id, received_at` to the `stock_issues` select. **`issueStock` action** gains an optional `receiverWorkerId` тЖТ `p_receiver_worker_id` (omit-key conditional spread). **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (everything rides the U6 schema + existing routes). **Tests (written first, RED proven тАФ 4 failed/16 passed before, 20/20 after):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (the receiver select тЖТ `issueStock` called with `receiverWorkerId`; the pending/received badges + receiver name) + `store-manager.test.tsx` (the /store list badges pending vs received). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** **U8 = the worker-portal confirm** (`/portal` lists a worker's pending issues + a `р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з` button тЖТ a `confirmStockIssue` action calling the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC); the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; stock count/variance; reversals. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U8 тАФ the worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U8: worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U8 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1426 (+3: portal-receipts)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC + the receiver-read RLS arm) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. **The custody loop is now closed:** the receiver worker attests receipt from their own portal, flipping the issue `р╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ тЖТ р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з`. **Design:** the `/portal` worker branch (when `get_my_worker_profile` returns a bound worker) gains a **р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ** section, placed FIRST in the body (the actionable surface). It fetches the worker's pending issues тАФ `stock_issues` where `received_at is null`, joined to catalog_items + work_packages тАФ on the existing Promise.all; **the U6 receiver-read RLS arm scopes this to the bound worker's own issues** (a worker is not a project member, so the policy returns only rows where `receiver_worker_id = current_user_worker_id()`), so no explicit worker filter is needed. **New `PortalReceipts`** client component (`src/components/features/portal/portal-receipts.tsx`): each pending item (name ┬╖ spec ┬╖ WP ┬╖ qty) with a `р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з` button тЖТ `confirmStockIssue` тЖТ `router.refresh()`; empty тЖТ `р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ`; a per-row submitting state + an inline error. **New `confirmStockIssue(issueId)` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) calls the `confirm_stock_issue` RPC, maps 42501 (not the named receiver) тЖТ "р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕┤р╕Чр╕Шр╕┤р╣Мр╕вр╕╖р╕Щр╕вр╕▒р╕Щр╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Щр╕╡р╣Й" and 22023 (already confirmed / unknown) тЖТ a friendly message, `revalidatePath('/portal')`. **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (the `portal` component folder + the route already registered). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `portal-receipts.test.tsx` (lists pending items, empty state, the `confirmStockIssue` call shape on р╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з). **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the worker portal needs a portal-bound worker login). **CUSTODY HANDSHAKE COMPLETE end-to-end:** U6 engine тЖТ U7 issuer names a receiver + status badge тЖТ U8 receiver confirms on the portal. An unconfirmed issue stays `р╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ` = the audit flag ("who holds it"). **Out of scope (flagged):** the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override (when a worker has no portal login); wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** stock count / variance (physical count vs on-hand тЖТ shrinkage adjustment), then reversals.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U9: stock count / variance (shrinkage) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U9 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1426** (DB-only тАФ no unit delta) ┬╖ **db:test 133 files / 2502 / 0** (file 184, 19 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000400`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance shrinkage mechanism: a physical count reconciles on-hand to reality, and the variance valued at cost is the store-BU P&L hit. **Design (spec 177 ┬зU9, DB-only; the count UI is U10):** `stock_counts` (append-only physical-count events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **system_qty snapshot**, counted_qtyтЙе0, **unit + unit_cost snapshot** (the moving-avg at count), **GENERATED `variance` = counted тИТ system** and **`variance_value` = (counted тИТ system) ├Ч unit_cost** тАФ both generated from plain columns only, no generated-from-generated chain; note, counted_by тАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy; a wrong count is corrected by a fresh count). **RPC `record_stock_count(project, item, counted_qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin keeps the physical store + the PM tier тАФ NOT procurement) + `can_see_project`; `counted_qty >= 0` (22023); **locks the on-hand row тАФ counting is limited to items the store already tracks** (no on-hand row тЖТ 22023 "not stocked"; cataloguing found-untracked stock is a р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓, not a count); snapshots the unit (even a DEACTIVATED-but-still-on-hand item counts), computes `avg = round(value/qty, 2)` (the unchanged cost basis тАФ a count adjusts QUANTITY not unit cost), logs the count, and **reconciles on-hand to the counted truth** (`qty_on_hand = counted`, `total_value = round(counted ├Ч avg, 2)`). **READ:** `stock_counts` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` from the start). **Migration `20260809000400`, pgTAP `184`** (structure + anon-deny; count DOWN 100тЖТ90 тЖТ on-hand 90/value 900, variance тИТ10 / variance_value тИТ100 / system_qty 100; count UP 90тЖТ95; count to ZERO тЖТ value 0; unstocked-item + negative-qty 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads the count history). **Clean first push тАФ no traps** (the prior units' lessons held: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U10 = the count UI** (a р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ action per on-hand row on /store тЖТ counted-qty form тЖТ `record_stock_count`, showing the variance); reversals of receipt/issue; found-untracked-stock costing; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U10 тАФ the count UI (р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ on /store), then reversals.

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U10: the count UI (р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ on /store) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U10 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1430 (+4: store-manager count)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U9 `record_stock_count` RPC) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The U9 count engine gets its UI: count an item, see the variance, reconcile on-hand. **Surface:** each on-hand row on `/store` gets a `р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ` button (alongside `р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б`), gated to the **manager tier** (`canIssue` = isManagerRole = PM/super/director тАФ the /store-access тИй `record_stock_count`-gate set; procurement on /store can't count, site_admin keeps the physical store but has no /store access тЖТ a **site_admin store-count surface is flagged** like the U5 field-р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б gap, but counting is store-wide with no per-WP analog) тЖТ a BottomSheet pre-scoped to that item: shows "р╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ър╕бр╕╡ N unit", a **р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щр╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╣Др╕Фр╣Й** input with a **live variance preview** (`р╕кр╣Ир╕зр╕Щр╕Хр╣Ир╕▓р╕З ┬▒N (р╕Вр╕▓р╕Ф/р╣Ар╕Бр╕┤р╕Щ/р╕Хр╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▒р╕Щ)`, colored text-danger/text-action/text-ink-muted), + note тЖТ `recordStockCount` тЖТ refresh. **`StoreManager`** gains the count-sheet state (a third `useTransition`) + the per-row button; **`recordStockCount` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates uuids + `countedQty >= 0`, maps the RPC's 42501 тЖТ no-permission and 22023 тЖТ "р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ър╣Др╕Фр╣Йр╣Ар╕Йр╕Юр╕▓р╕░р╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╣Гр╕Щр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М р╕лр╕гр╕╖р╕нр╕Вр╣Йр╕нр╕бр╕╣р╕ер╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Хр╣Йр╕нр╕З", `revalidatePath('/store')`. **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (rides the U9 RPC + existing /store route). **Test (written first, RED proven тАФ 3 failed/13 passed before, 16/16 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` count describe (the р╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕Ир╕Щр╕▒р╕Ъ control per row + gating, the live variance preview, the `recordStockCount` call shape). Self-inflicted test fix: `getByText(/-2/)` also matched the `PRC-2026-002` project option тЖТ tightened to `/р╕кр╣Ир╕зр╕Щр╕Хр╣Ир╕▓р╕З -2/`. **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** a site_admin store-count surface; a count-history view; reversals of receipt/issue; found-untracked-stock costing; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; the late margin layer; the deferred /store-manager receiver picker + manager confirm-on-behalf. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** reversals (append-only negative receipt/issue correction), then the late margin layer (sell-to-WP per-level, flip `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price тАФ the cost-first dial is still locked).

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U11: reversals (undo a wrong р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ / р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U11 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1430** (DB-only тАФ no unit delta) ┬╖ **db:test 134 files / 2520 / 0** (file 185, 18 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000500`; db:types regenerated. The correction mechanism: a wrong stock movement is undone by an append-only reversal that reverses its on-hand effect тАФ never by editing the original. **Design (spec 177 ┬зU11, DB-only; the reversal UI is U12):** `stock_reversals` (append-only: project_id, catalog_item_id, **a TYPED FK to the reversed `receipt_id` OR `issue_id` тАФ exactly one** per CLAUDE.md's no-mixed-content-reference rule, enforced by a `(receipt_id is not null) <> (issue_id is not null)` CHECK; `qty` + `value_delta` (the on-hand value change applied тАФ negative for a receipt reversal, positive for an issue reversal); note, reversed_by тАФ no UPDATE/DELETE policy). **A partial unique index per FK (`where тАж is not null`) blocks reversing the same movement twice (тЖТ 23505).** **RPC `reverse_stock_receipt(receipt_id, note default null)`** (BACK_OFFICE gate тАФ the р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ audience; membership = `can_see_project OR procurement`): loads the receipt, **locks on-hand and guards `qty_on_hand >= receipt.qty`** (you cannot un-receive stock that has since been issued out тЖТ 22023), inserts the reversal (unique check first), then subtracts `qty` + `total_cost` (depletion тЖТ value 0). **RPC `reverse_stock_issue(issue_id, note default null)`** (SITE_STAFF gate + `can_see_project`): inserts the reversal, then **adds the issue's `qty` + `total_cost` back** to on-hand (no negative risk). **READ:** `stock_reversals` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (wrapped role call). **Migration `20260809000500`, pgTAP `185`** (structure + anon-deny; procurement reverses a 30-receipt тЖТ on-hand 50тЖТ20 / value 500тЖТ200 / value_delta тИТ300; double-reverse тЖТ 23505; a receipt whose qty > on-hand тЖТ 22023; site_admin reverses a 10-issue тЖТ on-hand 20тЖТ30 / value_delta +100; double-reverse issue тЖТ 23505; visitor + non-member denies 42501; member reads the reversal history). **One trap caught by db:test + fixed forward тЖТ [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** the receipt reversal checked the on-hand guard (`qty >= receipt.qty`) BEFORE the insert, so a double-reverse тАФ where the first reversal already dropped on-hand below the receipt qty тАФ raised 22023 (guard) instead of the intended 23505 (unique).
