Fix: **do the unique insert FIRST**, then the on-hand guard (a failed guard still rolls the insert back since the whole RPC call aborts atomically); applied live via `CREATE OR REPLACE` + edited the migration file (file==live). Lesson: **when an RPC has both a uniqueness constraint and a state guard, attempt the unique write before the state check** so the "already done" error wins over the "state changed" error. **Out of scope (flagged):** **U12 = the reversal UI** (a р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г button on the recent-receipts/issues lists тЖТ `reverse_stock_receipt`/`reverse_stock_issue`, with a confirm); the custody implication of reversing a CONFIRMED issue (the material returns after the worker attested тАФ allowed as a correction, surfaced later); intervening-activity makes a receipt reversal's avg approximate (exact for the immediate-mistake case); the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U12 тАФ the reversal UI, then the late margin layer (needs an operator decision тАФ it rewires `wp_profit`).

## Spec 177 тАФ Store + Stock-In, U12: the reversal UI (р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г on /store) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U12 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1435 (+5: store-manager reversal)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U11 `reverse_stock_receipt` / `reverse_stock_issue` RPCs) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The U11 reversal engine gets its UI: undo a wrong р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓/р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б from /store with a confirm. **Surface:** `/store` gains a **р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕ер╣Ир╕▓р╕кр╕╕р╕Ф** (recent receipts, last 10) list тАФ each row a `р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` control; and the existing **р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕ер╣Ир╕▓р╕кр╕╕р╕Ф** list gains a `р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` control per issue. Both use the **shared `ConfirmActionButton`** (spec 67 тАФ button тЖТ themed ConfirmDialog тЖТ action in a transition тЖТ refresh; replaces window.confirm) with a per-row confirm message ("тАжр╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Ир╕░р╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Хр╕▒р╕Фр╕нр╕нр╕Бр╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М" / "тАжр╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Ир╕░р╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Др╕╖р╕Щр╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М"). **Gates (the key asymmetry):** receipt reversal = `reverse_stock_receipt` gate = **BACK_OFFICE = exactly the /store audience**, so the receipt р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г shows for **every /store user (incl. procurement тАФ it records р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓)**; issue reversal = `reverse_stock_issue` gate = SITE_STAFF тЖТ on /store that is the **manager tier**, so the issue р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г is gated on `canIssue` (procurement can't reverse an issue). **`StoreManager`** gains a `receipts` prop + the two `ConfirmActionButton`s; **`reverseStockReceipt` / `reverseStockIssue` server actions** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) map the RPCs' 42501 / 23505 ("р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕Щр╕╡р╣Йр╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╣Др╕Ыр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з") / 22023 ("р╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Бр╕нр╕нр╕Бр╣Др╕Ыр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╣Др╕Фр╣Й"). **Page:** /store fetches the project's recent `stock_receipts` (last 10, joined catalog_items). **No DB / migration / guards / nav.** **Test (written first, RED proven тАФ 4 failed/17 passed before, 21/21 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` reversal describe (the recent-р╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Ар╕Вр╣Йр╕▓ list + its р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г control for any user; the receipt reversal after confirm тЖТ `reverseStockReceipt`; the issue р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г only when `canIssue`; the issue reversal after confirm тЖТ `reverseStockIssue`). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** reversal controls on the WP-detail issues list (only /store for now); the custody implication of reversing a confirmed issue; the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** the LATE MARGIN LAYER тАФ sell-to-WP at a per-level price, flip `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price. **This is a FORK that needs an operator decision** (it rewires `wp_profit` and unlocks the cost-first dial); bring the design choice via AskUserQuestion before building.

## Spec 178 тАФ Store margin layer (transfer pricing), U1: sell-rate data + setter (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1435** ┬╖ **db:test 135 files / 2534 / 0** (+1 file 186, +14 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000600`; db:types regenerated (app + worker). The BIG FORK resolved: operator AskUserQuestion locked all four recommended dials тАФ (1) **flat per-item sell rate** (global, not markup, not per-project), (2) sell **captured at issue**, (3) `wp_profit` materials = **ADD store-sell beside GL purchases** (disjoint source, no double-count), (4) external/3rd-party sales **deferred**. U1 = the data foundation (DB-only, mirrors `set_sell_rate` from spec 161 U1): `item_sell_rates` (PK `catalog_item_id`, `sell_rate numeric(12,2) >= 0`, **zero authenticated grant** = the margin-sensitive money posture) + `set_item_sell_rate(p_catalog_item_id, p_sell_rate)` definer (super_admin gate, upsert, audit row, anon EXECUTE revoked). mig `20260809000600`, pgTAP file 186. **Trap caught by db:test (1 file failed, 0 of its asserts ran): the test read the zero-grant `item_sell_rates` while `set local role authenticated` тЖТ permission-denied aborts the WHOLE transactional file (the \_tap_buf inserts roll back too тЖТ "not ok - 186" with 0 assertions). Fix = read the zero-grant table only as OWNER (before `set role` / after `reset role`); only the setter CALLS run under `authenticated` (the spec-161 pgTAP-98 pattern).** Convention note: the store family uses `22023` for value/existence validations (vs the labour family's `P0001`) тАФ kept `22023` here for store consistency.

## Spec 178 тАФ Store margin layer, U2: issue snapshots the sell price (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 216 files / 1435** ┬╖ **db:test 136 files / 2546 / 0** (+1 file 187, +12 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000700`; db:types regenerated (+sell_price/total_sell on stock_issues, app + worker). The WP "buys" the stock at issue: `stock_issues` += `sell_price numeric(12,2)` (nullable тАФ legacy/cost-only rows have none) + `total_sell numeric(16,2)` generated `qty * sell_price`. `issue_stock` (**same 6-arg signature тЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE, body-only, grants + pgTAP 182/183 sig pins preserved, no DROP**) computes `v_sell = coalesce((select sell_rate from item_sell_rates where catalog_item_id=тАж), v_avg)` тАФ the **costing rule**: an unpriced item sells AT COST (zero store margin), never null, so wp_profit (U4) is never understated. The snapshot is immutable (append-only) тАФ changing a rate only affects future issues (pgTAP proves: bump 50тЖТ80, the old issue keeps 50). issue_stock is SECURITY DEFINER so it reads the zero-grant `item_sell_rates` as owner. **Lesson re-applied:** miswrote `plan(10)` for 12 assertions (the bare `set_item_sell_rate` call isn't an assertion but the 3 post-bump checks are) тЖТ fixed to `plan(12)`. NEXT = U3 `store_pnl` read (per-item cost/sell/margin + shrinkage, reversed issues excluded).

## Spec 179 тАФ Purchase request links a catalog item (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1+U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-22.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1441 (+6: validate-purchase-request catalogItemId ┬╖ purchase-request-form-catalog)** ┬╖ **db:test 137 files / 2554 / 0** (+1 file 188, +8 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000800`; db:types regenerated (app + worker). Procurement's request (spec 171): "items not selectable yet" тЖТ operator AskUserQuestion chose the **real FK link** (not a UI snapshot). `purchase_requests` gains a **nullable `catalog_item_id` FK тЖТ catalog_items** (spec 175 master); picking a catalog item links it AND prefills `item_description` (`baseItem` + ` specAttrs`) + `unit` (a human snapshot that survives a later catalog edit/deactivation); the off-catalog free-text path stays (link null). **Posture mirrors `reason_code` (spec 176 U4):** nullable, NO default (legacy rows null), link set ONCE at create тЖТ INSERT-granted, not UPDATE-granted. **THE GRANT TRAP (caught proactively, not by a red db:test):** `purchase_requests` carries **column-scoped INSERT grants** to `authenticated` (mig `20260616000400` revoked table-level insert + re-granted an explicit column list), so a new column is NOT covered тЖТ the session-client insert would be denied; the migration adds `grant insert (catalog_item_id) тАж to authenticated`. **SELECT is table-level (mig `20260608120000`, never revoked) тЖТ the new column is readable without a grant** (unlike the spec-174 column-grant-SELECT trap тАФ different table, different posture). No RLS change (the INSERT policy pins requested_by/source/role only; the FK is unconstrained + nullable). **Validator** `validateCreatePurchaseRequest` += optional `catalogItemId` (uuid-or-null; blank/null/omitted тЖТ null; bad uuid тЖТ "р╕гр╕лр╕▒р╕кр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╣Гр╕Щр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Бр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕Хр╣Йр╕нр╕З"); the exact-shape `toEqual` test updated with `catalogItemId: null`. **Action** `createPurchaseRequest` writes `catalog_item_id`. **Form** (`purchase-request-form.tsx`) += optional `catalogItems` prop (omitted/empty тЖТ picker hidden = free-text-only, **so the existing form tests are unaffected**) + a `р╣Ар╕ер╕╖р╕нр╕Бр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` `<select>` grouped by `item_category` (mirrors the supply-plan picker; option `baseItem ┬╖ specAttrs (unit)`, a `р╕Щр╕нр╕Бр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б (р╕Юр╕┤р╕бр╕Юр╣Мр╣Ар╕нр╕З)` value="" escape hatch); picking prefills the description + unit (a catalog unit outside COMMON_UNITS falls to the р╕нр╕╖р╣Ир╕Щ р╣Ж free-text unit input). **Both form callers feed the active catalog:** `projects/[id]/work-packages/[wpId]` (procurement + SA тАФ added to the existing Promise.all) and `review/work-packages/[wpId]` (PM review тАФ a new fetch). **Migration `20260809000800`, pgTAP `188`** (column nullable-uuid + no-default; FK to catalog_items; INSERT+SELECT granted, UPDATE not тАФ set once). **Test-first proven:** 6 validator/form cases RED before impl. **Out of scope (flagged):** reconciling PR тЖТ stock-in тЖТ on-hand by `catalog_item_id` (the payoff the link unlocks тАФ a later store unit); spend-by-item analytics; back-filling historical free-text requests; a typeahead/search picker (the grouped `<select>` matches supply-plan; a search box is a later UX unit if the catalog grows). **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests" (operator to explain).**

## Spec 180 тАФ PR item is catalog-only + searchable (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1444 (+3: catalog-search rewrite 3тЖТ6; reason/priority retargeted to search)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (form-layer behaviour over the spec-179 column) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. Two operator follow-ups to spec 179: (1) "anything outside catalog must be **registered first**" тЖТ the PR item is now **catalog-only** (the `р╕Щр╕нр╕Бр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` free-text escape hatch is GONE); (2) "typing in item selection **searches** the catalog" тЖТ the grouped `<select>` becomes a typeahead. **Operator AskUserQuestion on the register-flow тЖТ chose "must register on setting"** (not inline add, not widen-to-SA): registration stays a Settings activity at `р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ тЖТ р╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` (`/catalog`, spec 175, BACK_OFFICE-gated). Of PR requesters only **site_admin** isn't a catalog curator (PM/super/**procurement** all are) тАФ a missing item means asking a curator to register it; preserves the curated anti-drift catalog (the point of spec 175). **Form reshape (`purchase-request-form.tsx`, the ONLY code surface тАФ no DB/RPC/route/nav):** removed the free-text `р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕гр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕` input, the `р╕лр╕Щр╣Ир╕зр╕в` dropdown + `р╕нр╕╖р╣Ир╕Щ р╣Ж` unit-other, and the spec-179 grouped `<select>` (+ the `COMMON_UNITS`/`UNIT_OTHER_VALUE` machinery). New UX: a `р╕Др╣Йр╕Щр╕лр╕▓р╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` search input (dependency-free тАФ no combobox primitive exists; a normalised `contains` over `baseItem+specAttrs+unit`) тЖТ a short clickable result list (item ┬╖ spec (unit) + category subtitle); picking sets `catalogItemId` and **derives** `item_description` (`baseItem`+specAttrs) + `unit` as an immutable read-only chip with a `р╣Ар╕Ыр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕вр╕Щ` action; р╕лр╕бр╕▓р╕вр╣Ар╕лр╕Хр╕╕ still carries brand/model refinement. A **no-match** query shows `р╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Юр╕Ър╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╕Др╣Йр╕Щр╕лр╕▓ тАФ р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Чр╕╡р╣И р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕Др╣Ир╕▓ тЖТ р╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` linking `/catalog`. **`catalogItems` prop is now REQUIRED** (both callers already pass it). **Submit gated on a chosen item** (`catalogItemId !== ""`); the shared **validator stays lenient** (catalogItemId optional uuid-or-null) so the non-form create paths (AppSheet, `record_site_purchase`, legacy) тАФ `catalog_item_id` correctly NULL тАФ are unaffected; the catalog-only rule lives at the form (the needed_by/priority UX-only posture, ADR 0026). **Tests (RED-first):** `purchase-request-form-catalog.test.tsx` rewritten (no free-text item input; typing filters; select тЖТ chip + р╣Ар╕Ыр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕вр╕Щ + search hidden; submit gating; submit sends linked id + derived desc/unit; no-match тЖТ /catalog link) + `-priority`/`-reason` retargeted to search+pick. **Two self-inflicted test fixes:** (a) a dynamic `р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щ (unit)` label broke `getByLabelText("р╕Ир╕│р╕Щр╕зр╕Щ")` тЖТ reverted to plain (unit shows in the chip); (b) a typed-spread mock wrapper тЖТ TS2556 тЖТ `vi.mocked(createPurchaseRequest)`. **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** catalog-only on `record_site_purchase` (ad-hoc on-site cash buy stays free-text unless extended); inline add-to-catalog (operator chose Settings-only); arrow-key result navigation (revisit if the catalog grows large); making `catalog_item_id` NOT NULL. **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 180 тАФ PR item picker, U2: pro-max bottom-sheet (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1445 (+1: catalog picker now 8 cases тАФ adds the category-chip filter)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (`catalog_items.image_path` already exists since spec 175 U4 тАФ the WP pages just select + sign it) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. Operator on the U1 inline search: **"UX is weird, any better ones? Uxui pro max."** The U1 picker dumped all ~71 catalog items in an always-open inline `<ul>` under the field тАФ a wall that shoved the form down. AskUserQuestion тЖТ **full pro-max** (bottom sheet + chips + thumbnails). **New component `CatalogItemPicker` (`src/components/features/purchasing/catalog-item-picker.tsx`):** the app's `BottomSheet` idiom (same primitive as р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б/stock/supply-plan) тАФ a trigger button `р╣Ар╕ер╕╖р╕нр╕Бр╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╣Бр╕Др╕Хр╕Хр╕▓р╕ер╣Зр╕нр╕Б` opens a sheet with a **pinned search** (`р╕Др╣Йр╕Щр╕лр╕▓р╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕`, autofocus via rAF after the sheet's own focus-on-open), **category filter chips** (`RadioChip` тАФ the `/catalog` "select category first" pattern, spec 175 U6; р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф + each present category), and **thumbnail result rows** (40px image or placeholder, base+spec, unit, category subtitle) with the **matched substring highlighted** (`highlight()` wraps the case-insensitive match in `text-action font-semibold`). Picking closes the sheet тЖТ a selected **chip** (thumbnail + name + `category ┬╖ unit` + `р╣Ар╕Ыр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕вр╕Щ`); `р╣Ар╕Ыр╕ер╕╡р╣Ир╕вр╕Щ` clears + reopens. No-match тЖТ a dashed register-CTA card тЖТ `/catalog`. **Thumbnails plumbed:** `PurchaseRequestCatalogItem` gains `thumbnailUrl: string | null`; both WP pages (`projects/[id]/work-packages/[wpId]` + `review/...`) now select `image_path` and `mintSignedUrls(CATALOG_IMAGES_BUCKET, тАж)` (private bucket тЖТ service-role signed URLs; rows already read under the user's RLS) тАФ same pattern as `/catalog`. **The form (`purchase-request-form.tsx`) shrank:** its inline search JSX + the `catalogQuery`/`catalogMatches` state + the `Link`/`ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` imports moved into the picker; the form keeps `catalogItemId` + derives `item_description`/`unit` and passes `selectCatalogItem`/`clearCatalogItem` to the picker. **Tests (RED-first):** `purchase-request-form-catalog.test.tsx` rewritten for the sheet flow (trigger тЖТ search тЖТ category chip тЖТ result тЖТ chip; submit gating; submit payload; no-match тЖТ /catalog); `-reason` retargeted to open the sheet first. BottomSheet portals to `document.body` so testing-library `screen` still queries it. **Self-inflicted:** left a `setCatalogQuery("")` in the submit-reset after deleting that state (TS2304 + a test ReferenceError) тЖТ removed. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (form behind LINE auth + project/WP context). **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 180 тАФ PR item picker, U3: category tap no longer ghost-selects an item (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest unchanged (217 / 1445)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change, single-file fix.** Operator: "tapping item categories sometimes turns into item selection." Root cause: the category chips are `RadioChip`s (an sr-only native radio). Tapping one focuses the radio тЖТ `BottomSheet`'s panel `onFocus={handleFocusCapture}` runs `scrollIntoView({ block: "center" })` (rAF) on the focused control тАФ intended to lift a text input above the keyboard, but on a chip it **scrolls the result list up under the finger**, so the synthesized touch `click` lands on a result row. The rAF timing is why it's intermittent ("sometimes"); it only misfires when the chip wasn't already centered. **Fix (`catalog-item-picker.tsx`):** `onFocusCapture={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}` on the category chip-row `<div>` тАФ a capture-phase stop halts the focus event before it bubbles to the panel's `onFocus`, so the sheet doesn't re-center on a chip (the radio still focuses; selection/a11y intact). The search input is untouched тЖТ still centers for the keyboard. **Not unit-testable** (the bug is touch + scrollIntoView layout timing, absent in jsdom тАФ no real scroll/touch); existing category-chip filter test still green; verified on-device by the operator. **NEXT = the rest of procurement's "few requests".**

## Spec 181 тАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U1: procurement plans in PM's stead (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1448 (+3: SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES role-set pins)** ┬╖ **db:test 138 files / 2565 / 0** (+1 file 189, +11 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000900`; **no db:types delta** (RLS + RPC-gate only, no signature/column change). The "bulk PR (planned purchases)" arc opens. Operator's canonical flow: **PM plans тЖТ procurement compares prices тЖТ PD approves тЖТ procurement purchases**; for the moment procurement ALSO does the planning (PM's stead), PD approval stays required. **Locked decisions (AskUserQuestion + free-text):** (1) plan must be **PD-approved** before procurement generates PRs; generated PRs are **born `approved`** (inherit the plan's PD approval, no per-PR re-approval) тЖТ ready for the existing price-compare/PO flow [U3]; (2) procurement does create/add/remove/submit + generate; **approve/reject stay PD/super**; (3) entry = **inline grid** [U2], no paste-import v1; (4) **accuracy-correctness catch** тАФ a plan-generated PR is PLANNED not reactive, so it links to its plan line and is **excluded from `unplanned_miss`** [U3], else generating PRs would corrupt the very metric spec 176 exists to produce. **U1 = procurement ACCESS (this unit):** new `SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES = [...PM_ROLES, "procurement"]` (role-home; members coincide with WORKER_ROSTER_ROLES, meaning differs = "who plans supply", kept separate per role-doctrine). **Migration `20260809000900`** (RLS + RPC widening, **`alter policy` + `CREATE OR REPLACE`, bodies sourced from LIVE = spec-176 U1/U3, edited only at role-list + membership lines**): the `supply_plans`/`supply_plan_lines` SELECT policies gain a `current_user_role()='procurement'` arm beside `can_see_project` (procurement is cross-project тЖТ its arm carries NO membership gate, spec 171/173 pattern); `create_supply_plan`/`add_supply_plan_line`/`remove_supply_plan_line`/`submit_supply_plan` role-list += procurement + membership skipped for it (`role <> 'procurement' AND NOT can_see_project`); `approve_supply_plan`/`reject_supply_plan` **untouched** (PD/super). **Page** (`/projects/[id]/supply-plan`): `requireRole(SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES)`; the `SupplyPlanAccuracy` card is rendered ONLY for the planner tier (procurement skips it тАФ `supply_plan_accuracy` stays PM-gated + the measure is the PM's, so the page would 42501/empty otherwise); `canApprove` stays PD/super тЖТ procurement sees add/submit, no approve. **pgTAP `189`:** cross-project procurement (non-member) create+read+add+read-line+remove+submit + status=submitted; **cannot approve (42501)**; a non-member PM stays denied (procurement arm didn't widen PM); anon still can't EXECUTE (CREATE OR REPLACE preserved the revoke тАФ no DROP+CREATE anon re-grant). **Clean first push тАФ no traps** (CREATE OR REPLACE preserved grants; pgTAP 176 had no procurement pins to break; `alter policy` kept the policy names so any name pins hold). **NEXT = U2** (bulk-add RPC + the inline grid editor), then U3 (generation engine + accuracy exclusion), U4 (convert mode UI).

## Spec 181 тАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U2: bulk-add + the inline grid editor (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1450 (+2: supply-plan-manager grid 6тЖТ8)** ┬╖ **db:test 139 files / 2574 / 0** (+1 file 190) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001000`; db:types regenerated (app + worker, +`add_supply_plan_lines`). The "table / multiple items at once" the operator asked for. **DB тАФ `add_supply_plan_lines(p_plan_id uuid, p_lines jsonb)`** (mig `20260809001000`): loops `jsonb_array_elements`, validates + inserts every line with the SAME per-line checks as the single `add_supply_plan_line` (qty>0, active catalog item, WP-in-project), **ATOMIC** тАФ any bad line `raise`s тЖТ the whole batch rolls back (no partial saves). Same gate as the single add (PM/super/director/**procurement**, membership skipped for procurement); plan must be draft/rejected; returns the count inserted. The unique (item, WP) index still bites (dup vs the batch or vs existing тЖТ 23505, rolls back). **Action `bulkAddPlanLines`** (`supply-plan/actions.ts`): validates each row client-side (uuid + qty>0), get-or-creates the plan (`create_supply_plan`), then one `add_supply_plan_lines` call; maps 23505/42501/22023. **UI тАФ `SupplyPlanManager` rewritten** to an **inline grid** replacing the spec-176 one-at-a-time BottomSheet: N draft rows (item grouped-`<select>` + WP `<select>` (р╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г = null) + qty number + note + р╣Ар╕нр╕▓р╣Бр╕Цр╕зр╕нр╕нр╕Б), `я╝Л р╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╣Бр╕Цр╕з`, and `р╕Ър╕▒р╕Щр╕Чр╕╢р╕Б N р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` that bulk-saves only the COMPLETE rows (item + qty>0; blank/partial trailing rows ignored тАФ forgiving fast entry) тЖТ resets to one blank row + refresh. The saved-lines list + the lifecycle buttons (р╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤ / р╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤ / р╕Хр╕╡р╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ъ) are unchanged. **Used the existing grouped-`<select>` per row (NOT the spec-180 searchable picker)** to keep U2 decoupled (no cross-feature coupling, no thumbnail plumbing, no page change) тАФ **swapping the grid's item cell to the searchable CatalogItemPicker is a flagged follow-up** if the 71-item select feels heavy. **Test rewrite (`supply-plan-manager.test.tsx`):** the two add cases тЖТ grid (disable-save-until-item+qty, bulk-save shape `{projectId, lines:[{catalogItemId, workPackageId, qty, note}]}`, whole-project null-WP, я╝Лр╣Ар╕Юр╕┤р╣Ир╕бр╣Бр╕Цр╕з adds a row); remove/submit/approve/reject unchanged; read-only now asserts the grid is absent. **Draft-row remove uses aria-label `р╣Ар╕нр╕▓р╣Бр╕Цр╕зр╕нр╕нр╕Б`** (NOT `р╕ер╕Ъ`) so it doesn't collide with the saved-line `р╕ер╕Ъ` button in `getByRole`. **Self-inflicted:** wrote `plan(10)` for 9 assertions in pgTAP 190 тЖТ the custom runner does NOT fail on plan-count mismatch (only counts not-ok), so it slipped past the first db:test green; caught by an explicit assert-count grep, fixed to `plan(9)`. **Lesson re-logged: the pgTAP runner is lenient on plan mismatches тАФ grep `plan(N)` vs the real assertion count, don't trust a green db:test alone.** (Spawned a chip to reconcile a few PRE-EXISTING plan mismatches in other files, incl. one "planned 16 ran 15" = a silently-skipped assertion.) **NEXT = U3** (the generation engine: `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id` + `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` born-approved + accuracy exclusion), then U4 (convert UI).

## Spec 181 тАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U3: the generation engine (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **db:test 140 files / 2584 / 0** (+1 file 191, +10 asserts) ┬╖ **vitest unchanged** (DB + action only, no UI) ┬╖ `pnpm build` (pending the U3+U4 ship тАФ built green at U2) ; db:push applied `20260809001100`; db:types regenerated (+`supply_plan_line_id` column + `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` RPC). The "bulk PR" engine: an approved plan's selected lines тЖТ purchase_requests in one call. **Schema:** `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id` (nullable FK тЖТ supply_plan_lines) + a **PARTIAL unique index** `where supply_plan_line_id is not null` (a line converts at most once = idempotency; NULL тАФ the vast majority тАФ unconstrained). No authenticated INSERT grant needed for the new column тАФ the definer RPC owns the insert. **RPC `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan(p_plan_id, p_line_ids uuid[])`** (mig `20260809001100`): gate PM/super/director/**procurement** (membership skipped for procurement); plan must be **`approved`** (else 22023); loops the selected lines, **born-`approved` PRs** (status='approved', `approved_by = the plan's approver`, decided_at=now, reason_code NULL, source 'app', requested_by=auth.uid(), supply_plan_line_id=line) тАФ **inherits the plan's PD approval, no per-PR re-approval**; **skips already-linked lines** (idempotent, returns the count); **whole-project lines (null WP) тЖТ 22023** (a PR is raised against a WP). **Born-approved is SAFE тАФ verified the triggers:** the only AFTER-INSERT trigger `notify_pr_created` fires `when (new.status = 'requested')` so a born-approved PR sends NO false "needs approval" notification; every other purchase_requests trigger (audit_decision/cancellation/appsheet, derive, set_updated_at, notify_status_change) is AFTER/BEFORE **UPDATE** тЖТ none fire on insert. **`auth.uid()` inside SECURITY DEFINER returns the CALLING user** (procurement), not the owner тАФ JWT claims are session context, role is what DEFINER swaps (same as approve_supply_plan). **Accuracy fix (the design catch):** `supply_plan_accuracy` (CREATE OR REPLACE, grants preserved) gains `and r.supply_plan_line_id is null` in the prs CTE тАФ **plan-generated PRs (reason NULL but PLANNED) are excluded from the reactive/untagged counts**, else every planned order would read as a planning miss. **Action `generatePlanPurchaseRequests`** relays the RPC (maps 42501/22023; revalidates /supply-plan + /requests). pgTAP `191`: procurement generates 2 тЖТ born-approved + approved_by=PD; idempotent re-gen тЖТ 0; null-WP тЖТ 22023; non-approved plan тЖТ 22023; **accuracy: the 2 generated PRs excluded from untagged (0), the 1 reactive PR still counts as unplanned_miss (1)**. Generated PRs flow into the existing create_purchase_order (operates on approved PRs) = procurement's price-compare/PO step. **NEXT = U4** тАФ the convert-mode UI (checkboxes on an approved plan's lines + р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н, per-row PR-р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з badge), per the mockup.

## Spec 181 тАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U4: the convert-mode UI (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 181 ARC COMPLETE (U1тАУU4).** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 217 files / 1453 (+3: SupplyPlanManager convert mode)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U3 `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` RPC + a page-side converted-set read) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The user-facing payoff: on an **approved** plan, select lines and fire the PRs. **`SupplyPlanManager` convert mode** (`planStatus === 'approved'`): the saved-lines list gains a leading **checkbox** for each convertible line (WP-bound + not yet converted), a trailing **`р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕З PR р╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з`** badge for already-converted lines, and a **`р╕Хр╣Йр╕нр╕Зр╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕╕р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щр╕Бр╣Ир╕нр╕Щ`** note for whole-project (null-WP) lines; below, a **`р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕Ир╕▓р╕Бр╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щ`** bar with **р╣Ар╕ер╕╖р╕нр╕Бр╕Чр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕лр╕бр╕Ф** + **`р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕н (N)`** тЖТ `generatePlanPurchaseRequests({projectId, planId, lineIds})` тЖТ clears the selection + a `р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕Др╕│р╕Вр╕нр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╣Бр╕ер╣Йр╕з N р╕гр╕▓р╕вр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` status + refresh. Everyone on the page can generate (the page gate = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES = exactly the RPC's generate gate). **Page** (`/projects/[id]/supply-plan`): `PlanLine` gains `converted: boolean` тАФ after loading the lines it reads `purchase_requests.supply_plan_line_id IN (lineIds)` (procurement/PM via the privileged PR SELECT) тЖТ marks each line converted (idempotent badge + excluded from selection). **Tests:** the convert describe (badge on a converted line, no checkbox for converted/whole-project, select тЖТ `generatePlanPurchaseRequests` shape `{projectId, planId, lineIds:["lc"]}`, select-all, no convert UI on a draft plan). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **THE BULK-PR ARC IS DONE end-to-end:** procurement (PM's stead) plans in the inline grid (U2) тЖТ PD approves тЖТ procurement checks the approved lines and fires born-approved PRs (U3 engine, U4 UI) тЖТ they flow into the existing price-compare/PO step; plan-linked PRs stay out of the PM-accuracy metric. **Flagged follow-ups:** swap the grid's grouped-`<select>` item cell to the spec-180 searchable picker; paste-from-spreadsheet import; whole-project (null-WP) line conversion; the convert UI as a proper desktop table (mockup) vs the current responsive list.

## Spec 181 тАФ Supply Plan bulk PR, U5: the missing nav door for procurement (2026-06-23)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change, single-file nav fix.** Operator: "procurement said they cannot find the menu." Root cause = the spec-171-U4 "access without a door" lesson, again: U1 admitted procurement to the `/projects/[id]/supply-plan` page + RPCs, but the **р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓ chip on the project page was inside `{isManagerRole(ctx.role)}`** (PM/super/director) тАФ and **procurement is NOT a manager role**, so it never saw the link. The whole path otherwise already existed: procurement hub тЖТ `р╣Вр╕Др╕гр╕Зр╕Бр╕▓р╕г` (`/projects`, PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES) тЖТ a project page (PROJECT_VIEW_ROLES, spec 173) тЖТ тАж but the supply-plan chip was the dead end. **Fix (`projects/[projectId]/page.tsx`):** `const canPlanSupply = SUPPLY_PLAN_ROLES.includes(ctx.role)` (mirrors `canOpenSchedule`) + the р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щр╕Ир╕▒р╕Фр╕лр╕▓ `<Link>` MOVED OUT of the manager-only block into its own `{canPlanSupply ? тАж : null}` door (placed right after the schedule chip). The reports/settings chips stay manager-only. No project-page test pins these chips (none exists), so no test delta. **LESSON re-logged (3rd time тАФ spec 171 U4, this): admitting a role to a PAGE + its RPCs is HALF the job тАФ also surface the NAV chip/link that reaches it, and check whether it's bundled inside an `isManagerRole`/PM-only block that excludes the new role.** **SPEC 181 NOW REACHABLE end-to-end for procurement.**

## Spec 182 тАФ Procurement price comparison, U1: quote capture + compare table (2026-06-23)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 218 files / 1457 (+4: price-comparison)** ┬╖ **db:test 141 files / 2597 / 0** (+1 file 192, +13 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001200`; db:types regenerated (+`purchase_quotes` table + 2 RPCs). Procurement's price comparison was 100% offline (pick one supplier, type the amount into the PO; losing quotes vanish). U1 = structured quote capture + a ranked compare table. **DB тАФ `purchase_quotes`** (mig `20260809001200`): PR + supplier + `unit_price numeric(12,2) >= 0` + note; **UNIQUE (purchase_request_id, supplier_id)** (one quote per supplier; re-quote = remove+re-add). **Money posture (unit_price is sensitive тАФ more than PO existence):** RLS SELECT to **back-office only (PM/procurement/super_admin/project_director), NOT site_admin**; no write policy. RPCs `add_purchase_quote` (back-office gate; PR must be **`approved`** = the pre-PO sourcing window; dup supplier тЖТ 23505; unknown PR/supplier or non-approved тЖТ 22023) + `remove_purchase_quote`. **THE project_director RIDE-ALONG TRAP тАФ caught by db:test file 91 (3rd time this session): a policy/RPC naming `project_manager` MUST also name `project_director`.** My first cut listed `('project_manager','procurement','super_admin')` тЖТ file 91 RED (2 fails). Fixed forward: added `project_director` to the policy + both RPCs, **re-applied to live via `supabase db query --linked --file`** (ALTER POLICY + CREATE OR REPLACE the 2 funcs) since the migration was already pushed, AND edited the migration file so a fresh setup is correct. **Action** `addPurchaseQuote`/`removePurchaseQuote` (maps 23505/42501/22023; trap: the RPC `p_note` param is typed `string` non-null тЖТ pass `?? ""` not `?? null`). **UI тАФ `PriceComparison`** (`price-comparison.tsx`): ranks quotes cheapest-first, cheapest row highlighted + `р╕Цр╕╣р╕Бр╕кр╕╕р╕Ф`, total = unit_price ├Ч qty, `+N%` over the cheapest; an add form (supplier `<select>` of NOT-yet-quoted suppliers + р╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Хр╣Ир╕нр╕лр╕Щр╣Ир╕зр╕в) + per-row remove. **Wired into `/requests/[requestId]`** in the `isBackOffice && status==='approved'` branch, ABOVE `CreatePoFromRequestButton` (compare тЖТ then order); the page fetches the PR's quotes (supplier-name embed, ordered by price) only for that branch. **Tests:** pgTAP 192 (back-office add/read/remove, dupтЖТ23505, non-approvedтЖТ22023, **site_admin can neither add (42501) nor READ (RLS count 0)**); `price-comparison.test.tsx` (rank+total+% , add offers only un-quoted suppliers, remove, empty state). **NEXT = U2** (pick a quote тЖТ prefill `create_purchase_order` with that supplier + amount), then U3 (price-history benchmark via the spec-179 catalog link), U4 (per-quote doc attachment).

## Spec 182 тАФ Procurement price comparison, U2: pick winner тЖТ PO (2026-06-23)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 218 files / 1459 (+2: pickтЖТPO)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses `create_purchase_order` + the U1 quotes) тЖТ no migration, no db:test delta. The winning quote now flows into the PO. **`CreatePurchaseOrderSheet`** gained `defaultSupplierId` + `defaultAmounts` props (seeded into the initial `supplierId`/`amounts` state; the caller **remounts via `key`** on a new pick тАФ avoids the setState-in-effect React-Compiler lint). **`PriceComparison`** now owns the create-PO action: each quote row gets a **pick radio** (defaults to the cheapest; the picked row gets `border-action bg-action-soft`), and a **`р╕кр╕гр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╣Гр╕Ър╕кр╕▒р╣Ир╕Зр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕Ир╕▓р╕Б {supplier}`** button opens the sheet **prefilled** with the picked supplier + `defaultAmounts = { [line.id]: net total }` (net = unit_price ├Ч qty; the sheet's default VAT mode is already `exclusive` = net+7%, matching Thai net quotes). With no quotes the button opens the sheet blank (same as before). **`/requests/[requestId]`** now renders `PriceComparison` with the PR-as-`line` and **drops the standalone `CreatePoFromRequestButton`** (PriceComparison owns it) тАФ the approved-state action is unified. **exactOptionalPropertyTypes trap:** passing `defaultSupplierId={picked?.supplierId}` (string|undefined) into a `?: string` prop тЖТ TS2375; fixed by typing the prop `?: string | undefined`. **Test:** the PO sheet is mocked to a stub exposing the prefill props; default-pick = cheapest (s1, р╕┐4,600), re-pick the dearer quote тЖТ that supplier + total (s2, р╕┐4,900). **NEXT = U3** (price-history benchmark via the spec-179 catalog link), then U4 (per-quote doc attachment).

## Spec 182 тАФ Procurement price comparison, U3: last-paid benchmark (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 218 files / 1461 (+2: price-history benchmark)** ┬╖ **db:test 142 files / 2607 / 0** (+1 file 193, +10 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001300`; db:types regenerated (+`item_price_history` RPC). The "what did we pay last time" reference above the quote table. **DB тАФ `item_price_history(p_catalog_item_id uuid)`** (mig `20260809001300`): SECURITY DEFINER table-returning read тЖТ recent PURCHASED `purchase_requests` for a catalog item (the spec-179 link) тЖТ `supplier_name` (coalesce suppliers.name, the text snapshot), **NET unit price** (`round(amount/(1+vat_rate/100)/nullif(qty,0), 2)` тАФ amount is the line GROSS per spec 119, so net = apples-to-apples with the net quotes), qty, purchased_at; `where amount is not null and quantity > 0`, **order by `coalesce(purchased_at, requested_at) desc` limit 5**. **Money posture (ADR 0038, same as purchase_quotes):** back-office role gate (PM/procurement/super/**project_director** тАФ the file-91 ride-along, named correctly first try this time) тЖТ site_admin + anon get nothing; DEFINER also lets the cross-project price reference see purchases beyond the caller's membership (a price benchmark is org-wide). **UI тАФ `PriceComparison`** gains an optional `history: ItemPriceHistory[]` prop (default `[]` тЖТ U1/U2 tests untouched); when non-empty it renders **`р╣Ар╕Др╕вр╕Лр╕╖р╣Йр╕нр╕ер╣Ир╕▓р╕кр╕╕р╕Ф р╕┐X/{unit} р╕Ир╕▓р╕Б Y ┬╖ N р╕Др╕гр╕▒р╣Йр╕З`** above the р╣Ар╕Ыр╕гр╕╡р╕вр╕Ър╣Ар╕Чр╕╡р╕вр╕Ър╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓ heading (X/Y from `history[0]` = newest; N = `history.length`). **Page** (`/requests/[requestId]`): the select gains `catalog_item_id`; the history is fetched (one `rpc("item_price_history")`) only in the `isBackOffice && status==='approved' && catalog_item_id` case (off-catalog PRs have no axis тЖТ no line) and passed to `PriceComparison`. **Tests:** pgTAP 193 (shape + SECURITY DEFINER + anon-no-exec; **site_admin тЖТ 42501**; count excludes the amount-null PR + the other-item PR; net with VAT 0 = 98, with VAT 7% = 100, a null-supplier_id row coalesces to the text snapshot = 100; no null nets; `results_eq` on `purchased_at` proves newest-first); component test (benchmark line shows newest price/supplier/`N р╕Др╕гр╕▒р╣Йр╕З`; no line when history empty). **NET decision (no operator ask needed):** quotes are NET so last-paid is computed NET for a fair compare; the line uses the actual `unit` (matching the quote rows) not the literal "р╕лр╕Щр╣Ир╕зр╕в". **NEXT = U4** (per-quote doc attachment: `quote` attachment purpose + `quote_id` FK).

## Spec 182 тАФ Procurement price comparison, U4: per-quote source document (ARC COMPLETE) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23. SPEC 182 ARC COMPLETE (U1тАУU4).** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 218 files / 1463 (+2: quote-doc render)** ┬╖ **db:test 143 files / 2619 / 0** (+1 file 194, +12 asserts; +pin updates in file 20) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001400`+`20260809001500`; db:types regenerated (+`quote_id` column on attachments + the view). Each supplier quote (U1) now carries its source quotation doc (the ЁЯУО). **DB тАФ mig `тАж001400`** adds the `quote` value to `purchase_request_attachment_purpose` (own migration тАФ ADD VALUE can't be referenced same-txn, the spec-66 invoice precedent). **mig `тАж001500`:** `purchase_request_attachments.quote_id` (nullable FK тЖТ `purchase_quotes`, **ON DELETE CASCADE** тАФ matches the sibling PR FK; both dormant outside the admin hard-delete) + `pra_quote_id_shape` CHECK (quote_id only on quote rows) + column-scoped `grant insert(quote_id)` (the spec-179 new-column lesson); the INSERT policy gains a **quote arm** (back-office only тАФ NOT site_admin; PR `approved`; quote on THIS PR); a **RESTRICTIVE select** gates quote-purpose rows to back-office (money тАФ a quotation shows prices); the storage upload policy widened (+procurement/+director, +`approved` status arm); the `_current` view appends `quote_id`. **Action `addQuoteAttachment`** mirrors `addInvoiceAttachment` (idempotent 23505 replay; purpose='quote'+quote_id; server rebuilds the path). **UI:** new `QuoteDocAttach` (per-row uploader, the InvoiceUploader flow) тАФ a doc-less quote row shows the attach control, a doc'd row shows a `р╣Ар╕нр╕Бр╕кр╕▓р╕г` link; **remove is disabled on a doc'd quote** (append-only + FK тЖТ not hard-removable; kept for audit, aligned with "losing quotes are kept"). The page fetches quote docs (`purpose='quote'` from `_current`, signed via the pr-attachments bucket) тЖТ `quoteId тЖТ url` map passed to `PriceComparison`. **Per-row attach (not mid-add)** chosen for robustness + it matches the spec doc's "ЁЯУО per quote row"; the task's "in the add form" phrasing is an impl hint. **TRAPS caught by db:test (all forward-fixed; the corrected INSERT policy re-applied to live via `supabase db query --linked --file` since `тАж001500` was already pushed):** (1) **name-capture** тАФ `q.purchase_request_id = purchase_request_id` bound the unqualified RHS to `q` (purchase_quotes has that column!) тЖТ always true тЖТ a cross-PR quote could be linked; qualified to `purchase_request_attachments.purchase_request_id` (the hazard every attachments-policy header warns about). (2) **bare eval-once** тАФ wrote `current_user_role()`/`auth.uid()` bare тЖТ pgTAP file 40 RED; wrapped as `(select тАж)` (pg_get_expr drops the `public.` so `(select public.current_user_role())` still satisfies the lint тАФ file 40 stayed the model). (3) **two file-20 pins** my change legitimately invalidates тАФ the purpose-enum label set (+quote) + `policies_are` (the 4th, restrictive, policy); updated both. (4) **spec-143 membership** тАФ the pgTAP fixture's site_admin needed a `project_members` row to read the parent PR (procurement keeps its cross-project read). **Verified:** procurement attaches on an approved PR + reads; site_admin can neither attach (42501) nor read the quote doc (RESTRICTIVE, incl. via the view) but still sees the parent's reference row; a cross-PR quote_id is rejected. **THE PRICE-COMPARISON ARC IS DONE end-to-end:** capture N supplier quotes (U1) тЖТ rank + pick тЖТ prefill the PO (U2) тЖТ last-paid benchmark from history (U3) тЖТ each quote carries its source doc (U4). **Flagged follow-ups:** removing/replacing an attached quote doc (the doc-removal path is out of U4 scope тАФ a doc'd quote is currently immutable); a desktop table layout; quote expiry/validity dates.

## Spec 178 тАФ Store margin layer, U3: Store P&L read (2026-06-23)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **db:test 144 files / 2633 / 0** (+1 file 195, +14 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001600`; db:types regenerated (+`store_pnl`, app + worker). **Renumbered around the concurrent spec-179/181/182 session** (it took migs `тАж000800`тАУ`тАж001500` + pgTAP 188тАУ194, all merged to main while I was paused; U1+U2 stayed ancestors of HEAD `b20f3554`) тЖТ my mig = `тАж001600`, pgTAP = 195. The margin layer becomes observable: `store_pnl(p_project_id)` returns **per-item** rows тАФ `qty_issued`, `cost_total` (╬г total_cost), `sell_total` (╬г **`coalesce(total_sell, total_cost)`** so unpriced/legacy issues count at cost), `margin` (sellтИТcost), `shrinkage_value` (╬г `stock_counts.variance_value`). **Reversed issues excluded** (anti-join `stock_reversals` on `issue_id` тАФ a reversed р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б never charged the WP). FULL OUTER JOIN of per-item issue aggregates + per-item count aggregates тЖТ an item that was only counted (pure shrinkage) still appears. **Money gate super_admin / project_director** (mirrors `wp_profit` тАФ NOT procurement, NOT site_admin/PM); SECURITY DEFINER, called on the user session (admin client has no JWT тЖТ 42501). Unknown project тЖТ 22023. pgTAP 195 (14): structure + anon-deny + per-item cost/sell/margin/shrinkage + unpriced-at-cost + reversed-excluded + director-allowed + PM/procurement-denied + unknown-project. Clean first push. NEXT = U4 flip `wp_profit` (fold ╬г total_sell of non-reversed issues into the materials line).

## Spec 178 тАФ Store margin layer, U4: flip wp_profit (the keystone) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 1463** ┬╖ **db:test 145 files / 2637 / 0** (+1 file 196, +4 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001700`; **db:types ZERO drift** (same return signature). The transfer-pricing payoff lands: `wp_profit`'s `materials_cost` now = the GL acct-1400 purchase cost (unchanged) **PLUS** the per-WP `╬г coalesce(total_sell, total_cost)` of **non-reversed** `stock_issues` тАФ the store charges the WP its SELL price for material drawn from the store. **Disjoint sources** (store issues are never posted to the GL) тЖТ additive, no double-count; a WP pays sell price for store stock AND purchase price for direct-to-WP buys. Reversed issues excluded (anti-join `stock_reversals` on `issue_id`). **Body sourced from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`** (confirmed unchanged by the concurrent session), not an old migration тАФ the recurring overload/dropped-gate trap; **SAME return signature тЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE (body-only)**, so grants + the pgTAP **102** structure pins + the 90/91 gate invariants (no PM ref) all hold, and `settle_project` banks the new profit automatically (it reads `wp_profit.profit`). pgTAP 196 (4): WP-with-store-issues materials = store-sell 520 (priced 500 + unpriced-at-cost 20; reversed 5000 excluded) ┬╖ profit = budget 1000 тИТ 520 ┬╖ a WP with no store draws unchanged (per-WP, no leak) ┬╖ labor_sell still 0 (only the materials line folds). **102/104/105 stayed green** (their fixtures have no `stock_issues` on the tested WPs тЖТ the new term = 0). Clean first push. **wp_profit now reflects the store as a transfer-pricing BU. The cost-first dial is unlocked end-to-end (engine).** NEXT = U5 sell-rate setter UI (super-only) ┬╖ U6 store-margin UI on /store ┬╖ then Stream B mop-up.

## Spec 178 тАФ Store margin layer, U5: the sell-rate setter UI (super-only) (2026-06-23)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 219 files / 1466 (+3: set-sell-rate)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **Code-only тАФ no DB / migration / db:test delta** (reuses the U1 `set_item_sell_rate` RPC). The first margin-layer UI: the operator can finally set the per-item sell rate. **Home = `/catalog`** (the item registry тАФ sell rate is a global per-item attribute). **Super_admin ONLY, money-locked end to end:** the rate is read on the page **via the admin client** and **only when `ctx.role === "super_admin"`** (the nova money pattern тАФ `item_sell_rates` is zero authenticated grant, so the rate never reaches the client for procurement/PM/director); written via the new **`setItemSellRate`** action (`requireRole(["super_admin"])` + `set_item_sell_rate` on the RLS server client so the definer super gate resolves; maps 42501/22023). New **`SetSellRate`** client control (per row, gated on a `canSetSellRate` prop) тАФ shows `р╕┐{rate}` when set or `р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Вр╕▓р╕в` when unset тЖТ a BottomSheet number input тЖТ `setItemSellRate` тЖТ refresh. `CatalogList` += `canSetSellRate` prop + `sellRate?` on `CatalogItem` (omitted for non-super via conditional spread тАФ the rate doesn't leave the server). Labels `ITEM_SELL_RATE_LABEL`/`SET_ITEM_SELL_RATE_LABEL` in labels.ts. **2 traps:** (1) `getByLabelText(/р╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Вр╕▓р╕в/)` matched BOTH the input AND the BottomSheet dialog (its `aria-labelledby` тЖТ title `р╕Хр╕▒р╣Йр╕Зр╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Вр╕▓р╕в` contains `р╕гр╕▓р╕Др╕▓р╕Вр╕▓р╕в`) тЖТ query the number input by `getByRole("spinbutton")`. (2) `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` rejected the explicit `undefined` on optional `sellRate` тЖТ omit the key via conditional spread (the spec-177-U2 lesson). Browser pass = operator on-device (auth-gated). NEXT = U6 store-margin UI on /store ┬╖ then Stream B mop-up.

SPEC 178 STREAM A (margin layer) ARC COMPLETE (U1тАУU6).** lint ┬╖ typecheck ┬╖ **vitest 220 files / 1468 (+2: store-pnl-view)** ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **Code-only тАФ no DB / migration / db:test delta** (reads the U3 `store_pnl` RPC). The margin layer is now visible: /store shows a **р╕Бр╕│р╣Др╕г-р╕Вр╕▓р╕Фр╕Чр╕╕р╕Щр╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣М** section тАФ per item (р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б qty ┬╖ р╕Хр╣Йр╕Щр╕Чр╕╕р╕Щ ┬╖ р╕вр╕нр╕Фр╕Вр╕▓р╕в ┬╖ margin, + р╕Вр╕нр╕Зр╕Вр╕▓р╕Ф-р╣Ар╕Бр╕┤р╕Щ when a count varies) and the **project net = ╬г margin + ╬г shrinkage** (р╕Бр╕│р╣Др╕гр╕кр╕╕р╕Чр╕Шр╕┤). **super_admin / project_director ONLY** (`canSeePnl`, mirrors the `store_pnl` RPC gate тАФ procurement/PM/site_admin never see margins); rendered only when a project is selected. **Page** calls `store_pnl(project)` on the user session (definer gate resolves via JWT) and resolves item names separately (covers since-deactivated items). New presentational **`StorePnlView`** (pure server component, no `'use client'`) + `STORE_PNL_LABEL`. Browser pass = operator on-device (auth-gated). **STREAM A DONE: U1 sell-rate data тЖТ U2 issue snapshots sell тЖТ U3 store_pnl read тЖТ U4 wp_profit fold тЖТ U5 sell-rate setter UI тЖТ U6 store P&L view. The store is a transfer-pricing BU end to end (engine + screens).** NEXT = **Stream B** cost-side mop-up (deferred items): WP-detail reversal controls, site_admin count surface, count-history view, /store-manager receiver picker, manager confirm-on-behalf, GL posting of stock movements.

NEXT Stream B = site_admin count surface ┬╖ count-history ┬╖ /store-manager receiver picker ┬╖ manager confirm-on-behalf ┬╖ GL posting.

## Spec 178 тАФ Stream B, B5a: confirm-on-behalf engine (2026-06-23)

Status: **B5a SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ **db:test 146 files / 2651 / 0** (+1 file 197, +14 asserts) ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001800`; db:types regenerated (+received_on_behalf/received_by + the RPC). The custody fallback for login-less workers: a named receiver with no portal login can't self-attest, so their р╣Ар╕Ър╕┤р╕Б sits р╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ forever. **Operator gate (AskUserQuestion): PM tier ONLY (project_manager/super_admin/project_director) AND never the issuer** (separation of duties тАФ no rubber-stamping your own handoff). `stock_issues` += `received_on_behalf boolean default false` + `received_by uuid` (the confirming manager) тАФ a worker self-confirm (`confirm_stock_issue`, untouched) leaves both at defaults, so the two paths are always distinguishable. New `confirm_stock_issue_on_behalf(p_issue_id)` definer: PM-tier gate (42501) тЖТ unknown issue (22023) тЖТ can_see_project (42501) тЖТ receiver-named (22023) тЖТ not-already-received (22023) тЖТ not-the-issuer (`auth.uid()=issued_by` тЖТ 42501) тЖТ set received_at + received_on_behalf=true + received_by=auth.uid(). pgTAP 197 (14): structure + anon-deny + site_admin-denied + non-member-denied + no-receiver + already-received + unknown + issuer-self-denied + happy (received_at/on_behalf/by stamped). `confirm_stock_issue` (worker-self, pgTAP 183) unchanged тЖТ stays green (additive columns). **NEXT = B5b the UI** (a р╕вр╕╖р╕Щр╕вр╕▒р╕Щр╕гр╕▒р╕Ър╣Бр╕Чр╕Щ control on a manager's pending-р╕гр╕нр╕гр╕▒р╕Ъ issues) ┬╖ then B6 GL posting.

## Spec 178 тАФ Stream B, B6a: store GL posting (receive + issue) (2026-06-23)

Status: **B6a SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ **db:test 147 files / 2664 / 0** (+1 file 198, +13 asserts) ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809001900`; db:types regenerated (+2 posters). Store movements now post to the GL **at COST** (the sell/margin stays in the management P&L тАФ wp_profit/store_pnl). **New account 1500** `р╕зр╕▒р╕кр╕Фр╕╕р╕Др╕Зр╕Др╕ер╕▒р╕З (р╕кр╣Вр╕Хр╕гр╣Мр╕лр╕Щр╣Йр╕▓р╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ)` / Inventory - site store (idempotent COA seed, under Assets 1000). **post_stock_receipt_to_gl:** Dr Inventory 1500 (project) / Cr AP 2100 (supplier; null party if unsourced) at total_cost. **post_stock_issue_to_gl:** Dr WIP 1400 (project+WP) / Cr Inventory 1500 at moving-avg total_cost. Both mirror `post_purchase_to_gl` (reverse-and-repost auto-correct, SECURITY DEFINER service_role-only, balanced via `post_journal_internal`). AFTER-INSERT enqueue triggers on `stock_receipts`/`stock_issues` (append-only тЖТ INSERT-only) feed the spec-149 async outbox; `drain_gl_posting` CREATE OR REPLACE routes the two new source tables. **No double-count:** issues are tagged `source_table='stock_issues'` (тЙа purchase_requests), so wp_profit's 1400-purchase-filtered materials term excludes them тАФ the store-issue-SELL term it already adds is the management figure; the GL holds the cost. pgTAP 198 (13): account postable ┬╖ posters service_role-only ┬╖ receipt insert enqueues ┬╖ receive Dr1500/Cr2100 balanced ┬╖ issue Dr1400(WP)/Cr1500 balanced ┬╖ issue tagged stock_issues. **TRAP (caught by db:test, 4 files/18 failures): the drainer CREATE OR REPLACE copied the STALE 4-case body from the original migration `20260743000200` тАФ but the LIVE drainer had 7 cases (spec-149 U5/U5b/U6 added client_billings/retention_receivables/wht_certificates) тЖТ my replace DROPPED those 3 тЖТ tests 85/86/87/88 ("drain posts the тАж") went red. The recurring lesson AGAIN: CREATE OR REPLACE a routing/dispatch fn from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`, never an old migration. Fixed the migration to the full 9-case body + applied the corrected drainer to LIVE via `db query --file` (migration already applied тЖТ file==DB).** **FLAGGED тАФ B6b: count(shrinkage) + reversal GL legs** (a reverse_stock_receipt/issue currently drops on-hand but does NOT yet post a GL flip тЖТ the GL overstates until B6b; beta has no real store data; will add post_stock_count_to_gl + post_stock_reversal_to_gl + triggers/routing). **SPEC 178 effectively COMPLETE тАФ U1тАУU6 + B1/B2/B3/B4/B5/B6a; only B6b (shrinkage/reversal GL legs) remains.**

Operator to set real per-item sell rates to earn margin.**

## Spec 178 тАФ Stream B, B7: inventory тЖФ GL reconciliation (2026-06-23)

Status: **B7 SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ **db:test 149 files / 2686 / 0** (+1 file 200, +6 asserts) ┬╖ `pnpm build`/vitest unchanged (DB-only, zero types drift); db:push applied `20260809002100`. Closes the store's money-integrity loop: the B6 GL postings gave Inventory **1500 exactly one feeder** (store movements) тЖТ unlike multi-feeder AP 2100 / WIP 1400 it reconciles to its subledger. Extended **`gl_reconciliation()`** (the no-arg one the app/`/accounting` call; sourced from the LIVE mig-749 body + one `sub` field + one UNION arm тАФ the source-from-LIVE discipline; same return shape тЖТ CREATE OR REPLACE, grants preserved) with an **`inventory_1500`** check: GL 1500 balance (drтИТcr) must equal ╬г `stock_on_hand.total_value`. Holds when `posting_backlog`=0 (GL posts async vs synchronous on-hand тАФ the existing backlog check surfaces the lag). The `/accounting` reconciliation surface auto-renders the new row (it iterates rows). pgTAP 200 (6): the row exists ┬╖ ties at 500=500 (ok=true) ┬╖ flags drift (on-hand 600 vs GL 500 тЖТ ok=false, drift тИТ100). pgTAP 88 unaffected (it queries recon rows by check_name, no row-count pin). **Adversarial check confirmed: store GL touches only 2100/1400/1500/5100 тАФ none of the OTHER single-feeder recon invariants (1210/2210/1310/2200) тАФ so B6 never broke reconciliation; B7 adds the one tie that 1500 makes possible.** **SPEC 178 fully complete + money-integrity-checked.**

No types drift, no nav/guard change.

## ADR 0062 U5 тАФ remove the /contacts/dc door + page (DC is a worker) (2026-06-23)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-23.** typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ vitest ┬╖ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (code-only; the `contractor_category` enum keeps its 'dc' value тАФ prod has 0 DC contractors, so nothing to migrate; we just stop WRITING it). Operator: "DC setting is confusing" тЖТ settings had TWO DC doors: **DC** (`/contacts/dc`, the old contractor-party list, hint even said 'companies') beside **р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ** (`/workers`, the real DC roster). ADR 0062 made DC a WORKER (no DC firm), so `/contacts/dc` is a dead duplicate тЖТ removed (the planned U5). **Changes:** deleted the `/contacts/dc` route (page + loading); removed the settings DC door + clarified the р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ hint ("р╕Чр╕░р╣Ар╕Ър╕╡р╕вр╕Щ DC (р╕Ыр╕гр╕░р╕Ир╕│/р╕Кр╕▒р╣Ир╕зр╕Др╕гр╕▓р╕з) ┬╖ р╕Др╣Ир╕▓р╕Ир╣Йр╕▓р╕З"); dropped `"dc"` from the contacts type system (`ContactGroup`/`ContactTab`/`CONTACT_GROUP_TABS`/`STATUS_TABS` in `lib/contacts/groups`) + all `dc` machinery in the shared `ContactsTabs` (`DC_FIELDS`, `DC_SUBTYPE_OPTIONS`, `dcCreate`/`dcUpdate`, the `dc` tab branch, `TAB_LABEL.dc`, the `dc` prop). **Untouched (worker_type='dc' тАФ the actual DC, which STAYS):** `/workers` roster, `contact-crew-section` (DC workers under a subcontractor), labor/payroll. Tests: `contacts-groups.test` (dc removed from the tab map + status set), `nav-back-affordance` (dropped `contacts/dc` from STATIC_DETAIL). **Gotcha re-hit (spec 168): deleting a Next route тЖТ stale `.next/types/validator.ts` TS2307 on the old `page.js` тЖТ `rm -rf .next` + rebuild.** Only link to `/contacts/dc` was the settings door (no other nav). **DC is now ONE place: р╕Чр╕╡р╕бр╕Зр╕▓р╕Щ.**

## Spec 189 тАФ multiple supply plans per project (2026-06-24)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod тАФ 2026-06-24.** typecheck ┬╖ lint ┬╖ vitest (plan-list 5, new-button 2, manager 11) green; `db:push` applied `20260811000100`; db:test 191 + updated 176 green (the 6 other red files тАФ 119 catalog-identity, 82/84/85/86/87 GL-posting drain cluster тАФ are **pre-existing, unrelated** to supply plans). Operator: "enable multi-supply-plan" + chose **auto numbered/dated** labels + **full feature now**.

**Why:** spec 176 modeled ONE plan/project (`unique(project_id)` + get-or-create RPC + single-plan UI). Operator wants many (per phase/period).

**U1 DB (`20260811000100`, pgTAP 191):** drop `supply_plans_project_unique`; `create_supply_plan` get-or-create тЖТ **always-insert a new draft**. **TRAP HIT (the recurring one): my first `CREATE OR REPLACE` re-sourced the spec-176 body and DROPPED the spec-181 procurement arm тЖТ db:test 189 went red (`create_supply_plan: role not permitted` for procurement).** Fix: re-source from LIVE (spec-181 `20260809000900`) тАФ role list `+procurement`, membership skipped for procurement тАФ keep only the always-insert swap; reconciled prod with a direct CREATE OR REPLACE (db:push won't re-run an applied migration). pgTAP 176 idempotency assert flipped to always-create.

**U2 UI:** `createPlan(projectId)` action тЖТ returns new planId; `addPlanLine`/`bulkAddPlanLines` now take an explicit `planId` (no get-or-create); `NewPlanButton` (`'use client'`) creates тЖТ navigates `?plan=<id>`; pure `buildPlanList` (unit-tested) тЖТ list view models (auto-label `р╣Бр╕Ьр╕Щ #N`, status, line count, selected); page lists all plans (date ┬╖ count ┬╖ status) + new-plan button, `?plan=<id>` opens the existing `SupplyPlanManager`; `PLAN_STATUS_LABEL` exported from the manager (single source). **Unchanged downstream:** `supply_plan_accuracy` already aggregates all a project's plan lines (plan-agnostic); `generate_purchase_requests_from_plan` is per-plan.

**LESSON (reinforced):** changing a DEFINER RPC body тЖТ source from the LIVE function (latest patch migration / `pg_get_functiondef`), never an older migration file тАФ role lists drift forward (spec 181 added procurement).

## Spec 201 тАФ Feedback two-way + CC triage agent тАФ U1 (2026-06-25)

Status: **U1 IN PROGRESS тАФ my-requests list.** Operator asked: (1) let users see their own
submitted reports, (2) redesign feedback into a two-way, CC-triaged loop (ultrathink +
Anthropic best-practices research). Spec `201-feedback-two-way.md` records the arc + the
three locked dials (AskUserQuestion): **draftтЖТoperator-approves** replies ┬╖ **manual**
cadence (`/triage-feedback` skill, no scheduler v1) ┬╖ **annotation later** (reuse
`photo_markups`). Architecture (per Anthropic building-effective-agents): outer loop =
workflow, inner triage = agent; CC = the operator's Claude Code, app holds only the thread
data model. Estimates given to PO: U1=2 ┬╖ U2=5 ┬╖ U3=3 ┬╖ U4=8 ┬╖ U5=5 ┬╖ U6=3 ┬╖ skill=3 (MVP
loop = 21, full = 29 pts).

**U1 (code-only, no DB):** the submitter-read RLS (`submitted_by = auth.uid()`, mig 20260813000000) already permits the read тАФ no migration. New presentational
`MyFeedbackList` (`src/components/features/feedback/my-feedback-list.tsx`): own reports,
newest-first, type + status badge + title; empty state `р╕вр╕▒р╕Зр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕бр╕╡р╣Ар╕гр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╕Зр╕Чр╕╡р╣Ир╣Ар╕Др╕вр╣Бр╕Ир╣Йр╕З`.
`/feedback` page fetches the caller's own rows (RLS-scoped) and renders the list under the
form (`router.refresh()` on submit already refreshes it). Attachments NOT shown тАФ a reporter
can't read their own attachment rows yet (`feedback_attachments` zero-auth-access; deferred
to an owner-read policy in a later unit). Test-first: `tests/unit/my-feedback-list.test.tsx`
(4: titles ┬╖ type+status badges ┬╖ newest-first sort ┬╖ empty state) тАФ red (no module) тЖТ green.
typecheck + lint clean.

**U2 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001200`, pgTAP 218 13/13) тАФ feedback thread +
operator reply.** Scope call: a thread needs a seed writer, so U2 includes the
operator-posts path (a human reply IS the human-approved channel; the draftтЖТapprove gate
governs CC replies in U4). **DB:** `feedback_messages` append-only (message doctrine, like
`feedback_attachments`) тАФ `feedback_id` FK, `author_kind` (new enum `feedback_author_kind` =
reporter/operator/agent), `author_id` (null=agent), `body` 1..4000, `created_at`. RLS SELECT
own-thread (submitter) or super_admin; writes RPC-only. `post_feedback_message(uuid,text)`
super_admin-only definer тЖТ stamps `operator` + `auth.uid()`. pgTAP 218: catalog/lockdown ┬╖
super posts ┬╖ submitter reads own ┬╖ non-submitter reads nothing ┬╖ non-super cannot post
(42501) ┬╖ unknown-id/empty-body (22023) ┬╖ append-only UPDATE/DELETE (P0001). **UI:**
`FeedbackThread` (presentational, oldest-first, author-labelled `FEEDBACK_AUTHOR_LABEL`, team
left-accent) ┬╖ `FeedbackReply` (operator composer тЖТ `postFeedbackMessage` action) ┬╖ single
thread surface `/feedback/[id]` (RLS own-or-super тЖТ notFound otherwise; composer renders only
for super_admin) ┬╖ `MyFeedbackList` rows + review cards link to it. Reporter view read-only
(reporter-reply = U3); no `state` column yet (draft/published = U4). Test-first:
`feedback-thread.test.tsx` (4) + `feedback-reply.test.tsx` (2) redтЖТgreen. Full suite
1653/1653, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 165/168 (3 reds = pre-existing GL-drain cluster
85/86/87, unrelated). db:types regenerated (+feedback_messages, +feedback_author_kind).
**NEXT = U3 reporter reply (widen post path to the submitter + reporter composer).**

**U3 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001300`, pgTAP 219 5/5) тАФ reporter reply.** The
loop closes from the reporter's side. `post_feedback_message` **widened** (same sig тЖТ CREATE
OR REPLACE, grants preserved, body re-sourced from the U2 mig-1200 body тАФ the source-from-LIVE
discipline) so the author voice is DERIVED from the caller, never trusted: super_admin тЖТ
`operator`, the report's submitter тЖТ `reporter`, else 42501. One RPC, role-derived (no second
write path). **UI:** `/feedback/[id]` shows the `FeedbackReply` composer to `canReply =
super_admin || submitted_by === viewer` (page fetches `submitted_by`); composer copy
neutralised (`р╕Хр╕нр╕Ър╕Бр╕ер╕▒р╕Ъ`) so it serves both ends тАФ same component+action, the RPC stamps the
voice. **Test-first:** pgTAP 219 (submitter posts ┬╖ stamped reporter ┬╖ author_id=submitter ┬╖
non-owner non-super 42501 ┬╖ super still operator); file 218's "cannot post" retargeted to a
true outsider (the submitter posting is now the U3 path). No type drift (sig unchanged). Full
suite 1653/1653, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 165/169 (4 reds = pre-existing GL-drain 85/86/87

- a transient 502 on 05-audit-log-revoke, green in the U2 run тАФ infra hiccup, not code).
  **NEXT = U4: CC drafts тЖТ operator approves тАФ the core.**

**U4 SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001400`, pgTAP 220 17/17) тАФ CC drafts тЖТ operator
approves (the human-in-loop gate, locked dial 1).** **MODEL REFINEMENT (vs the planned `state`
column):** feedback_messages is append-only/immutable, so a draft can't be a message toggled
draftтЖТpublished. Instead a draft is NOT a message yet тАФ staged in a separate mutable
`feedback_message_drafts` table (super_admin-only RLS; reporter has NO read path). Approve =
insert a real append-only `agent` message + delete the draft (atomic). Keeps the thread
immutable, auto-hides drafts, makes approval the only path to the reporter. **DEFERRED:** the
`feedback_status` enum is NOT extended (no awaiting_review/awaiting_user) тАФ a pending draft
already signals "awaiting operator" (derived); resolution reuses `set_feedback_status`. **DB:**
`draft_feedback_message(uuid,text)` SERVICE_ROLE-only (CC stages via `db query`; app users
can't draft тАФ revoke public/auth/anon + grant service_role, the claim_next_report idiom);
`publish_feedback_draft(uuid)` + `discard_feedback_draft(uuid)` super_admin-only definers.
**UI:** `FeedbackDrafts` (super-only, `/feedback/[id]` above the composer) тЖТ р╕нр╕Щр╕╕р╕бр╕▒р╕Хр╕┤р╣Бр╕ер╕░р╕кр╣Ир╕З /
р╕Чр╕┤р╣Йр╕З тЖТ publish/discard actions; published draft shows as `р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕в AI` (transparent it's AI).
**Test-first:** pgTAP 220 (service_role/super lockdown ┬╖ reporter can't see drafts ┬╖ super
sees ┬╖ stage ┬╖ publishтЖТagent msg+draft gone ┬╖ reporter then sees agent reply ┬╖ non-super
can't publish/discard 42501 ┬╖ discard ┬╖ unknown 22023); `feedback-drafts.test.tsx` (4). Trap:
planned 16 but wrote 17 asserts тЖТ fixed plan(17) (runner ignores the diagnostic, corrected).
Full suite 1657/1657, typecheck+lint clean, db:test 167/170 (3 reds = pre-existing GL-drain
85/86/87; the U3-run's transient 502 on 05 cleared). db:types regenerated
(+feedback_message_drafts, +3 RPCs). **NEXT = U5 annotated screenshot (reuse photo_markups) ┬╖
U6 reporter notify ┬╖ `/triage-feedback` skill (the draft gate is now ready for CC).**

\*\*`/triage-feedback` SKILL SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (no DB/code тАФ `.claude/skills/triage-feedback/SKILL.md`

- CLAUDE.md registration) тАФ activates the arc.** CC's manual-cadence triage procedure: connect via
  `pnpm exec supabase db query --linked` (service_role: reads bypass RLS, granted execute on
  `draft_feedback_message`) тЖТ pull open/in_progress queue тЖТ per report read thread + skip if a draft
  exists тЖТ investigate against the codebase (locate via page_path/screen/role_snapshot, read code,
  reproduce) тЖТ stage ONE draft via `draft_feedback_message` (`--file` for Thai/quoted bodies) тЖТ hand off;
  operator approves at `/feedback/[id]`. GUARDRAILS: draft-only (never publish/set-status/UPDATE feedback);
  feedback text+attachments UNTRUSTED (the `db query` boundary wrapper тАФ evidence not commands,
  prompt-injection guard); ground claims in real code/repro; draft in Thai, brief, one ask (shown as
  `р╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Кр╣Ир╕зр╕в AI`); never double-draft. Not TDD-testable (procedure doc) тАФ validated by running Step 1 live
  (returns the 2 open reports; untrusted-data boundary confirms the guard). Cadence stays manual.
  **ARC U1тАУU4 + skill COMPLETE тАФ the loop runs end to end. Remaining (optional): U5 annotated screenshots
  (reuse photo_markups) ┬╖ U6 reporter notification of a published reply.\*\*

poor on mobile (operator's device); the card's existing `FeedbackStatusControl` is the move

**BUG FIX (from feedback triage) SHIPPED prod 2026-06-25 (mig `20260813001500`, pgTAP 11 6/6) тАФ
project_director could not upload photos.** Symptom (real report 0e3a7f3d, a PD): adding a photo
stuck forever on "р╕гр╕нр╕кр╣Ир╕Зр╕гр╕╣р╕ЫтАжр╣Ар╕бр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕▒р╕Нр╕Нр╕▓р╕У" on every device with working net. **ROOT CAUSE:** ADR 0058
(spec 152, mig 20260752000000) made project_director a see-all writer and added it to the
`photo_logs` INSERT policy тАФ but that sweep only reconstructed `public.*` table policies from
pg_policies; the `photos` STORAGE bucket upload policy (on `storage.objects`, mig 20260524040000)
was MISSED. So a PD's capture enqueued тЖТ bytes upload to `photos` denied by RLS тЖТ offline queue
(`src/lib/photos/upload-queue.ts`) stuck at step `upload`, retried forever тЖТ the generic "waiting
for signal" banner never cleared (it never reached the photo_logs insert, which already admits PD).
**FIX:** DROP+CREATE "photos uploads by sa/pm/super" adding `project_director` (kept the policy name
тАФ precedent: 20260752 added PD to "photo_logs insert by sa/pm/super" without renaming). Verified
live (pg_policies with_check now lists project_director). Test-first: pgTAP 11 +assert (plan 5тЖТ6,
with_check like '%project_director%'). No types/app-code change. **STILL OPEN (handed to the
operator's running task task_1efe2a55):** the SIBLING pr-attachments bucket upload policies carry the
same ADR-0058 gap (delivery/invoice photos), and the upload-queue banner lies on a permanent 403
(treats authz denial like a connectivity wait тАФ classifyStorageUploadError only detects alreadyExists).

The migration FILES (20260614100200 etc.) showed sa/pm/super but were stale; **source-from-LIVE caught

р╕кр╕┤р╕Чр╕Шр╕┤р╣Мр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Юр╕н р╕Хр╕┤р╕Фр╕Хр╣Ир╕нр╕Ьр╕╣р╣Йр╕Фр╕╣р╣Бр╕ер╕гр╕░р╕Ър╕Ъ` (and the per-item label `р╕кр╕┤р╕Чр╕Шр╕┤р╣Мр╣Др╕бр╣Ир╕Юр╕н`) instead of the misleading
`тАжр╣Ар╕бр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╕бр╕╡р╕кр╕▒р╕Нр╕Нр╕▓р╕У`. Queue logic unchanged тАФ items still kept (evidence never auto-dropped), just labelled

  `р╣Ар╕гр╕╖р╣Ир╕нр╕Зр╣Бр╕Ир╣Йр╕Зр╣Гр╕лр╕бр╣Ир╕гр╕нр╕Хр╕гр╕зр╕И`, icon Inbox; renders only when >0). Honest countтЖТdestination (open reports =
  the `р╣Гр╕лр╕бр╣И` column of the review kanban). Test-first: `tests/unit/feedback-triage-count.test.ts` (3 тАФ
  head-count query shape + status='open' + 0 on error/null) RED (no module) тЖТ GREEN; AwarenessCard
